	declare root_notes[2, 12] : string[][]
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 1) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (12 - 1)) 
			int_buffer{int} := search[all_root_note_nums{int[]}, ii{int}]
			root_notes[i{int}, ii{int}]{string} := all_root_notes[int_buffer{int}]{string}
			if(ii{int} < (12 - 1))
				if(all_root_note_nums[int_buffer{int}]{int} = all_root_note_nums[int_buffer{int} + 1]{int})
					root_notes[i{int}, ii{int}]{string} := all_root_notes[int_buffer{int} + i{int}]{string}
				end if
			end if
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	declare midi_notes[2, 127] : string[][]
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 1) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 126) 
			midi_notes[i{int}, ii{int}]{string} := root_notes[i{int}, ii{int} mod 12]{string} & ((ii{int} / 12) - 2)
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while

		declare instrument_browser.font_title : int := 1
		declare instrument_browser.font_value : int := 17
		declare instrument.exists[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.names[512] : string[]
		declare instrument.short_names[512] : string[]
		declare instrument.type[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.active[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.range_low[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.range_high[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.start_group[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.start_group_name[512] : string[]
		declare instrument.num_groups[512] : int[] := [0]
		declare instrument.dynamic_layers[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.release_layers[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.rr_nums[512] : int[]
		declare instrument.is_in_ensemble[512] : int[]
		declare read slot.loaded_sound[10] : int[]
		declare slot.rr_cycle[10] : int[] := [0]
		declare none : int := 0
		declare inst.id : int
		declare inst.slot : int
		load_array(instrument.exists{int[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.names{string[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.short_names{string[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.type{int[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.range_low{int[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.range_high{int[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.start_group_name{string[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.dynamic_layers{int[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.release_layers{int[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.rr_nums{int[]}, 2)
		load_array(instrument.is_in_ensemble{int[]}, 2)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (512 - 1)) 
			if((instrument.exists[i{int}]{int} = 1) and (instrument.is_in_ensemble[i{int}]{int} = 1))
				instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int} := get_group_idx(instrument.start_group_name[i{int}]{string})
				if(instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int} = NI_NOT_FOUND{int})
					message("could not find groups for " & instrument.names[i{int}]{string})
					instrument.exists[i{int}]{int} := 0
				else
					if(instrument.type[i{int}]{int} = 0)
						instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int} := instrument.rr_nums[i{int}]{int} + 1
					else
						if(instrument.type[i{int}]{int} = 1)
							instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int} := ((instrument.dynamic_layers[i{int}]{int} + instrument.release_layers[i{int}]{int}) + 1) + (1 * sgn(instrument.release_layers[i{int}]{int}))
						else
							if(instrument.type[i{int}]{int} = 3)
								if(instrument.dynamic_layers[i{int}]{int} > 0)
									instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int} := instrument.dynamic_layers[i{int}]{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[i{int}]{int} + 1)
								else
									instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int} := instrument.rr_nums[i{int}]{int} + 1
								end if
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while

	iii{int} := 0

		btn_tag_grid_y[i{int}]{int} := tag_matrix_coord[1]{int} + (ii{int} * (btn_tag_height{int} + 1))

		btn_tag_grid_y[i{int}]{int} := btn_tag_grid_y[i{int}]{int} + (is_in_range(ii{int}, row1_NUM_ROWS[iii{int}]{int}, (row1_NUM_ROWS[iii{int}]{int} + row2_NUM_ROWS[iii{int}]{int}) - 1) * row2_offset_y[iii{int}]{int})
		ii{int} := (ii{int} + 1) mod (row1_NUM_ROWS[iii{int}]{int} + row2_NUM_ROWS[iii{int}]{int})
		iii{int} := iii{int} + eq(ii{int}, 0)
		inc(i{int})
	end while

	declare motion_id_start : int := 0
	declare ui_slider read sli_fxrack_control[10, 3, 4] : int[][][] (0, 1000000)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
				set_slider_properties(sli_fxrack_control[i{int}, ii{int}, iii{int}]{int}, 500000, "fader-2", - 1200)
				set_bounds(sli_fxrack_control[i{int}, ii{int}, iii{int}]{int}, 0, 38, 40, 100)
				sli_fxrack_control[i{int}, ii{int}, iii{int}]{int} -> parent_panel := fx_display{int}
				if((i{int} > 0) or (ii{int} > 0))
					sli_fxrack_control[i{int}, ii{int}, iii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				end if
				sli_fxrack_control[i{int}, ii{int}, iii{int}]{int} -> help := "Control the listed FX parameter."
				motion.add_fader(sli_fxrack_control[i{int}, ii{int}, iii{int}]{int}, motion_id_start{int}, 0, 1000000, i{int})
				inc(motion_id_start{int})
				inc(iii{int})
			end while
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while

	btn_delete_preset{int} -> help := "Remove the current User story from the browser."
	btn_edit_tags{int} -> help := "Edit the tags for the selected User story."
	declare midi_update_counter : int := 0
	declare midi_update_flag : int := 1
	declare ui_button btn_resave_all_nkas : int 
	set_button_properties(btn_resave_all_nkas{int}, "resave all nkas")
	set_bounds(btn_resave_all_nkas{int}, 0, 0, 120, 18)
	btn_resave_all_nkas{int} -> parent_panel := get_ui_id(panel.shape{int})
	btn_resave_all_nkas{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	declare ui_button btn_empty_click : int 
	set_button_properties(btn_empty_click{int}, "", "transparent")
	set_bounds(btn_empty_click{int}, 0, 0, 850, 508)
	btn_empty_click{int} -> z_layer := - 1
end on

on persistence_changed{thread-unsafe}
	set_controller(mnu_cc{int}, 100)
	lbl_version{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	if(eq(development[0]{int}, 22714) = 1)
		lbl_version{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	end if
	call update.preset_browser
	check_update_1_1_on_startup
	call ui.update_seq_params
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call tempo.update
	call update_morph_faders
	call global_range.compute
	call update_key_colors
	call update_chord_slots
	call dynamics.update
	call update_chord_info_label
	call set_solo_mute
	call update_solo_mute_buttons
	call motion.update
	call update_ks_pressed_states
	call nks.update_all_labels
	preview.update_purge
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> picture_state := (mnu_keyswitch{int} * 2) + btn_keyswitches_show{int}
	motion.modwheel{int} := CC[1]{int}
	motion.mw_animation
	s{int} := 0
	while(s{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		current_controller_value[s{int}]{int} := motion.modwheel{int}
		inc(s{int})
	end while
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_LIM_IN_GAIN{int}, 416667, - 1, 7, NI_MAIN_BUS{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 445449, - 1, 7, NI_MAIN_BUS{int})
	update_ks_pressed_states
	if(nki_version{real} < 1.2)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
					SEQ_PARAMETERS[ii{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} := 1
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		nki_version{real} := 1.2
	end if
	call undo.flush
end on

on note{thread-unsafe}
	ignore_event(EVENT_ID{int})
	last_onnote_cb_ID{int} := NI_CALLBACK_ID{int}
	recently_on_note{int} := EVENT_NOTE{int}
	i{int} := search[recent_notes{int[]}, - 1]
	if(i{int} = - 1)
		recent_notes[0]{int} := recently_on_note{int}
	else
		recent_notes[i{int}]{int} := recently_on_note{int}
	end if
	message("sus midi on note at: " & NI_SONG_POSITION{int})
	if((NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} = 1) and (transport_stamp{int} = - 1))
		transport_stamp{int} := NI_SONG_POSITION{int}
		midi.seq_data_written{int} := 0
		if(btn_chord_page_enter{int} = 0)
			lbl_midiexport_dummy{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_midiexport{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		lbl_midiexport_dummy{int} -> picture := "ani_midiexport"
		animation.midiexport_id{int} := animation.picture.start(get_ui_id(lbl_midiexport_dummy{int}), 0, 30, 30, 4)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			mf_remove_event(by_track(i{int}))
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
	if((search[keyswitches{int[]}, EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})] # - 1) and (btn_midi_mode{int} = 0))
		if((search[keyswitches{int[]}, EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})] # mnu_keyswitch{int}) and (btn_midi_mode{int} = 0))
			load_keyswitch(search[keyswitches{int[]}, EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})])
			update_ks_pressed_states
			exit
		end if
	else
		set_key_pressed(EVENT_NOTE{int}, 1)
	end if
	if(((EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})) = 43) and (btn_midi_mode{int} = 0))
		message("received ending")
		end_flag{int} := 1
		mnu_keyswitch{int} := 4
		call update_key_colors
		update_ks_pressed_states
	end if
	if((((EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})) > (44 + (12 * mnu_ks{int}))) or (btn_midi_mode{int} = 1)) and (chord.playing{int} = 0))
		if(btn_midi_mode{int} = 0)
			if(cursor{int} = 0)
				time_check{int} := 1
				time_check_stamp{int} := ENGINE_UPTIME{int}
			end if
			if(search[note_buffer{int[]}, EVENT_NOTE{int}] = - 1)
				note_buffer[cursor{int}]{int} := EVENT_NOTE{int} - 0
				active_notes[EVENT_NOTE{int}]{int} := 1
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
					mf.on_note_timestamps[i{int}, EVENT_NOTE{int}]{int} := NI_SONG_POSITION{int}
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				inc(cursor{int})
				call sort_buffer
			end if
			if(seq.active{int} = 0)
				wait(REC_TIME{int})
				seq.active{int} := 1
				midi.seq_data_written{int} := 1
				sustained.active{int} := 0
			end if
		end if
		free_mode_velocities[EVENT_NOTE{int}]{int} := EVENT_VELOCITY{int}
		if(1 = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
				if(((slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1) and (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14)) and (btn_midi_mode{int} = 0))
					free_mode_slot{int} := i{int}
					call buffer_to_free_mode
				end if
				if((btn_midi_mode{int} = 1) and (get_event_par(EVENT_ID{int}, EVENT_PAR_MIDI_CHANNEL{int}) = i{int}))
					triggered_note{int} := EVENT_NOTE{int}
					pressed_note{int} := EVENT_NOTE{int}
					trigger_free_mode(i{int}, triggered_note{int}, pressed_note{int}, EVENT_VELOCITY{int})
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
	end if
	wait(200000 - REC_TIME{int})
	if(recently_on_note{int} = EVENT_NOTE{int})
		recently_on_note{int} := 0
		array.reset(recent_notes{int[]}, - 1)
		array.reset(recent_triggered{int[]}, 0)
	end if
end on

on release{thread-unsafe}
	a{int} := search[_last_note_ids{int[]}, EVENT_ID{int}]
	if(a{int} # - 1)
		if((KEY_DOWN[a{int} mod 128]{int} = 1) or (CC[64]{int} >= 64))
			ignore_event(EVENT_ID{int})
		end if
	end if
	if(search[keyswitches{int[]}, EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})] # - 1)
		update_ks_pressed_states
	end if
	if((EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})) = 43)
		update_ks_pressed_states
	end if
	if((get_event_mark(EVENT_ID{int}, MARK_1{int}) = 0) and (chord.playing{int} = 0))
		if((search[keyswitches{int[]}, EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})] = - 1) and ((EVENT_NOTE{int} - (12 * mnu_ks{int})) # 43))
			set_key_pressed(EVENT_NOTE{int}, 0)
		end if
		last_release_cb_ID{int} := NI_CALLBACK_ID{int}
		if(btn_midi_mode{int} = 0)
			if(CC[64]{int} < 64)
				call check_note_buffer_state
				if(cursor{int} = 0)
					wait(500)
					if((cursor{int} = 0) and (last_release_cb_ID{int} = NI_CALLBACK_ID{int}))
						message("CURSOR = 0")
						call stop_engine
						sustained.active{int} := 0
					end if
				end if
			end if
		else
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
				if(get_event_par(EVENT_ID{int}, EVENT_PAR_MIDI_CHANNEL{int}) = i{int})
					last_note_ids[i{int}, EVENT_NOTE{int}]{int} := - 1
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
	end if
end on

on listener{thread-unsafe}
	if(NI_SIGNAL_TYPE{int} = NI_SIGNAL_TIMER_MS{int})
		call scanning_automation
	end if
	if(NI_SIGNAL_TYPE{int} = NI_SIGNAL_TIMER_MS{int})
		if(seq.active{int} = 1)
			if(((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} - last_beat{int}) # 1) and (last_beat{int} # 0))
				play_pos{int} := play_pos{int} + ((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} - last_beat{int}) - 1)
			end if
			last_beat{int} := ENGINE_UPTIME{int}
		end if
		timed_display.iterator{int} := 0
		while(timed_display.iterator{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
			if(timed_display.controls[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int} # - 1)
				inc(timed_display.counters[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int})
				if(timed_display.counters[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int} = (timed_display.times[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int} + 1))
					timed_display.controls[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int} -> text := timed_display.texts[timed_display.iterator{int}]{string}
					if(timed_display.properties[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int} > 0)
						none{int} := animation.picture.start(timed_display.controls[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int}, timed_display.properties[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int} - 1, 0, timed_display.properties[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int}, 0)
					end if
					timed_display.controls[timed_display.iterator{int}]{int} := - 1
				end if
			end if
			inc(timed_display.iterator{int})
		end while
		inc(host_manager.counter{int})
		if(host_manager.counter{int} >= 25)
			host_manager.counter{int} := 0
			if((tempo{real} # (int_to_real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960)) or (update_speed_flag{int} = 1))
				call tempo.update
				update_speed_flag{int} := 0
				message("executed tempo change")
			end if
			if(btn_signature_sync{int} = 1)
				if((SIGNATURE_NUM{int} # host_manager.num{int}) or (SIGNATURE_DENOM{int} # host_manager.denom{int}))
					host_manager.num{int} := SIGNATURE_NUM{int}
					host_manager.denom{int} := SIGNATURE_DENOM{int}
					host_manager.buffer{int} := mnu_signature{int}
					mnu_signature{int} := 99
					if(host_manager.denom{int} = 4)
						if(host_manager.num{int} = 3)
							mnu_signature{int} := 1
						else
							if(host_manager.num{int} = 4)
								mnu_signature{int} := 0
							else
								if(host_manager.num{int} = 5)
									mnu_signature{int} := 2
								end if
							end if
						end if
					else
						if(host_manager.denom{int} = 8)
							if(host_manager.num{int} = 5)
								mnu_signature{int} := 3
							else
								if(host_manager.num{int} = 6)
									mnu_signature{int} := 4
								else
									if(host_manager.num{int} = 7)
										mnu_signature{int} := 5
									end if
								end if
							end if
						end if
					end if
					if(mnu_signature{int} # 99)
						call ui.update_seq_display
						call tempo.update
					else
						mnu_signature{int} := host_manager.buffer{int}
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(animation.frame_filter{int})
		if(animation.frame_filter{int} >= 50)
			animation.frame_filter{int} := 0
			animation.iterator{int} := 0
			while(animation.iterator{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
				if(animation.controls[animation.iterator{int}]{int} # - 1)
					if(animation.type[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 0)
						animation.offset.x{int} := 0
						animation.offset.y{int} := 0
						if(animation.length[animation.iterator{int}]{int} > 0)
							animation.time{real} := int_to_real(animation.time_left[animation.iterator{int}]{int}) / int_to_real(animation.length[animation.iterator{int}]{int})
							if((animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 0) or (animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 4))
								animation.offset.x{int} := real_to_int(animation.time{real} * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int}))
								animation.offset.y{int} := real_to_int(animation.time{real} * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int}))
							else
								if(animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 1)
									animation.offset.x{int} := real_to_int(((animation.time{real} * animation.time{real}) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int})) * (3 - (2 * animation.time{real})))
									animation.offset.y{int} := real_to_int(((animation.time{real} * animation.time{real}) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int})) * (3 - (2 * animation.time{real})))
								else
									if(animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 2)
										animation.offset.x{int} := real_to_int([(1 - ((1 - animation.time{real}) * (1 - animation.time{real}))) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int})])
										animation.offset.y{int} := real_to_int([(1 - ((1 - animation.time{real}) * (1 - animation.time{real}))) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int})])
									else
										if(animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 3)
											animation.offset.x{int} := real_to_int((animation.time{real} * animation.time{real}) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int}))
											animation.offset.y{int} := real_to_int((animation.time{real} * animation.time{real}) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int}))
										end if
									end if
								end if
							end if
						end if
						animation.controls[animation.iterator{int}]{int} -> x := animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.offset.x{int}
						animation.controls[animation.iterator{int}]{int} -> y := animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 1]{int} - animation.offset.y{int}
					end if
					if(animation.type[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 1)
						animation.offset.x{int} := 0
						if(animation.length[animation.iterator{int}]{int} > 0)
							animation.time{real} := int_to_real(animation.time_left[animation.iterator{int}]{int}) / int_to_real(animation.length[animation.iterator{int}]{int})
							if((animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 0) or (animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 4))
								animation.offset.x{int} := real_to_int(animation.time{real} * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int}))
							else
								if(animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 1)
									animation.offset.x{int} := real_to_int(((animation.time{real} * animation.time{real}) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int})) * (3 - (2 * animation.time{real})))
								else
									if(animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 2)
										animation.offset.x{int} := real_to_int([(1 - ((1 - animation.time{real}) * (1 - animation.time{real}))) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int})])
									else
										if(animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 3)
											animation.offset.x{int} := real_to_int((animation.time{real} * animation.time{real}) * int_to_real(animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.start_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int}))
										end if
									end if
								end if
							end if
						end if
						animation.controls[animation.iterator{int}]{int} -> picture_state := animation.end_pos[animation.iterator{int}, 0]{int} - animation.offset.x{int}
					end if
					if(animation.time_left[animation.iterator{int}]{int} <= 0)
						if(animation.mode[animation.iterator{int}]{int} = 4)
							animation.time_left[animation.iterator{int}]{int} := animation.length[animation.iterator{int}]{int}
						else
							animation.controls[animation.iterator{int}]{int} := - 1
						end if
					end if
					dec(animation.time_left[animation.iterator{int}]{int})
				end if
				inc(animation.iterator{int})
			end while
		end if
		if(chord.playing{int} = 1)
			if(((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (chord.playing_preview{int} = 0)) and ((((real(chord.play_pos{int}) + (chord.midi_step{real} / 8)) mod chord.midi_step{real}) < 1) or (chord.started{int} = 1)))
				chord.slot_playing{int} := ((int([(real(max(chord.play_pos{int}, 0)) + (chord.midi_step{real} / 8)) / chord.midi_step{real}]) / eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) + ((int([(real(max(chord.play_pos{int}, 0)) + (chord.midi_step{real} / 8)) / chord.midi_step{real}]) mod eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) / (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1))
				int_buffer{int} := active_chord_set{int}
				chord.update_active_slot(chord.slot_playing{int})
				if(chord_playback.iterator{int} = 0)
					if(_timeline_keyswitches[chord.slot_playing{int} / 2]{int} # - 1)
						load_keyswitch(_timeline_keyswitches[chord.slot_playing{int} / 2]{int})
					end if
				end if
				if(((is_in_range([chord.slot_playing{int}], 0, [(chord_set_num{int} * 16) - 2]) = 0) and (chord.ended{int} = 0)) and (chord.should_end{int} = 0))
					message("triggered ending at slot " & chord.slot_playing{int})
					chord.should_end{int} := 1
					message("wait for " & (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1)) & " 8ths = " & int(((real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1)) * chord.midi_step{real}) - (chord.midi_step{real} / 8)) * 1000) & " ms")
					wait(int((real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1)) * chord.midi_step{real}) * 1000))
					if(btn_cycle{int} = 1)
						chord.ended{int} := 0
						chord.should_end{int} := 0
						chord.started{int} := 1
						chord.slot_playing{int} := 0
						chord_playback.iterator{int} := 0
						chord.play_pos{int} := - int(chord.midi_step{real} / 8)
						play_pos{int} := - int(chord.midi_step{real} / 8)
						message("RESET PLAY POS to " & chord.play_pos{int} & " | " & (chord.midi_step{real} / 8))
						chord.update_active_slot(chord.slot_playing{int})
						call update_chord_slots
						call ui.update_minus_button
						exit
					else
						message("stopped at")
						message("chord.slot_playing = " & chord.slot_playing{int} & ", chord.ended = " & chord.ended{int})
						call stop_engine
						btn_play{int} := 0
						chord.should_end{int} := 0
						exit
					end if
				end if
				if(active_chord_set{int} # int_buffer{int})
					call update_chord_slots
					call ui.update_minus_button
				end if
			end if
			if((((chord_playback.dynamics_callback_filter{int} > 20) or (chord_playback.dynamics_callback_filter.first{int} = 1)) or (chord.play_pos{int} = 0)) and (chord.playing_preview{int} = 0))
				chord_playback.dynamics_callback_filter{int} := 0
				chord_playback.dynamics_callback_filter.first{int} := 0
				if((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (btn_dynamics_active{int} = 1))
					dynamic.idx{int} := clamp(int(real(chord.play_pos{int}) / ((chord.midi_step{real} * real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int})) / 2)), 0, [(16 * 8) - 1])
					dynamic.mix{real} := (real(chord.play_pos{int}) / ((chord.midi_step{real} * real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int})) / 2)) mod 1
					if(_line_mode[dynamic.idx{int}]{int} = 0)
						set_controller(1, clamp(_dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int} + int(dynamic.mix{real} * real(_dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int})), 1, 127))
					else
						if(_line_mode[dynamic.idx{int}]{int} = 1)
							set_controller(1, clamp(_dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{real} * dynamic.mix{real}) - 1) / 2) * real(_dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int})), 1, 127))
						else
							if(_line_mode[dynamic.idx{int}]{int} = 2)
								set_controller(1, clamp(_dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int} + int(1 - (cos((dynamic.mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2) * real(_dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int}))), 1, 127))
							else
								if(_line_mode[dynamic.idx{int}]{int} = 3)
									set_controller(1, clamp(_dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int} + int(sin((dynamic.mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2) * real(_dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int})), 1, 127))
								end if
							end if
						end if
					end if
					current_controller{int} := 1
					call controller_callback
				end if
				if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
					lbl_chord_play_indicator{int} -> x := 38 + int(((real(chord.play_pos{int}) / ((chord.midi_step{real} * real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int})) / 2)) * real(78)) mod real(78 * 8))
					lbl_chord_play_indicator{int} -> y := (301 + 17) + (70 * (int(((real(chord.play_pos{int}) / ((chord.midi_step{real} * real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int})) / 2)) * real(78)) / real(78 * 8)) mod 2))
				end if
			end if
			inc(chord_playback.dynamics_callback_filter{int})
			if((((real(chord.play_pos{int}) + (chord.midi_step{real} / 8)) mod chord.midi_step{real}) < 1) or (chord.started{int} = 1))
				if(((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (chord.playing_preview{int} = 0)) and (chord.ended{int} = 0))
					if(chord.should_end{int} = 1)
						chord.ended{int} := 1
					end if
					if((chord_playback.iterator{int} = 0) or (chord_playback.iterator{int} = (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1)))
						message("played new chord")
						chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 5]{int} := max(0, chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 5]{int})
						if(chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 0]{int} # - 1)
							cursor{int} := 0
							_i{int} := 0
							while(_i{int} <= 127) 
								release_exceptions[_i{int}]{int} := 0
								inc(_i{int})
							end while
							chord.lowest_note{int} := 127
							_i{int} := 0
							while(_i{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
								if(chord.types[chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} # - 1)
									chord.note{int} := ((((chord.playback_octave{int} + (chords.octaves[chord.slot_playing{int}]{int} * 12)) + chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 0]{int}) + modes[chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 1]{int}, chord.types[chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} mod 7]{int}) + ((chord.types[chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} / 7) * 12)) - (bool(chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 5]{int}) * 12)
									if(_i{int} < chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 5]{int})
										chord.note{int} := chord.note{int} + 12
									end if
									chord.lowest_note{int} := min(chord.note{int}, chord.lowest_note{int})
									note_buffer[cursor{int}]{int} := chord.note{int}
									active_notes[chord.note{int}]{int} := 1
									inc(cursor{int})
									call sort_buffer
									i{int} := 0
									while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
										if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14)
											if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
												last_note_ids[i{int}, chord.note{int}]{int} := - 1
											end if
											free_mode_velocities[chord.note{int}]{int} := _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int}
											free_mode_slot{int} := i{int}
											call buffer_to_free_mode
										end if
										inc(i{int})
									end while
									release_exceptions[chord.note{int}]{int} := 1
								end if
								inc(_i{int})
							end while
							call release_all_sus_notes_except
							if(chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 2]{int} # - 1)
								note_buffer[cursor{int}]{int} := closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 2]{int})
								active_notes[closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 2]{int})]{int} := 1
								inc(cursor{int})
								call sort_buffer
								i{int} := 0
								while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
									if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14)
										if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
											last_note_ids[i{int}, closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 2]{int})]{int} := - 1
										end if
										free_mode_velocities[closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords[chord.slot_playing{int}, 2]{int})]{int} := _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int}
										free_mode_slot{int} := i{int}
										call buffer_to_free_mode
									end if
									inc(i{int})
								end while
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if((btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1) and (chord.playing_preview{int} = 0))
					if(active_jam_slot{int} # - 1)
						if((((chord_playback.iterator{int} mod eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) = 0) or ((chord_playback.iterator{int} mod eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) = (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1))) or (chord.started{int} = 1))
							seq.active{int} := 1
							message("played new chord")
							jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int} := max(0, jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int})
							if(jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 0]{int} # - 1)
								cursor{int} := 0
								_i{int} := 0
								while(_i{int} <= 127) 
									release_exceptions[_i{int}]{int} := 0
									inc(_i{int})
								end while
								chord.lowest_note{int} := 127
								_i{int} := 0
								while(_i{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
									if(chord.types[jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} # - 1)
										chord.note{int} := ((((chord.playback_octave{int} + (jams.octaves[active_jam_slot{int}]{int} * 12)) + jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 0]{int}) + modes[jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 1]{int}, chord.types[jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} mod 7]{int}) + ((chord.types[jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} / 7) * 12)) - (bool(jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int}) * 12)
										if(_i{int} < jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int})
											chord.note{int} := chord.note{int} + 12
										end if
										chord.lowest_note{int} := min(chord.note{int}, chord.lowest_note{int})
										note_buffer[cursor{int}]{int} := chord.note{int}
										active_notes[chord.note{int}]{int} := 1
										inc(cursor{int})
										call sort_buffer
										i{int} := 0
										while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
											if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14)
												if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
													last_note_ids[i{int}, chord.note{int}]{int} := - 1
												end if
												free_mode_velocities[chord.note{int}]{int} := _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int}
												free_mode_slot{int} := i{int}
												call buffer_to_free_mode
											end if
											inc(i{int})
										end while
										release_exceptions[chord.note{int}]{int} := 1
									end if
									inc(_i{int})
								end while
								call release_all_sus_notes_except
								if(jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 2]{int} # - 1)
									note_buffer[cursor{int}]{int} := closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 2]{int})
									active_notes[closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 2]{int})]{int} := 1
									inc(cursor{int})
									call sort_buffer
									i{int} := 0
									while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
										if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14)
											if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
												last_note_ids[i{int}, closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 2]{int})]{int} := - 1
											end if
											free_mode_velocities[closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 2]{int})]{int} := _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int}
											free_mode_slot{int} := i{int}
											call buffer_to_free_mode
										end if
										inc(i{int})
									end while
								end if
							end if
						end if
					end if
				else
					if(chord.playing_preview{int} = 1)
						if((((chord_playback.iterator{int} mod eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) = 0) or ((chord_playback.iterator{int} mod eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) = (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1))) or (chord.started{int} = 1))
							seq.active{int} := 1
							message("played new chord")
							chords_preview[5]{int} := max(0, chords_preview[5]{int})
							if(chords_preview[0]{int} # - 1)
								cursor{int} := 0
								_i{int} := 0
								while(_i{int} <= 127) 
									release_exceptions[_i{int}]{int} := 0
									inc(_i{int})
								end while
								chord.lowest_note{int} := 127
								_i{int} := 0
								while(_i{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
									if(chord.types[chords_preview[3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} # - 1)
										chord.note{int} := ((((chord.playback_octave{int} + (chords_preview[6]{int} * 12)) + chords_preview[0]{int}) + modes[chords_preview[1]{int}, chord.types[chords_preview[3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} mod 7]{int}) + ((chord.types[chords_preview[3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} / 7) * 12)) - (bool(chords_preview[5]{int}) * 12)
										if(_i{int} < chords_preview[5]{int})
											chord.note{int} := chord.note{int} + 12
										end if
										chord.lowest_note{int} := min(chord.note{int}, chord.lowest_note{int})
										note_buffer[cursor{int}]{int} := chord.note{int}
										active_notes[chord.note{int}]{int} := 1
										inc(cursor{int})
										call sort_buffer
										i{int} := 0
										while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
											if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14)
												if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
													last_note_ids[i{int}, chord.note{int}]{int} := - 1
												end if
												free_mode_velocities[chord.note{int}]{int} := _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int}
												free_mode_slot{int} := i{int}
												call buffer_to_free_mode
											end if
											inc(i{int})
										end while
										release_exceptions[chord.note{int}]{int} := 1
									end if
									inc(_i{int})
								end while
								call release_all_sus_notes_except
								if(chords_preview[2]{int} # - 1)
									note_buffer[cursor{int}]{int} := closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords_preview[2]{int})
									active_notes[closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords_preview[2]{int})]{int} := 1
									inc(cursor{int})
									call sort_buffer
									i{int} := 0
									while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
										if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14)
											if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
												last_note_ids[i{int}, closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords_preview[2]{int})]{int} := - 1
											end if
											free_mode_velocities[closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords_preview[2]{int})]{int} := _dynamic_positions[dynamic.idx{int}]{int}
											free_mode_slot{int} := i{int}
											call buffer_to_free_mode
										end if
										inc(i{int})
									end while
								end if
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
				chord_playback.iterator{int} := (chord_playback.iterator{int} + 1) mod eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}
				chord.started{int} := 0
			end if
			inc(chord.play_pos{int})
		end if
		if(mw_active{int} = 1)
			inc(mw_touched_counter{int})
			if(mw_touched_counter{int} > 500)
				mw_touched_counter{int} := 0
				motion.modwheel_show_glow(0)
				mw_active{int} := 0
			end if
		end if
		trigger_seq
		lfo.execute
		if(midi_update_counter{int} > 500)
			midi_update_counter{int} := 0
			if(midi_update_flag{int} = 1)
				midi_update_flag{int} := 0
				call timeline.update_midi_export
			end if
		end if
		inc(midi_update_counter{int})
		if(play.history.create_new_undo_flag{int} = 1)
			if((PLAYED_VOICES_INST{int} > 0) and (seq.active{int} = 0))
				play.history.create_new_undo_flag{int} := 0
				call undo.flush
			end if
		end if
	end if
	if(NI_SIGNAL_TYPE{int} = NI_SIGNAL_TRANSP_STOP{int})
		transport_stamp{int} := - 1
		animation.abort(animation.midiexport_id{int})
		lbl_midiexport{int} -> picture := "btn_midiexport"
		if(midi.seq_data_written{int} = 1)
			message("midi generated")
			lbl_midiexport{int} -> picture_state := 0
			mf_set_export_area("The Score Sequencer MIDI", - 1, - 1, 0, 9)
			mf_copy_export_area(1)
		else
			message("midi NOT generated")
			lbl_midiexport_dummy{int} -> picture := "btn_midiexport"
			lbl_midiexport_dummy{int} -> picture_state := 2
		end if
		call midiexport.update_label_visibility
	end if
end on

on controller
	current_controller{int} := CC_NUM{int}
	current_controller_channel{int} := MIDI_CHANNEL{int}
	call controller_callback
	if(CC_NUM{int} = 64)
		if(CC[64]{int} < 64)
			call check_note_buffer_state
			if(cursor{int} = 0)
				if(cursor{int} = 0)
					message("SUS PEDAL RELEASED - CURSOR = 0")
					call stop_engine
					sustained.active{int} := 0
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_resave_all_nkas{int}){thread-unsafe}
	preset.idx{int} := 0
	while(preset.idx{int} <= 122) 
		browser.load_preset
		while(preset.is_loading{int} = 1) 
			wait(100000)
		end while
		wait(100000)
		call set_default_timeline
		resave_preset
		message("resaved preset " & preset.idx{int})
		wait(100000)
		inc(preset.idx{int})
	end while
end on

on ui_control(motion.btn_enable0{unknown}){thread-unsafe}
	if(in_range(0, 0, ((10 * 3) * 4) - 1))
		call fxRack.update
	else
		call motion.update
	end if
	call motion.apply_modwheel
	call motion.apply_lfo
end on

	end if

	call motion.apply_lfo

on ui_control(btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int}){thread-unsafe}
	current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} := - 1
	xy_fxRack{real[]} -> active_index := - 1
	show_fx_rack{int} := 1
	if((10 = 1) and (btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} = 0))
		show_fx_rack{int} := 0
	end if
	call fxRack.update
	if(10 = 1)
		call single_nki.gui_update
	end if
end on

on ui_control(xy_fxRack{real[]}){thread-unsafe}
	if(fxRack.executing{int} = 1)
		wait(100)
	end if
	if(fxRack.executing{int} = 0)
		fxRack.executing{int} := 1
		if(search[_fx_slot_order{int[]}, xy_fxRack{real[]} -> active_index, [active_slot{int} * 3], [((active_slot{int} + 1) * 3) - 1]] = - 1)
			if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} # - 1)
				xy_fxRack{real[]} -> active_index := fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
			end if
		else
			btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} := 0
			current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} := search[_fx_slot_order{int[]}, xy_fxRack{real[]} -> active_index, [active_slot{int} * 3], [((active_slot{int} + 1) * 3) - 1]] mod 3
		end if
		if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG{int})
				lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> y := xy_fxRack{real[]} -> y + int(scale.range(xy_fxRack[fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} + 1]{real}, 1, 0, 0, fx_lbl_max_pos{real}))
				if(animation.controls[fxRack.swapAnimation{int}]{int} = - 1)
					if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} < (3 - 1))
						if((lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> y + (lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> height / 4)) > lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1]{int} -> y)
							message("switch to bottom")
							message("switch " & current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} & " <-> " & (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1))
							message("switch idx " & fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} & " <-> " & fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int})
							int_buffer{int} := fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int}
							fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							int_buffer{int} := loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int}
							loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							int_buffer{int} := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int}
							loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							int_buffer{int} := fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int}
							fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							int_buffer{int} := delay_sync[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							delay_sync[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := delay_sync[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int}
							delay_sync[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
								int_buffer{int} := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value
								sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1), i{int}]{int} -> value
								sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1), i{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								fxRack.motion_id1{int} := search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int}]
								fxRack.motion_id2{int} := search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + 1), i{int}]{int}]
								int_buffer{int} := motion.btn_enable[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.btn_enable[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value := motion.btn_enable[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.btn_enable[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								int_buffer{int} := motion.mnu_source[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.mnu_source[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value := motion.mnu_source[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.mnu_source[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								int_buffer{int} := motion.sli_min[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.sli_min[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value := motion.sli_min[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.sli_min[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								int_buffer{int} := motion.sli_max[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.sli_max[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value := motion.sli_max[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.sli_max[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								inc(i{int})
							end while
							call motion.update
							fxRack.reorder_animation(1)
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(animation.controls[fxRack.swapAnimation{int}]{int} = - 1)
					if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} > 0)
						if(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> y < (lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1]{int} -> y + (lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1]{int} -> height / 4)))
							message("switch to top")
							message("switch " & current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} & " <-> " & (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1))
							message("switch idx " & fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} & " <-> " & fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int})
							int_buffer{int} := fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int}
							fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							int_buffer{int} := loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int}
							loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							int_buffer{int} := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int}
							loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							int_buffer{int} := fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int}
							fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							int_buffer{int} := delay_sync[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
							delay_sync[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := delay_sync[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int}
							delay_sync[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)]{int} := int_buffer{int}
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
								int_buffer{int} := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value
								sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1), i{int}]{int} -> value
								sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1), i{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								fxRack.motion_id1{int} := search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int}]
								fxRack.motion_id2{int} := search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1), i{int}]{int}]
								int_buffer{int} := motion.btn_enable[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.btn_enable[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value := motion.btn_enable[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.btn_enable[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								int_buffer{int} := motion.mnu_source[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.mnu_source[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value := motion.mnu_source[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.mnu_source[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								int_buffer{int} := motion.sli_min[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.sli_min[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value := motion.sli_min[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.sli_min[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								int_buffer{int} := motion.sli_max[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.sli_max[fxRack.motion_id1{int}]{int} -> value := motion.sli_max[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value
								motion.sli_max[fxRack.motion_id2{int}]{int} -> value := int_buffer{int}
								inc(i{int})
							end while
							call motion.update
							fxRack.reorder_animation(- 1)
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP{int})
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
					xy_fxRack[fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} + 1]{real} := abs(fx_slot_pos[i{int}]{real} - 1)
					lbl_fx[i{int}]{int} -> y := lbl_fx_slot_pos[i{int}]{int}
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				call fxRack.update
			end if
			if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN{int})
				if(xy_fxRack{real[]} -> key_alt = 1)
					loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := 6
					loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := 0
				end if
				call fxRack.update
			end if
		end if
		fxRack.executing{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(mnu_reverb_type{int}){thread-unsafe}
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_IRC{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}))
		load_ir_sample(ir_names[mnu_ir{int}]{string}, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_IRC_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_PLATEREVERB{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}))
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
			lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := "Time"
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_RAUM{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}))
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
				lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := "Time"
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_REVERB2{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}))
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
					lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := "Time"
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	call global_fx.open
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
end on

on ui_control(mnu_ir{int})
	load_ir_sample(ir_names[mnu_ir{int}]{string}, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
end on

on ui_control(btn_fxglobal_ir_next{int})
	mnu_ir{int} -> value := (mnu_ir{int} -> value + 1) mod num_elements[ir_names{string[]}]
	btn_fxglobal_ir_next{int} := 0
	load_ir_sample(ir_names[mnu_ir{int}]{string}, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
end on

on ui_control(btn_fxglobal_ir_previous{int})
	mnu_ir{int} -> value := (lt([mnu_ir{int} -> value - 1], 0) * num_elements[ir_names{string[]}]) + ((mnu_ir{int} -> value - 1) mod num_elements[ir_names{string[]}])
	btn_fxglobal_ir_previous{int} := 0
	load_ir_sample(ir_names[mnu_ir{int}]{string}, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
end on

on ui_control(sli_reverb_predelay{int})
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_IRC_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
		lbl_reverb_predelay{int} -> text := ((real(sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value / 10000) / 100) * 300) & " ms"
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
			lbl_reverb_predelay{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
				lbl_reverb_predelay{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
					lbl_reverb_predelay{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_predelay{int}), "Predelay", 0)
end on

on ui_control(sli_reverb_length{int})
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := "N/A"
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
			lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
				lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
					lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_length{int}), "Time", 0)
end on

on ui_control(sli_reverb_output{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_reverb_output{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
	lbl_reverb_output{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & "dB"
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_reverb_output{int}), "Mix", 0)
end on

on ui_control(btn_fxrack_effect_previous{int}){thread-unsafe}
	s{int} := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
	dec(s{int})
	if(s{int} < 0)
		s{int} := fx_subtypes_num[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} - 1
	end if
	message("New Fx Type Value: " & s{int})
	loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := s{int}
	call fxRack.update
end on

on ui_control(btn_fxrack_effect_next{int}){thread-unsafe}
	s{int} := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
	inc(s{int})
	if(s{int} >= fx_subtypes_num[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int})
		s{int} := 0
	end if
	loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := s{int}
	call fxRack.update
end on

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control0{unknown})
	message("exec " & 0)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[0]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[0]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[0]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[0]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[0]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[0]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if

			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[0]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[0]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

			end while

							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

	if(s{int} # - 1)

		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4

							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[2]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	_sli_fxrack_control[2]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
end on

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control3{unknown})
	message("exec " & 3)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[3]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[3]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[3]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[3]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[3]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[3]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[3]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0

							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

		end if

			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control6{unknown})
	message("exec " & 6)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[6]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[6]{int}

					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[7]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[7]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if

end on

	message("exec " & 8)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[8]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[8]{int}

			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[8]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[10]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

			else

						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[10]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[10]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control11{unknown})
	message("exec " & 11)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[11]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[11]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[11]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[12]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[12]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if

end on

	message("exec " & 13)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[13]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[13]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider

	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[13]{int}]

		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[15]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if

			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	_sli_fxrack_control[15]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
end on
