			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[17]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[17]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else

				i{int} := 0

							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					end while

		end if

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control20{unknown})
	message("exec " & 20)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[20]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[20]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[20]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[20]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[20]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[20]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[20]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)

		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4

							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[24]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control25{unknown})
	message("exec " & 25)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[25]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[25]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[25]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[25]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[25]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

		end if

					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[29]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[29]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if

end on

	message("exec " & 30)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[30]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[30]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[30]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[32]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control33{unknown})
	message("exec " & 33)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[33]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[33]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider

	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"

				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[34]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"

			end while

						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

		end if

			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[37]{int}

			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[37]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[37]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1))

							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[37]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if

			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[39]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[39]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control42{unknown})
	message("exec " & 42)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[42]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[42]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[42]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[42]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[42]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[42]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

		end if

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control45{unknown})
	message("exec " & 45)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[45]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[45]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider

	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"

							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[46]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control47{unknown})
	message("exec " & 47)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[47]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[47]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[47]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[47]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else

				i{int} := 0

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

		end if

			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control50{unknown})
	message("exec " & 50)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[50]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[50]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider

	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

		end if

		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)

		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4

		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[59]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[59]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[59]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[59]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[59]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

end on

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control64{unknown})
	message("exec " & 64)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[64]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[64]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[64]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[64]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[64]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[64]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[64]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1))

				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[64]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control67{unknown})
	message("exec " & 67)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[67]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[67]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider

							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[68]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control69{unknown})
	message("exec " & 69)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[69]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[69]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[69]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[69]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

	if(s{int} # - 1)

		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[76]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else

				i{int} := 0

						end while

					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if

			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

	message("exec " & 77)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[77]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[77]{int}

				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[78]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					inc(i{int})
				end while

				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[78]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if

		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4

		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[81]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[81]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[81]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[81]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if

			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

		end if
	end if

	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

			i{int} := 0

				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control86{unknown})
	message("exec " & 86)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[86]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[86]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[86]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[86]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[86]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[86]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[86]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[88]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control89{unknown})
	message("exec " & 89)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[89]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[89]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[89]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

					end while

			end if

	message("exec " & 91)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[91]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[91]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[91]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[91]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

		else

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[95]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[95]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	_sli_fxrack_control[95]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
end on

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control96{unknown})
	message("exec " & 96)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[96]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[96]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[96]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[96]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0

						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

		end if

				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[98]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else

					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[98]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[98]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control99{unknown})
	message("exec " & 99)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[99]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[99]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[99]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[100]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[100]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if

end on

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control101{unknown})
	message("exec " & 101)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[101]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[101]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[101]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[103]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[103]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[103]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

				end while

					i{int} := 0

						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[103]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if

	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

		end if
	end if

	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0

				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control108{unknown})
	message("exec " & 108)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[108]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[108]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[108]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[108]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[108]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[108]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if

			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

on ui_control(_sli_fxrack_control111{unknown})
	message("exec " & 111)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[111]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[111]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[111]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1))

							inc(ii{int})
						end while

					end while

			end if

	message("exec " & 113)
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[113]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[113]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, _sli_fxrack_control[113]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					inc(i{int})

			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0))

					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, _sli_fxrack_control[117]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if

			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}

on ui_control(sli_lfo_freq0{unknown})
	if(btn_lfo_sync[0]{int} -> value = 1)
		frequency[0]{real} := ((tempo{real} * 24) / 60) / real(ticks_durations[scale.range(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> value, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1)]{int})
		lbl_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> text := durations[scale.range(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> value, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1)]{string}
	else
		frequency[0]{real} := scale.range.log(real(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 0.01, 15.01)
		lbl_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> text := (int_to_real(real_to_int(frequency[0]{real} * 100)) / 100) & " Hz"
	end if
	sli_lfo_freq0{unknown} -> label := lbl_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> text
	timed_display.trigger(lbl_lfo_freq[0]{int}, "Frequency", 0)
end on

on ui_control(btn_lfo_bypass0{unknown})
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
end on

on ui_control(btn_lfo_sync0{unknown})
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
end on

on ui_control(mnu_lfo_type0{unknown})
	sli_lfo_type0{int} := mnu_lfo_type0{unknown} -> value
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
end on

on ui_control(sli_lfo_type0{unknown})
	mnu_lfo_type0{unknown} -> value := sli_lfo_type0{int}
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
end on

on ui_control(btn_fxglobal_lfo_type_previous{int})
	mnu_lfo_type0{unknown} -> value := (lt([mnu_lfo_type0{unknown} -> value - 1], 0) * 4) + ((mnu_lfo_type0{unknown} -> value - 1) mod 4)
	btn_fxglobal_lfo_type_previous{int} := 0
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
end on

on ui_control(btn_fxglobal_lfo_type_next{int})
	mnu_lfo_type0{unknown} -> value := (mnu_lfo_type0{unknown} -> value + 1) mod 4
	btn_fxglobal_lfo_type_next{int} := 0
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
end on

	set_eq_freq(active_slot{int}, 0 mod 3, _eq.sli_freq0{unknown})
	select(0 mod 3)
	case 0
		eq.lbl_param[0]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "Hz"
	case 1
		eq.lbl_param[0]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "Hz"
	case 2
		eq.lbl_param[0]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "Hz"
	end select
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(eq.lbl_param0{any}), "Freq", 0)
	call eq.curve
	call update_eq_handles
end on
