on ui_control(xy_eq{real[]}){thread-unsafe}
	if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN{int})
		eq.lbl_band[0]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		eq.lbl_band[1]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		eq.lbl_band[2]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
	end if
	if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP{int})
		xy_eq[0]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})) / 1e+06
		xy_eq[1]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})) / 1e+06
		xy_eq[2]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})) / 1e+06
		xy_eq[3]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})) / 1e+06
		xy_eq[4]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})) / 1e+06
		xy_eq[5]{real} := real(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})) / 1e+06
		xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index := - 1
		wait(1000000)
		eq.lbl_param[0]{int} -> text := "Freq"
		eq.lbl_param[1]{int} -> text := "Q"
		eq.lbl_param[2]{int} -> text := "Gain"
		eq.lbl_band[0]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		eq.lbl_band[1]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		eq.lbl_band[2]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
	else
		if(xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index # - 1)
			if(xy_eq{real[]} -> key_alt = 0)
				eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2]{int} -> value := int(xy_eq[xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index]{real} * 1e+06)
				eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2]{int} -> value := int(xy_eq[xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index + 1]{real} * 1e+06)
				set_eq_freq(active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2, eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2]{int} -> value)
				set_eq_gain(active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2, eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2]{int} -> value)
				select(xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2)
				case 0
					eq.lbl_param[0]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "Hz"
					eq.lbl_param[2]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "dB"
				case 1
					eq.lbl_param[0]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "Hz"
					eq.lbl_param[2]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "dB"
				case 2
					eq.lbl_param[0]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "Hz"
					eq.lbl_param[2]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int}) & "dB"
				end select
				eq.lbl_band[xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{int}
			else
				eq.sli_q[active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2]{int} -> value := int(xy_eq[xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index + 1]{real} * 1e+06)
				set_eq_q(active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2, eq.sli_q[active_slot{int}, xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2]{int} -> value)
				select(xy_eq{real[]} -> active_index / 2)
				case 0
					eq.lbl_param[1]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_BW1{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})
				case 1
					eq.lbl_param[1]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_BW2{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})
				case 2
					eq.lbl_param[1]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_BW3{int}, - 1, eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + active_slot{int})
				end select
			end if
		end if
	end if
	call eq.curve
end on

on ui_control(btn_eq_position{int}){thread-unsafe}
	eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} := btn_eq_position{int}
	load_fx(active_slot{int})
	call fxRack.update
end on

	eq_bypass[active_slot{int}]{int} := btn_eq_bypass{int}
	load_fx(active_slot{int})
	call fxRack.update
end on

on ui_control(sli_attack0{unknown})
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_attack[0]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_attack[0]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_attack[0]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[0]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[0]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[0]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_attack[0]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[0]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[0]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[0]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	sli_attack[0]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	call nks.update_attack_release_labels
end on

					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[0]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[0]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	sli_release[0]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	call nks.update_attack_release_labels
end on

on ui_control(sli_attack1{unknown})
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_attack[1]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_attack[1]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_attack[1]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

					i{int} := 0

		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3

							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[3]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	sli_attack[3]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	call nks.update_attack_release_labels
end on

on ui_control(sli_release3{unknown})
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_release[3]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_release[3]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_release[3]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

					i{int} := 0

				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_release[4]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_release[4]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)

on ui_control(sli_attack5{unknown})
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_attack[5]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_attack[5]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_attack[5]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))

							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[5]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if

	call nks.update_attack_release_labels

on ui_control(sli_attack6{unknown})
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_attack[6]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_attack[6]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_attack[6]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0

				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")

					i{int} := 0

		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3

							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[8]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})

							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if

				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_release[9]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_release[9]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[9]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[9]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[9]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	sli_release[9]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	call nks.update_attack_release_labels
end on

on ui_control(btn_comp_bypass{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int}, ne(btn_comp_bypass{int}), - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int})
	call nks.update_global_fx_labels
end on

on ui_control(sli_comp_threshold{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{int}, sli_comp_threshold{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int})
	lbl_comp_threshold{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}) & " dB"
	sli_comp_threshold{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}) & " dB"
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_comp_threshold{int}), "Threshold", 0)
end on

on ui_control(sli_comp_gain{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{int}, sli_comp_gain{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int})
	lbl_comp_gain{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}) & " dB"
	sli_comp_gain{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}) & " dB"
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_comp_gain{int}), "Gain", 0)
end on

on ui_control(dev.btn_save_fx{int}){thread-unsafe}
	fxRack.save
	dev.btn_save_fx{int} := 0
	dev.btn_save_fx{int} -> text := "Saved"
	timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(dev.btn_save_fx{int}), "Save FX preset for current instrument", 0)
end on

on ui_control(btn_settings_page{int}){thread-unsafe}
	if(btn_settings_page{int} = 1)
		if(btn_shape_page{int} = 1)
			page_before_settings{int} := 0
		else
			if(btn_find_page{int} = 1)
				page_before_settings{int} := 1
			else
				if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
					page_before_settings{int} := 2
				else
					page_before_settings{int} := 3
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	call fxRack.close
	call reset_page_buttons
	call hide_panels
	panel.settings{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_settings_page{int}]{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} := 0
	if(btn_settings_page{int} = 0)
		if(page_before_settings{int} = 0)
			btn_shape_page{int} := 1
			panel.shape{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			call update_morph_faders
			call global_fx.close
			remote(btn_open_fx{int[]}, - 1)
		else
			if(page_before_settings{int} = 2)
				btn_play_page{int} := 1
				panel.play{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				call ui.update_seq_display
			else
				if(page_before_settings{int} = 1)
					btn_find_page{int} := 1
					btn_presetBrowser{int} := 1
					preset_system.show(btn_presetBrowser{int})
					call update.preset_browser
					lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				else
					if(page_before_settings{int} = 3)
						panel.find_external{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
						panel.chord{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
						btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
						btn_chord_page_enter{int} := 1
						call find.position_slot_buttons
						call ui.update_minus_button
						call ui.update_slot_display
						active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
						chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
						call update_type_buttons
						call update_chord_info_label
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	call instrument_browser.close
	call find.position_slot_buttons
	call global_accents.update
	call midiexport.update_label_visibility
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
end on

on ui_control(mnu_cc{int})
	dyn_cc_num{int} := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(mnu_cc{int}), mnu_cc{int} -> value)
end on

on ui_control(mnu_ks{int})
	call global_range.compute
	call update_key_colors
end on

on ui_control(btn_midi_mode{int})
	call global_range.compute
	call update_key_colors
end on

on ui_control(btn_find_page{int}){thread-unsafe}
	call reset_page_buttons
	btn_find_page{int} := 1
	call hide_panels
	remote(btn_open_fx{int[]}, - 1)
	btn_presetBrowser{int} := 1
	preset_system.show(btn_presetBrowser{int})
	call update.preset_browser
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	UI_presetStrip{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} := 0
	lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	btn_settings_page{int} := 0
	call fxRack.close
	call global_fx.close
	call instrument_browser.close
	call find.position_slot_buttons
	call midiexport.update_label_visibility
end on

on ui_control(btn_shape_page{int})
	call reset_page_buttons
	btn_shape_page{int} := 1
	call hide_panels
	panel.shape{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	remote(btn_open_fx{int[]}, - 1)
	call update_morph_faders
	UI_presetStrip{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} := 0
	btn_settings_page{int} := 0
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	call fxRack.close
	call global_fx.close
	call instrument_browser.close
	call find.position_slot_buttons
	call midiexport.update_label_visibility
end on

on ui_control(btn_play_page{int})
	call reset_page_buttons
	btn_play_page{int} := 1
	call hide_panels
	panel.find_external{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	panel.play{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	UI_presetStrip{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} := 0
	panel.play.seq_tables{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	btn_settings_page{int} := 0
	lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	mnu_signature{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{int}
	if(btn_signature_sync{int} = 1)
		mnu_signature{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
	end if
	call ui.update_seq_display
	remote(btn_open_fx{int[]}, - 1)
	call fxRack.close
	call global_fx.close
	call instrument_browser.close
	call find.position_slot_buttons
	call midiexport.update_label_visibility
	call global_accents.update
end on

on ui_control(sli_sc_scrollbar{int})
	scroll_instr_offset{int} := (1000000 - sli_sc_scrollbar{int}) / (1000000 / (current_instr_num{int} - 8))
	call instrument_browser.update_scroll
	lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> POS_Y := sli_sc_scrollbar{int} -> POS_Y + ((brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int}) - ((sli_sc_scrollbar{int} * (brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int})) / 1000000))
end on

on ui_control(btn_sound0{unknown}){thread-unsafe}
	double_click
	if(double_click_state{int} = 1)
		call instrument_browser.close
		panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	end if
	if(instrument.exists[instrument_browser.structure[current_category{int}, current_section{int}, 0 + scroll_instr_offset{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
		instrument.load(active_slot{int}, instrument_browser.structure[current_category{int}, current_section{int}, 0 + scroll_instr_offset{int}]{int})
		if(btn_override_fx{int} = 1)
			wait_async(load_array_str(fxRack.save_array{int[]}, resources_path{string} & "fxpreset" & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} & ".nka"))
			call fxRack.load
		end if
		call read_slot_colors
		call instrument_browser.update
	end if
	call fxRack.close
end on

	lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> POS_Y := sli_sc_scrollbar{int} -> POS_Y + ((brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int}) - ((sli_sc_scrollbar{int} * (brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int})) / 1000000))

	sli_sc_scrollbar{int} := 1000000

	lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> POS_Y := sli_sc_scrollbar{int} -> POS_Y + ((brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int}) - ((sli_sc_scrollbar{int} * (brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int})) / 1000000))
	call instrument_browser.update
end on

on ui_control(btn_section2{unknown})
	current_section{int} := 2
	sli_sc_scrollbar{int} := 1000000
	scroll_instr_offset{int} := 0
	call instrument_browser.update_scroll
	lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> POS_Y := sli_sc_scrollbar{int} -> POS_Y + ((brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int}) - ((sli_sc_scrollbar{int} * (brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int})) / 1000000))
	call instrument_browser.update
end on

	current_section{int} := 3
	sli_sc_scrollbar{int} := 1000000
	scroll_instr_offset{int} := 0
	call instrument_browser.update_scroll
	lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> POS_Y := sli_sc_scrollbar{int} -> POS_Y + ((brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int}) - ((sli_sc_scrollbar{int} * (brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int})) / 1000000))

on ui_control(btn_empty_slot{int})
	instrument.load(active_slot{int}, - 1)
	call instrument_browser.update
	btn_empty_slot{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(btn_close_instrument_browser{int})
	panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	call instrument_browser.close
end on

on ui_control(btn_override_fx{int})
	call instrument_browser.update
end on

on ui_control(btn_slot0{unknown}){thread-unsafe}
	if(not (slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} = - 1))
		active_slot_previous{int} := active_slot{int}
	end if
	seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := - 1
	seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := - 1
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # 0)
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		btn_slot_value[i{int}]{int} := btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	active_slot{int} := 0 + slot_group_offset{int}
	if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
		if(not (slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} = - 1))
			if(btn_slot0{int} = 1)
				seq.view_mode{int} := 1
			else
				seq.view_mode{int} := 0
			end if
			call ui.update_seq_params
			call ui.update_seq_display
			call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
		else
			btn_slot0{int} := 0
			if(seq.view_mode{int} = 1)
				btn_slot[active_slot_previous{int} - slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> value := 1
			end if
		end if
	else
		btn_slot0{int} := 1
	end if
	if(fx_display{int} -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})
		remote_btn_open_fx(0)
		call fxRack.update
	end if
	double_click
	if(double_click_state{int} = 1)
		call hide_panels
		call reset_page_buttons
		panel.shape{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_shape_page{int} := 1
		call fxRack.close
		call global_fx.close
		call instrument_browser.open
		call find.position_slot_buttons
		call midiexport.update_label_visibility
	end if
	if(instrument_browser{int} -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int})
		call instrument_browser.open
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_slot1{unknown}){thread-unsafe}
	if(not (slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} = - 1))
		active_slot_previous{int} := active_slot{int}
	end if
	seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := - 1
	seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := - 1
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # 1)
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		btn_slot_value[i{int}]{int} := btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	active_slot{int} := 1 + slot_group_offset{int}
	if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
		if(not (slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} = - 1))
			if(btn_slot1{int} = 1)
				seq.view_mode{int} := 1
			else
				seq.view_mode{int} := 0
			end if
			call ui.update_seq_params
			call ui.update_seq_display
			call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
		else
			btn_slot1{int} := 0
			if(seq.view_mode{int} = 1)
				btn_slot[active_slot_previous{int} - slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> value := 1
			end if
		end if
	else
		btn_slot1{int} := 1
	end if
	if(fx_display{int} -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})
		remote_btn_open_fx(1)
		call fxRack.update
	end if
	double_click
	if(double_click_state{int} = 1)
		call hide_panels
		call reset_page_buttons

		btn_shape_page{int} := 1
		call fxRack.close
		call global_fx.close
		call instrument_browser.open

		call midiexport.update_label_visibility
	end if

	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_prev_slot_group{int})
	if(active_slot_group{int} = 1)
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} := 1
		btn_next_slot_group{int} := 0
		active_slot_group{int} := ne(active_slot_group{int})
		slot_group_offset{int} := 5 * active_slot_group{int}
		lbl_slot_group{int} -> text := "Slots " & str_slot_group_numbers[active_slot_group{int}]{string}
		call update_slot_names
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} := 1
		call update_morph_faders
		call update_solo_mute_buttons
		call fxRack.close
		call instrument_browser.close
		panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		ui_array.map(btn_open_fx{int[]}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0)
		if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
				if(btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					active_slot{int} := slot_group_offset{int} + i{int}
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			call ui.update_seq_display
			call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
			call ui.update_keyswitches_show
		else
			if(instrument_browser{int} -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})
				if(not in_range(active_slot{int}, 0 + slot_group_offset{int}, 4 + slot_group_offset{int}))
					btn_slot[active_slot{int} mod 5]{int} -> value := 0
				else
					if(in_range(active_slot{int}, 0 + slot_group_offset{int}, 4 + slot_group_offset{int}))
						btn_slot[active_slot{int} mod 5]{int} -> value := 1
					end if
				end if
			else
				btn_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			end if
		end if
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
			lbl_slot_icon[i{int}]{int} -> picture := get_slot_icon(i{int} + slot_group_offset{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		seq.view_mode{int} := 0
	else
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} := 1
	end if
	call update_slot_group_underline_position
end on

on ui_control(btn_next_slot_group{int})
	if(active_slot_group{int} = 0)
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} := 0
		btn_next_slot_group{int} := 1
		active_slot_group{int} := ne(active_slot_group{int})
		slot_group_offset{int} := 5 * active_slot_group{int}
		lbl_slot_group{int} -> text := "Slots " & str_slot_group_numbers[active_slot_group{int}]{string}
		call update_slot_names
		btn_next_slot_group{int} := 1
		call update_morph_faders
		call update_solo_mute_buttons
		call fxRack.close
		call instrument_browser.close
		panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		ui_array.map(btn_open_fx{int[]}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0)
		if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
				if(btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					active_slot{int} := slot_group_offset{int} + i{int}
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			call ui.update_seq_display
			call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
			call ui.update_keyswitches_show
		else
			if(instrument_browser{int} -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})
				if(not in_range(active_slot{int}, 0 + slot_group_offset{int}, 4 + slot_group_offset{int}))
					btn_slot[active_slot{int} mod 5]{int} -> value := 0
				else
					if(in_range(active_slot{int}, 0 + slot_group_offset{int}, 4 + slot_group_offset{int}))
						btn_slot[active_slot{int} mod 5]{int} -> value := 1
					end if
				end if
			else
				btn_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			end if
		end if
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
			lbl_slot_icon[i{int}]{int} -> picture := get_slot_icon(i{int} + slot_group_offset{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		seq.view_mode{int} := 0
	else
		btn_next_slot_group{int} := 1
	end if
	call update_slot_group_underline_position
end on

on ui_control(sli_volume0{unknown})
	sli_volume.moved{int} := 1
	s{int} := sli_volume0{int} - sli_volume.previous[0]{int}
	if(in_range(sli_volume_min0{int} + s{int}, 0, 499039) and in_range(sli_volume_max0{int} + s{int}, 0, 499039))
		sli_volume_min0{int} := sli_volume_min0{int} + s{int}
		sli_volume_max0{int} := sli_volume_max0{int} + s{int}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_min[0]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0)
		lbl_volume_min[0 mod 5]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0) & " dB"
		sli_volume_min[0]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0) & " dB"
		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_min[0 mod 5]{int}, "Min", 0)
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_max[0]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0)
		lbl_volume_max[0 mod 5]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0) & " dB"
		sli_volume_max[0]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0) & " dB"
		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_max[0 mod 5]{int}, "Max", 0)
	else
		sli_volume0{int} := sli_volume.previous[0]{int}
	end if
	sli_volume.previous[0]{int} := sli_volume0{int}
	call execute_morph_faders
end on

on ui_control(sli_volume_min0{unknown})
	if(abs(sli_volume_min0{number} - sli_volume_max0{number}) < 10000)
		sli_volume_min0{unknown} := sli_volume_max0{unknown}
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_min[0]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0)
	lbl_volume_min[0 mod 5]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0) & " dB"
	sli_volume_min[0]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0) & " dB"
	timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_min[0 mod 5]{int}, "Min", 0)
	call execute_morph_faders
end on

on ui_control(sli_volume_max0{unknown})
	if(abs(sli_volume_max0{number} - sli_volume_min0{number}) < 10000)
		sli_volume_max0{unknown} := sli_volume_min0{unknown}
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_max[0]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0)

		sli_volume_min[7]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 7) & " dB"
		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_min[7 mod 5]{int}, "Min", 0)
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_max[7]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 7)
		lbl_volume_max[7 mod 5]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 7) & " dB"
		sli_volume_max[7]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 7) & " dB"
		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_max[7 mod 5]{int}, "Max", 0)
	else
		sli_volume7{int} := sli_volume.previous[7]{int}
	end if
	sli_volume.previous[7]{int} := sli_volume7{int}
	call execute_morph_faders
end on

	if(abs(sli_volume_min7{number} - sli_volume_max7{number}) < 10000)
		sli_volume_min7{unknown} := sli_volume_max7{unknown}
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_min[7]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 7)
	lbl_volume_min[7 mod 5]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 7) & " dB"

on ui_control(sli_volume8{unknown})
	sli_volume.moved{int} := 1
	s{int} := sli_volume8{int} - sli_volume.previous[8]{int}
	if(in_range(sli_volume_min8{int} + s{int}, 0, 499039) and in_range(sli_volume_max8{int} + s{int}, 0, 499039))
		sli_volume_min8{int} := sli_volume_min8{int} + s{int}
		sli_volume_max8{int} := sli_volume_max8{int} + s{int}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_min[8]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 8)
		lbl_volume_min[8 mod 5]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 8) & " dB"
		sli_volume_min[8]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 8) & " dB"
		timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume_min[8 mod 5]{int}, "Min", 0)
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_max[8]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 8)
		lbl_volume_max[8 mod 5]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 8) & " dB"
		sli_volume_max[8]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 8) & " dB"

	lbl_oct[0 mod 5]{int} -> z_layer := 0
	lbl_pan[0 mod 5]{int} -> z_layer := 1
	lbl_rev_send[0 mod 5]{int} -> z_layer := 0
	lbl_oct[0 mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> text := sli_oct0{unknown}
	timed_display.trigger_with_bg_ani(lbl_oct[0 mod (10 / 2)]{int}, "Oct", 0, 6)
	call global_range.compute
	call update_key_colors
end on

on ui_control(btn_solo0{unknown})
	if(btn_solo0{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			solo_mute_states[0, i{int}]{int} := 0
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
	solo_mute_states[0, 0]{int} := btn_solo0{int}
	if(btn_solo0{int} = 1)
		btn_mute0{int} := 0
		solo_mute_states[1, 0]{int} := 0
	end if
	call set_solo_mute
	call update_solo_mute_buttons
end on

on ui_control(sli_rev_send0{unknown})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{int}, sli_rev_send0{int}, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0)
	lbl_rev_send[0 mod 5]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{int}, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0) & " dB"
	lbl_oct[0 mod 5]{int} -> z_layer := 0
	lbl_pan[0 mod 5]{int} -> z_layer := 0
	lbl_rev_send[0 mod 5]{int} -> z_layer := 1
	sli_rev_send0{unknown} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{int}, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 0) & " dB"
	timed_display.trigger_with_bg_ani(lbl_rev_send[0 mod 5]{int}, "Rev", 0, 6)
end on

on ui_control(btn_open_fx0{unknown}){thread-unsafe}
	if(btn_open_fx0{int} = 1)
		panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		remote_btn_open_fx(0)
		active_slot{int} := 0 + slot_group_offset{int}
		call reset_slot_buttons
		btn_slot0{int} := 1
		call fxRack.open
		current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} := - 1
		call fxRack.update
	else
		call fxRack.close
		panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_open_fx1{unknown}){thread-unsafe}
	if(btn_open_fx1{int} = 1)
		panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		remote_btn_open_fx(1)
		active_slot{int} := 1 + slot_group_offset{int}
		call reset_slot_buttons
		btn_slot1{int} := 1
		call fxRack.open
		current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} := - 1

on ui_control(btn_global_fx{int})
	if(btn_global_fx{int} = 1)
		call global_fx.open
		panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	else
		call global_fx.close
		panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	end if
	remote(btn_open_fx{int[]}, - 1)
end on

on ui_control(btn_output_section{int})
	call update_morph_faders
end on

on ui_control(xy_velo{real[]})
	tb_idx{int} := clamp(int(floor(real(visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) * xy_velo[0]{real})) + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) - 1, ((current_page{int} + 1) * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) - 1)
	a{int} := clamp(int(round(real(127) * xy_velo[1]{real})), 0, 127)
	if(xy_velo{real[]} -> key_control = 1)
		if(a{int} < 127)
			a{int} := (a{int} / 10) * 10
		end if
	end if
	if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN{int})
		seq.write_min{int} := 0
		seq.write_max{int} := 0
		tb_idx_before{int} := tb_idx{int}
		if(abs(a{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 0]{int}) < abs(a{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 1]{int}))
			seq.write_min{int} := 1
			seq.write_max{int} := 0
		else
			seq.write_min{int} := 0
			seq.write_max{int} := 1
		end if
		call set_velo_step_to_mouse
	end if
	if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG{int})
		call set_velo_step_to_mouse
	end if
	if(NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{int} = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP{int})
		if(seq.write_scaled{int} = 1)
			s{int} := 0
			while(s{int} <= (visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, s{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), 0]{int} := clamp(seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 0]{int}, 0, 127)
				seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, s{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), 1]{int} := clamp(seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 1]{int}, 0, 127)
				inc(s{int})
			end while
			seq.write_scaled{int} := 0
		end if
		call undo.create
	end if
	tb_idx_before{int} := tb_idx{int}
	tb_value_before{int} := a{int}
end on

on ui_control(xy_seq{real[]})
	xy_seq.x{int} := seq.x_to_px(xy_seq[0]{real})
	xy_seq.y{int} := seq.y_to_px(xy_seq[1]{real})
	xy_active_column{int} := - 1
	xy_active_row{int} := - 1
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 8) 
			if(in_range(xy_seq.x{int}, lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> x - 3, (lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> x + lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> width) + 3) and in_range(xy_seq.y{int}, lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> y - 3, (lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> y + lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> height) + 3))
				xy_active_column{int} := i{int}
				xy_active_row{int} := ii{int}
			end if
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if((xy_active_column{int} # - 1) and (xy_active_row{int} # - 1))
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 8) 
			lbl_seq_matrix[xy_active_column{int}, i{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 0
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		lbl_seq_matrix[xy_active_column{int}, xy_active_row{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 1
		seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, xy_active_column{int}, 0]{int} := seq_pitch_values[xy_active_row{int}]{int}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix0{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix0{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix0{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix0{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix0{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix0{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix0{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix0{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix0{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix0{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix0{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix0{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix0{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix0{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix0{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix0{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix0{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix1{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix1{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix1{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix1{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix1{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix1{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix1{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix1{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix1{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix1{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix1{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix1{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix1{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix1{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix1{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix1{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix1{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix2{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix2{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix2{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix2{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix2{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix2{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix2{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix2{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix2{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix2{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix2{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix2{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix2{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix2{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix2{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix2{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix2{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix3{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix3{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix3{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix3{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix3{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix3{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix3{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix3{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix3{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix3{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix3{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix3{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix3{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix3{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix3{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix3{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix3{int} := 0
	end if
end on
