				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))

				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)

				end if

			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix110{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix110{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix110{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix110{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix111{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix111{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix111{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix111{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix111{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix111{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix111{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix111{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix111{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix111{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix111{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix111{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix111{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix111{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix111{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix111{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix111{int} := 0
	end if
end on

					_lbl_seq_matrix112{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix112{number})

				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}

				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))

				end if
			end if

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix113{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix113{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix113{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix113{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix114{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix114{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix114{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix114{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix114{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix114{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix114{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix114{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix114{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix114{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix114{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix114{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix114{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix114{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix114{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix114{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix114{int} := 0
	end if
end on

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix116{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix116{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix116{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix116{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix117{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix117{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix117{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix117{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix117{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix117{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix117{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix117{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix117{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix117{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix117{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix117{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix117{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix117{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix117{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix117{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix117{int} := 0
	end if
end on

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix119{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix119{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix119{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix119{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix120{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix120{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix120{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix120{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix120{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix120{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix120{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix120{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix120{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix120{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix120{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix120{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix120{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix120{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix120{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix120{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix120{int} := 0
	end if
end on

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix122{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix122{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix122{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix122{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix123{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix123{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix123{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix123{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix123{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix123{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix123{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix123{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix123{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix123{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix123{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix123{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix123{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix123{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix123{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix123{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix123{int} := 0
	end if

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix125{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix125{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix125{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix125{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix126{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix126{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix126{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix126{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix126{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix126{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix126{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix126{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix126{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix126{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix126{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix126{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix126{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix126{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix126{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix126{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix126{int} := 0
	end if
end on

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix128{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix128{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix128{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix128{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix129{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix129{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix129{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix129{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix129{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix129{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix129{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix129{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix129{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix129{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix129{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix129{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix129{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix129{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix129{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix129{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix129{int} := 0
	end if
end on

					_lbl_seq_matrix130{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix130{number})

				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}

				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))

				end if
			end if

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix131{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix131{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix131{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix131{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix132{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix132{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix132{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix132{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix132{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix132{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix132{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix132{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix132{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix132{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix132{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix132{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix132{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix132{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix132{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix132{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix132{int} := 0
	end if
end on
