			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix281{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix281{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix281{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix281{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix282{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix282{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix282{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix282{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix282{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix282{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix282{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix282{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix282{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix282{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix282{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix282{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix282{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix282{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix282{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix282{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix282{int} := 0
	end if
end on

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix284{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix284{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix284{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix284{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(_lbl_seq_matrix285{unknown})
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 1
		if(_lbl_seq_matrix285{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_lbl_seq_matrix{int[]}] - 1)) 
				_lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
					seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			array.D1{int} := matrix.get_array_D1(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix285{any}))
			array.D2{int} := matrix.get_array_D2(get_ui_id(_lbl_seq_matrix285{any}))
			if(((_lbl_seq_matrix285{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix285{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix285{unknown} -> key_control = 1))
				s{int} := 0
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						inc(s{int})
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if((s{int} > 5) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
					n{int} := matrix.get_nearest_active_button(array.D1{int}, array.D2{int})
					lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, n{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				seq_matrix.last_d1{int} := array.D1{int}
				seq_matrix.last_d2{int} := array.D2{int}
			end if
			if(_lbl_seq_matrix285{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
				dec(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
				_lbl_seq_matrix285{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix285{number})
			else
				if(_lbl_seq_matrix285{unknown} -> key_control = 1)
					inc(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int})
					_lbl_seq_matrix285{number} := ne(_lbl_seq_matrix285{number})
				end if
			end if
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} := clamp(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int}, - 3, 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 8) 
				if(lbl_seq_matrix[array.D1{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := seq_pitch_values[i{int}]{int}
				else
					seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), i{int}]{int} := 99
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix285{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix285{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix285{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix285{int} := 0
	end if
end on

			if(((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((_lbl_seq_matrix287{int} = 1) or (_lbl_seq_matrix287{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)) or (_lbl_seq_matrix287{unknown} -> key_control = 1)))
				note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, array.D2{int}]{int} + 3]{int}
				velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
				message("src velo = " & ((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int}, 0]{int}, 0))))
				if((apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1))
					velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(array.D1{int} + ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))))
				end if
				velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, array.D1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), array.D2{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
				message("play preview note: " & note{int} & " " & velo{int})
				note_id[active_slot{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
				_allow_group(note_id[active_slot{int}]{int}, active_slot{int}, note{int})
			end if
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		_lbl_seq_matrix287{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(sli_velocity_offset{int})
	if(sli_velocity_offset{int} # seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, seq_matrix.last_d1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), seq_matrix.last_d2{int}]{int})
		seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, seq_matrix.last_d1{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), seq_matrix.last_d2{int}]{int} := sli_velocity_offset{int}
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_seq_view_close{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		btn_slot_value[i{int}]{int} := btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	seq.view_mode{int} := 0
	call ui.update_seq_params
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
end on

on ui_control(btn_tempo_half{int})
	btn_tempo_half{int} := 1
	btn_tempo_normal{int} := 0
	btn_tempo_double{int} := 0
	call tempo.update
end on

	btn_tempo_double{int} := 1

end on

		xy_seq{real[]} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	else
		xy_seq{real[]} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(mnu_pattern{int})
	if(mnu_pattern{int} # 99)
		last_patterns[active_slot{int}]{int} := mnu_pattern{int}
	else
		mnu_pattern{int} := last_patterns[active_slot{int}]{int}
	end if
	lbl_note_order{int} -> picture_state := mnu_pattern{int}
	SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} := mnu_pattern{int}
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
	call undo.create
end on

on ui_control(mnu_length_bar{int})
	update_page_buttons
	int_buffer{int} := current_page{int}
	if(mnu_length_bar{int} > mnu_length_bar_before{int})
		s{int} := 0
		while(s{int} <= ((length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int} - length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar_before{int}]{int}) - 1)) 
			_i{int} := 0
			while(_i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
				current_page{int} := (length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar_before{int}]{int} - 1) * s{int}
				message("copy from " & current_page{int})
				copy_bar(current_keyswitch{int}, _i{int})
				current_page{int} := clamp(length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar_before{int}]{int} * (s{int} + 1), 0, 3)
				message("copy to " & current_page{int})
				paste_bar(current_keyswitch{int}, _i{int})
				inc(_i{int})
			end while
			inc(s{int})
		end while
	end if
	current_page{int} := int_buffer{int}
	if(current_page{int} >= length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int})
		current_page{int} := 0
	end if
	call tempo.update
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
	call update_page_buttons
	mnu_length_bar_before{int} := mnu_length_bar{int}
	call undo.create
end on

on ui_control(mnu_rate{int})
	SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int} := mnu_rate{int}
	call tempo.update
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
	call undo.create
end on

		inc(i{int})
	end while

	SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 6]{int} := sli_repeat{int}

on ui_control(mnu_global_accent_meter{int})
	global_accent_meter_preset[current_keyswitch{int}]{int} := mnu_global_accent_meter{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((4 / 2) - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= ((eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 4) - 1)) 
			global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, ((i{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 4) + ii{int}]{int} := global_accent_preset[mnu_global_accent_meter{int}, ii{int}]{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	call global_accents.update
	call undo.create
end on

	global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, 0 + a{int}]{int} := (global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, 0 + a{int}]{int} + 2) mod 3
	call global_accents.update
	call undo.create
end on

	a{int} := ((current_page{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) * (length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int} / num_pages{int})
	mnu_global_accent_meter{int} := 99
	global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, 20 + a{int}]{int} := (global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, 20 + a{int}]{int} + 2) mod 3
	call global_accents.update
	call undo.create
end on

on ui_control(btn_global_accent21{unknown})
	btn_global_accent21{int} := 0
	a{int} := ((current_page{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) * (length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int} / num_pages{int})
	mnu_global_accent_meter{int} := 99
	global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, 21 + a{int}]{int} := (global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, 21 + a{int}]{int} + 2) mod 3

	call undo.create
end on

	call ui.update_seq_display

end on

	call tempo.update
	call undo.create
end on

on ui_control(btn_use_global_accents{int})

	call undo.create
end on

on ui_control(mnu_keyswitch{int})
	load_keyswitch(mnu_keyswitch{int})
	call ui.update_keyswitches_show
end on

on ui_control(btn_keyswitch0{unknown})
	load_keyswitch(0)
	call ui.update_keyswitches_show
end on

on ui_control(btn_keyswitch1{unknown})
	load_keyswitch(1)
	call ui.update_keyswitches_show
end on

on ui_control(btn_keyswitch2{unknown})
	load_keyswitch(2)
	call ui.update_keyswitches_show
end on

on ui_control(btn_keyswitch3{unknown})
	load_keyswitch(3)
	call ui.update_keyswitches_show
end on

on ui_control(btn_keyswitch4{unknown})
	load_keyswitch(4)
	call ui.update_keyswitches_show
end on

on ui_control(btn_keyswitches_show{int})
	call ui.update_keyswitches_show
end on

on ui_control(mnu_copy_modes{int})
	select(mnu_copy_modes{int})
	case copy_mode.COPY_ALL{int}
		copy_arp(current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int})
	case copy_mode.PASTE_ALL{int}
		paste_arp(current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int})
		call undo.create
	case copy_mode.COPY_BAR{int}
		copy_bar(current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int})
	case copy_mode.PASTE_BAR{int}
		paste_bar(current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int})
		call undo.create
	end select
	if((mnu_copy_modes{int} = copy_mode.PASTE_ALL{int}) or (mnu_copy_modes{int} = copy_mode.PASTE_BAR{int}))
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call tempo.update
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_copy_ks{int})
	btn_copy_ks{int} := 0
	copied_ks{int} := current_keyswitch{int}
	btn_paste_ks{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(btn_paste_ks{int})
	btn_paste_ks{int} := 0
	s{int} := 0
	while(s{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		copy_arp(copied_ks{int}, s{int})
		paste_arp(current_keyswitch{int}, s{int})
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[global_accents{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
			global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}]{int} := global_accents[copied_ks{int}, i{int}]{int}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		inc(s{int})
	end while
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call tempo.update
	call undo.create
end on

on ui_control(btn_copy_keyswitch{int})
	copied_ks{int} := current_keyswitch{int}
	btn_copy_keyswitch{int} -> text := "Copy KS (" & copied_ks{int} & ")"
	btn_paste_keyswitch{int} -> text := "Paste KS (" & copied_ks{int} & ")"
	btn_paste_keyswitch{int} := 0
	btn_copy_keyswitch{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(btn_paste_keyswitch{int})
	btn_paste_keyswitch{int} -> text := "Confirm?"
	if(btn_paste_keyswitch{int} = 0)
		s{int} := 0
		while(s{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			copy_arp(copied_ks{int}, s{int})
			paste_arp(current_keyswitch{int}, s{int})
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[global_accents{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
				global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}]{int} := global_accents[copied_ks{int}, i{int}]{int}
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			inc(s{int})
		end while
		btn_paste_keyswitch{int} -> text := "Paste KS (" & copied_ks{int} & ")"
	end if
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call tempo.update
	call undo.create
end on

on ui_control(btn_signature_sync{int})
	mnu_signature{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{int}
	if(btn_signature_sync{int} = 1)
		mnu_signature{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(mnu_set_velo_to_zero{int})
	if(mnu_set_velo_to_zero{int} = 0)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.velo_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
			seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} := 0
			seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 1]{int} := 0
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call undo.create
	else
		if(mnu_set_velo_to_zero{int} = 1)
			call arp.reset
		end if
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_play_page_undo{int})
	if(play.history.changed{int} = 1)
		play.history.actual{int} := play.history.pointer{int}
	end if
	call undo.load
	play.history.changed{int} := 0
	btn_play_page_undo{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(btn_play_page_redo{int})
	if((play.history.changed{int} # 1) and (play.history.pointer{int} # play.history.actual{int}))
		call redo.load
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_page_exit{int})
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} := 0
	btn_play_page{int} := 1
	call hide_panels
	panel.find_external{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	panel.play{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call find.position_slot_buttons
	call global_accents.update
	call instrument_browser.close
	call midiexport.update_label_visibility
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_page_enter{int})
	btn_play_page{int} := ne(btn_chord_page_enter{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[jams.octaves{int[]}] - 1)) 
		message(i{int} & " OCT SHIFT: " & jams.octaves[i{int}]{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	call hide_panels
	if(btn_chord_page_enter{int} = 1)
		panel.find_external{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		panel.chord{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		active_chord_slot{int} := 0
		call chord.get_current_chord
		call find.position_slot_buttons
		call ui.update_minus_button
		call ui.update_slot_display
		active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
		call update_chord_info_label
		call midiexport.update_label_visibility
		sli_chord_octave{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := sli_chord_octave{int}
		chords_preview[0]{int} := chords[0, 0]{int}
		chords_preview[1]{int} := chords[0, 1]{int}
		chords_preview[3]{int} := chords[0, 3]{int}
		chords_preview[2]{int} := - 1
	else
		panel.find_external{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		panel.play{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		UI_presetStrip{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_chord_page_enter{int} := 0
		panel.play.seq_tables{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_settings_page{int} := 0
		lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		mnu_signature{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{int}
		if(btn_signature_sync{int} = 1)
			mnu_signature{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		end if
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call fxRack.close
		call global_fx.close
		call instrument_browser.close
		call find.position_slot_buttons
		call midiexport.update_label_visibility
		call global_accents.update
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_timeline_view{int})
	btn_chord_timeline_view{int} := 1
	btn_chord_jam_view{int} := 0
	call ui.update_slot_display
	call stop_engine
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_jam_view{int})
	call remote_jam_slot_button
	btn_chord_timeline_view{int} := 0
	btn_chord_jam_view{int} := 1
	call ui.update_slot_display
	call stop_engine
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_chromatic_selection{int})
	btn_chord_chromatic_selection{int} := 1
	btn_chord_scale_selection{int} := 0
	call ui.update_slot_display
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_scale_selection{int})
	btn_chord_chromatic_selection{int} := 0
	btn_chord_scale_selection{int} := 1
	call ui.update_slot_display
end on

on ui_control(btn_chromatic0{unknown})
	remote_chromatic_buttons(0)
	active_root{int} := 0
	btn_chromatic0{int} := 1
	call update_chord_info_label
	chords_preview[0]{int} := active_root{int}
	double_click
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		call chord.save_history
		call chord.set_current_chord
		call update_chord_slots
		call ui.update_minus_button
	else
		if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1)
			call jam.save_history
			call chord.set_current_jam
			call update_jam_slots
		end if
	end if
	if(btn_chromatic0{int} = 1)
		call chord.preview
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

	btn_chromatic8{int} := 1

on ui_control(btn_scale0{unknown})
	remote_scale_buttons(0)
	active_root{int} := (mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, 0]{int}) mod 12
	active_chord_type{int} := search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(0 + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}]
	active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
	chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
	call update_type_buttons
	call update_chord_info_label
	chords_preview[0]{int} := active_root{int}
	chords_preview[1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
	chords_preview[3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
	chords_preview[2]{int} := - 1
	double_click
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		call chord.save_history
		if(active_chord_slot{int} # - 1)
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 0]{int} := chords_preview[0]{int}
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 1]{int} := chords_preview[1]{int}
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 3]{int} := chords_preview[3]{int}
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 2]{int} := - 1
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 4]{int} := search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(0 + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}]
			call update_chord_slots
			call ui.update_minus_button
		end if
	else
		if((btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1) and (active_jam_slot{int} # - 1))
			call jam.save_history
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 0]{int} := chords_preview[0]{int}
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 1]{int} := chords_preview[1]{int}
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 3]{int} := chords_preview[3]{int}
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 2]{int} := - 1
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 4]{int} := search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(0 + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}]
			call update_jam_slots
		end if
	end if
	if(btn_scale0{int} = 1)
		call chord.preview
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

	call update_chord_info_label
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		call chord.save_history
		call chord.set_current_chord
		call update_chord_slots
		call ui.update_minus_button
	else
		if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1)
			call jam.save_history
			call chord.set_current_jam
			call update_jam_slots
		end if
	end if
	if(btn_chord_type2{int} = 1)
		call chord.preview
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_type3{unknown})
	remote_chord_type_buttons(3)
	btn_chord_type3{int} := 1
	active_chord_type{int} := chord_type_order[3 + chord_type_group_offset{int}]{int}
	chords_preview[0]{int} := active_root{int}
	chords_preview[1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int}

on ui_control(btn_chord_type_prev_group{int})
	if(active_chord_type_group{int} > 0)
		active_chord_type_group{int} := (active_chord_type_group{int} + 3) mod 4
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
		btn_chord_type_prev_group{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_type_next_group{int})
	if(active_chord_type_group{int} < 3)
		active_chord_type_group{int} := (active_chord_type_group{int} + 1) mod 4
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
		btn_chord_type_next_group{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(mnu_bass_note{int})
	if(mnu_bass_note{int} = 99)
		mnu_bass_note{int} := last_bass_note{int}
	end if
	last_bass_note{int} := mnu_bass_note{int}
	active_bass_note{int} := mnu_bass_note{int}
	chords_preview[2]{int} := active_bass_note{int}
	call update_chord_info_label
	call chord.preview
	if((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (active_chord_slot{int} # - 1))
		call chord.save_history
		call chord.set_current_chord
		call update_chord_slots
	else
		if((btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1) and (active_jam_slot{int} # - 1))
			call jam.save_history
			call chord.set_current_jam
			call update_jam_slots
		end if
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_voicing0{unknown})
	select_btn_voicing(0)
	if((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (active_chord_slot{int} # - 1))
		call chord.save_history
		call update_chord_slots
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 0
	else
		if((btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1) and (active_jam_slot{int} # - 1))
			call jam.save_history
			call update_jam_slots
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 0
		end if
	end if
	chords_preview[5]{int} := 0
	call chord.preview
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_voicing1{unknown})
	select_btn_voicing(1)
	if((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (active_chord_slot{int} # - 1))
		call chord.save_history
		call update_chord_slots
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 1
	else
		if((btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1) and (active_jam_slot{int} # - 1))
			call jam.save_history
			call update_jam_slots
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 1
		end if
	end if
	chords_preview[5]{int} := 1
	call chord.preview
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_voicing2{unknown})
	select_btn_voicing(2)
	if((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (active_chord_slot{int} # - 1))
		call chord.save_history
		call update_chord_slots
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 2
	else
		if((btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1) and (active_jam_slot{int} # - 1))
			call jam.save_history
			call update_jam_slots

on ui_control(btn_voicing3{unknown})
	select_btn_voicing(3)
	if((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (active_chord_slot{int} # - 1))
		call chord.save_history
		call update_chord_slots
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 3
	else
		if((btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1) and (active_jam_slot{int} # - 1))
			call jam.save_history
			call update_jam_slots
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 3
		end if
	end if
	chords_preview[5]{int} := 3
	call chord.preview
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(sli_chord_octave{int})
	if(chord_octave.before{int} # sli_chord_octave{int})
		lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := sli_chord_octave{int}
		if((btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1) and (active_chord_slot{int} # - 1))
			call chord.save_history
			call update_chord_slots
			chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int} := sli_chord_octave{int}
		else
			if((btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1) and (active_jam_slot{int} # - 1))
				call jam.save_history
				call update_jam_slots
				jams.octaves[active_jam_slot{int}]{int} := sli_chord_octave{int}
			end if
		end if
		chords_preview[6]{int} := sli_chord_octave{int}
		call chord.preview
		chord_octave.before{int} := sli_chord_octave{int}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_slot0{unknown})
	if(btn_chord_slot0{int} = 1)
		call remote_chord_slot_button
		jumped_to_start{int} := 0
		btn_chord_slot0{int} := 1
		active_chord_slot{int} := (active_chord_set{int} * 16) + 0
		call chord.get_current_chord
		if(active_root{int} = - 1)
			active_chord_type{int} := 0
			active_bass_note{int} := - 1
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 0
			select_btn_voicing(chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int})
			call chord.set_current_chord
		end if
		chords_preview[0]{int} := active_root{int}
		chords_preview[1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		chords_preview[3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		chords_preview[2]{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		chords_preview[5]{int} := max(0, search[btn_voicing_states{int[]}, 1])
		chords_preview[6]{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
		active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
		mnu_bass_note{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		call update_chord_info_label
		remote_chromatic_buttons(active_root{int})
		if(btn_chord_slot0{unknown} -> key_shift = 0)
			chord.last_slot_button{int} := 0
		end if
		i{int} := min(chord.last_slot_button{int}, 0)
		while(i{int} <= max(chord.last_slot_button{int}, 0)) 
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		sli_chord_octave{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := sli_chord_octave{int}
		if(active_root{int} # - 1)
			call chord.preview
		end if
	else
		active_chord_slot{int} := - 1
		call remote_chord_slot_button
		jumped_to_start{int} := 1
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_slot1{unknown})
	if(btn_chord_slot1{int} = 1)
		call remote_chord_slot_button
		jumped_to_start{int} := 0

on ui_control(btn_chord_slot5{unknown})
	if(btn_chord_slot5{int} = 1)
		call remote_chord_slot_button
		jumped_to_start{int} := 0
		btn_chord_slot5{int} := 1
		active_chord_slot{int} := (active_chord_set{int} * 16) + 5
		call chord.get_current_chord
		if(active_root{int} = - 1)
			active_chord_type{int} := 0
			active_bass_note{int} := - 1
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 0
			select_btn_voicing(chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int})
			call chord.set_current_chord
		end if
		chords_preview[0]{int} := active_root{int}
		chords_preview[1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		chords_preview[3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		chords_preview[2]{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		chords_preview[5]{int} := max(0, search[btn_voicing_states{int[]}, 1])
		chords_preview[6]{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
		active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
		mnu_bass_note{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		call update_chord_info_label
		remote_chromatic_buttons(active_root{int})
		if(btn_chord_slot5{unknown} -> key_shift = 0)
			chord.last_slot_button{int} := 5
		end if
		i{int} := min(chord.last_slot_button{int}, 5)
		while(i{int} <= max(chord.last_slot_button{int}, 5)) 
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		sli_chord_octave{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := sli_chord_octave{int}
		if(active_root{int} # - 1)
			call chord.preview
		end if
	else
		active_chord_slot{int} := - 1
		call remote_chord_slot_button
		jumped_to_start{int} := 1
	end if
end on

		end if
		i{int} := min(chord.last_slot_button{int}, 14)
		while(i{int} <= max(chord.last_slot_button{int}, 14)) 
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		sli_chord_octave{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := sli_chord_octave{int}
		if(active_root{int} # - 1)
			call chord.preview
		end if
	else
		active_chord_slot{int} := - 1
		call remote_chord_slot_button
		jumped_to_start{int} := 1
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_slot15{unknown})
	if(btn_chord_slot15{int} = 1)
		call remote_chord_slot_button
		jumped_to_start{int} := 0
		btn_chord_slot15{int} := 1
		active_chord_slot{int} := (active_chord_set{int} * 16) + 15
		call chord.get_current_chord
		if(active_root{int} = - 1)
			active_chord_type{int} := 0
			active_bass_note{int} := - 1
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 0
			select_btn_voicing(chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int})
			call chord.set_current_chord
		end if
		chords_preview[0]{int} := active_root{int}
		chords_preview[1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		chords_preview[3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		chords_preview[2]{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		chords_preview[5]{int} := max(0, search[btn_voicing_states{int[]}, 1])
		chords_preview[6]{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
		active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
		mnu_bass_note{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		call update_chord_info_label
		remote_chromatic_buttons(active_root{int})
		if(btn_chord_slot15{unknown} -> key_shift = 0)
			chord.last_slot_button{int} := 15
		end if
		i{int} := min(chord.last_slot_button{int}, 15)
		while(i{int} <= max(chord.last_slot_button{int}, 15)) 
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		sli_chord_octave{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := sli_chord_octave{int}
		if(active_root{int} # - 1)
			call chord.preview
		end if
	else
		active_chord_slot{int} := - 1
		call remote_chord_slot_button
		jumped_to_start{int} := 1
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_jam_slot0{unknown})
	if((btn_jam_slot0{int} = 0) and (chord.playing{int} = 1))
		active_jam_slot{int} := - 1
		call remote_jam_slot_button
		chord.playing{int} := 0
		call stop_engine
	else
		call remote_jam_slot_button
		btn_jam_slot0{int} := 1
		active_jam_slot{int} := 0
		active_root{int} := - 1
		call chord.get_current_jam
		if(active_root{int} = - 1)
			active_chord_type{int} := 0
			active_bass_note{int} := - 1
			jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 0
			select_btn_voicing(jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int})
			call chord.set_current_jam
		end if
		active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
		mnu_bass_note{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		call update_chord_info_label
		remote_chromatic_buttons(active_root{int})
		sli_chord_octave{int} := jams.octaves[active_jam_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := sli_chord_octave{int}
		if(active_root{int} # - 1)
			if(seq.active{int} = 0)
				seq.active{int} := 1
				chord.started{int} := 1
			end if
			chord.playing{int} := 1
			message("started engine")
		end if
	end if
end on

			message("started engine")
		end if
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_empty{int})
	btn_chord_empty{int} := 0
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		call chord.save_history
		if(active_chord_slot{int} # - 1)
			btn_chord_slot[active_chord_slot{int}]{int} -> text := "-"
			btn_chord_slot[active_chord_slot{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 0]{int} := - 1
			chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 0
			chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int} := 0
			sli_chord_octave{int} := 0
			lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := "0"
			chords_preview[6]{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
			btn_chord_slot[active_chord_slot{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
	else
		if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1)
			if(active_jam_slot{int} # - 1)
				call jam.save_history
				btn_jam_slot[active_jam_slot{int}]{int} -> text := "-"
				btn_jam_slot[active_jam_slot{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				jams.octaves[active_jam_slot{int}]{int} := 0
				sli_chord_octave{int} := 0
				lbl_chord_octave{int} -> text := "0"
				jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 0]{int} := - 1
			end if
		end if
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_clear_chords{int})
	btn_clear_chords{int} := 0
	sli_chord_octave{int} := 0
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		call chord.save_history
		active_chord_slot{int} := 0
		btn_chord_slot[active_chord_slot{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_chord_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := "-"
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (128 - 1)) 
			chords[i{int}, 0]{int} := - 1
			chords[i{int}, 1]{int} := - 1
			chords[i{int}, 3]{int} := - 1
			chords[i{int}, 4]{int} := - 1
			chords[i{int}, 2]{int} := - 1
			chords[i{int}, 5]{int} := - 1
			chords.octaves[i{int}]{int} := 0
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 7) 
			timeline_keyswitches[active_chord_set{int}, i{int}]{int} := - 1
			mnu_timeline_keyswitch[i{int}]{int} -> value := timeline_keyswitches[active_chord_set{int}, i{int}]{int} + 1
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	else
		if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1)
			if(active_jam_slot{int} # - 1)
				call jam.save_history
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_jam_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
					btn_jam_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := "-"
					btn_jam_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
					jams[i{int}, 0]{int} := - 1
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			end if
		end if
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_undo{int})
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		chord.get_history(- 1)
	else
		if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1)
			jam.get_history(- 1)
		end if
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_redo{int})
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		chord.get_history(1)
	else
		if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1)
			jam.get_history(1)
		end if
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_copy{int})
	btn_chord_copy{int} := 0
	if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 0)
		chord_copy_num{int} := 0
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (16 - 1)) 
			if(btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
				chord_copy[chord_copy_num{int}, 0]{int} := chords[i{int} + chord_set_offset{int}, 0]{int}
				chord_copy[chord_copy_num{int}, 1]{int} := chords[i{int} + chord_set_offset{int}, 1]{int}
				chord_copy[chord_copy_num{int}, 3]{int} := chords[i{int} + chord_set_offset{int}, 3]{int}
				chord_copy[chord_copy_num{int}, 4]{int} := chords[i{int} + chord_set_offset{int}, 4]{int}
				chord_copy[chord_copy_num{int}, 2]{int} := chords[i{int} + chord_set_offset{int}, 2]{int}
				chord_copy[chord_copy_num{int}, 5]{int} := chords[i{int} + chord_set_offset{int}, 5]{int}
				chords.octaves_copy[chord_copy_num{int}]{int} := chords.octaves[i{int} + chord_set_offset{int}]{int}
				inc(chord_copy_num{int})
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_paste{int})
	btn_chord_paste{int} := 0
	if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 0)
		call chord.save_history
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (16 - 1)) 
			if(btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (chord_copy_num{int} - 1)) 
					if((i{int} + ii{int}) < 16)
						chords[(i{int} + ii{int}) + chord_set_offset{int}, 0]{int} := chord_copy[ii{int}, 0]{int}
						chords[(i{int} + ii{int}) + chord_set_offset{int}, 1]{int} := chord_copy[ii{int}, 1]{int}
						chords[(i{int} + ii{int}) + chord_set_offset{int}, 3]{int} := chord_copy[ii{int}, 3]{int}
						chords[(i{int} + ii{int}) + chord_set_offset{int}, 4]{int} := chord_copy[ii{int}, 4]{int}
						chords[(i{int} + ii{int}) + chord_set_offset{int}, 2]{int} := chord_copy[ii{int}, 2]{int}
						chords[(i{int} + ii{int}) + chord_set_offset{int}, 5]{int} := chord_copy[ii{int}, 5]{int}
						chords.octaves[(i{int} + ii{int}) + chord_set_offset{int}]{int} := chords.octaves_copy[ii{int}]{int}
					end if
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				i{int} := 16
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		call update_chord_slots
		call chord.get_current_chord
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_prev_chord_set{int})
	btn_prev_chord_set{int} := 0
	if(active_chord_set{int} > 0)
		dec(active_chord_set{int})
		if(active_chord_set{int} < 0)
			active_chord_set{int} := chord_set_num{int} - 1
		end if
		lbl_chord_set_page{int} -> text := (active_chord_set{int} + 1) & "/" & chord_set_num{int}
		call ui.update_skip_prev_buttons
		call ui.update_minus_button
		call update_chord_slots
		call dynamics.update
		active_chord_slot{int} := chord.last_slot_button{int} + chord_set_offset{int}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_next_chord_set{int})
	btn_next_chord_set{int} := 0
	if((active_chord_set{int} + 1) < chord_set_num{int})
		inc(active_chord_set{int})
		active_chord_set{int} := is_in_range(active_chord_set{int}, 0, chord_set_num{int} - 1) * active_chord_set{int}
		lbl_chord_set_page{int} -> text := (active_chord_set{int} + 1) & "/" & chord_set_num{int}
		call ui.update_skip_prev_buttons
		call ui.update_minus_button
		call update_chord_slots
		call dynamics.update
		active_chord_slot{int} := chord.last_slot_button{int} + chord_set_offset{int}
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_add_chord_set{int})
	inc(chord_set_num{int})
	chord_set_num{int} := clamp(chord_set_num{int}, 1, 8)
	active_chord_set{int} := chord_set_num{int} - 1
	lbl_chord_set_page{int} -> text := (active_chord_set{int} + 1) & "/" & chord_set_num{int}
	btn_add_chord_set{int} := 0
	call ui.update_skip_prev_buttons
	call ui.update_minus_button
	call update_chord_slots
	call dynamics.update
	active_chord_slot{int} := chord.last_slot_button{int} + chord_set_offset{int}
end on

on ui_control(btn_remove_chord_set{int})
	chord_set_num{int} := clamp(chord_set_num{int} - 1, 1, 8)
	active_chord_set{int} := chord_set_num{int} - 1
	lbl_chord_set_page{int} -> text := (active_chord_set{int} + 1) & "/" & chord_set_num{int}
	btn_remove_chord_set{int} := 0
	call ui.update_skip_prev_buttons
	call ui.update_minus_button
	call update_chord_slots
	call dynamics.update
	active_chord_slot{int} := chord.last_slot_button{int} + chord_set_offset{int}
end on

on ui_control(btn_play{int}){thread-unsafe}
	if(btn_play{int} = 0)
		call stop_engine
	else
		message("trigger timeline start")
		call stop_engine
		fade_out(by_marks(MARK_2{int}), 5000, 1)
		wait(10000)
		chord.playing_preview{int} := 0
		chord_playback.dynamics_callback_filter.first{int} := 1
		chord.playing{int} := 1
		chord.started{int} := 1
		lbl_chord_play_indicator{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		if(jumped_to_start{int} = 0)
			chord.slot_playing{int} := active_chord_slot{int}
			chord.play_pos{int} := int(((real(chord.slot_playing{int} / 2) * chord.midi_step{real}) * real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int})) + ((real(chord.slot_playing{int} mod 2) * real(meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1)) * chord.midi_step{real}))
		else
			chord.slot_playing{int} := 0
			chord.play_pos{int} := 0
		end if
		if(chord.slot_playing{int} = - 1)
			chord.slot_playing{int} := 0
			chord.play_pos{int} := 0
		end if
		chord_playback.iterator{int} := (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1) * (chord.slot_playing{int} mod 2)
		seq.active{int} := 1
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_jumptostart{int})
	btn_jumptostart{int} := 0
	jumped_to_start{int} := 1
	active_chord_type_group{int} := 0
	call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
	call update_chord_slots
	call ui.update_minus_button
	chord.slot_playing{int} := 0
	chord.play_pos{int} := 0
	chord_playback.iterator{int} := 0
	call remote_chord_slot_button
	if(active_chord_set{int} = 0)
		btn_chord_slot[0]{int} -> value := 1
	end if
	active_chord_slot{int} := 0
	call chord.get_current_chord
	chords_preview[0]{int} := active_root{int}
	chords_preview[1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
	chords_preview[3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
	chords_preview[2]{int} := active_bass_note{int}
	chords_preview[5]{int} := max(0, search[btn_voicing_states{int[]}, 1])
	chords_preview[6]{int} := chords.octaves[active_chord_slot{int}]{int}
	if(active_root{int} = - 1)
		active_chord_type{int} := 0
		active_bass_note{int} := - 1
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int} := 0
		select_btn_voicing(chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int})
		call chord.set_current_chord
	end if
	active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
	chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
	call update_type_buttons
	mnu_bass_note{int} := active_bass_note{int}
	call update_chord_info_label
	remote_chromatic_buttons(active_root{int})
end on

on ui_control(btn_engine_preview{int})
	if(btn_engine_preview{int} = 0)
		call stop_engine
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_chord_designer_backdrop{int})
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		last_touched_handle{int} := - 1
		call dynamics.update
	end if
end on

on ui_control(mnu_scale_root{int})
	call ui.update_slot_display
end on

on ui_control(mnu_scale_mode{int})
	call ui.update_slot_display
end on

on ui_control(btn_send_chords{int}){thread-unsafe}
	i{int} := 16 * active_chord_set{int}
	while(i{int} <= (((16 * active_chord_set{int}) + 16) - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (6 - 1)) 
			prepare_data_to_transfer(i{int} mod 16, ii{int}, chords[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	prepare_info_to_transfer(mnu_signature{int} -> value)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_transfer.chord_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		transfer.array[i{int}]{int} := _transfer.chord_array[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (1 - 1)) 
		transfer.array[(16 * 6) + i{int}]{int} := transfer.additional_info[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	wait_async(save_array_str(transfer.array{int[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}) & "../.transfer" & "/_transfer__chord_array.nka"))
	btn_send_chords{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(sli_chords_preview_vol{int})
	sli_chords_preview_vol1{int} := sli_chords_preview_vol{int}
	call set_chord_playback_volume
end on

on ui_control(sli_chords_preview_vol1{int})
	sli_chords_preview_vol{int} := sli_chords_preview_vol1{int}
	call set_chord_playback_volume
end on

on ui_control(sli_dynamic_handle0{unknown})
	last_touched_handle{int} := 0
	if(sli_dynamic_handle0{unknown} -> key_shift = 1)
		int_buffer{int} := sli_dynamic_handle0{unknown} -> value - dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, 0 - (0 / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 16) 
			dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, i{int}]{int} := clamp(dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, i{int}]{int} + int_buffer{int}, 0, 127)
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	else
		if(sli_dynamic_handle0{unknown} -> key_alt = 1)
			int_buffer{int} := sli_dynamic_handle0{unknown} -> value - dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, 0 - (0 / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int}
			dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, 0 - (0 / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} := sli_dynamic_handle0{unknown} -> value
			every_second{int} := ne(every_second{int})
			if(every_second{int} = 1)
				dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, (0 - (0 / ((16 / 2) + 1))) + 1]{int} := clamp(dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, (0 - (0 / ((16 / 2) + 1))) + 1]{int} + int_buffer{int}, 0, 127)
				dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, (0 - (0 / ((16 / 2) + 1))) - 1]{int} := clamp(dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, (0 - (0 / ((16 / 2) + 1))) - 1]{int} + int_buffer{int}, 0, 127)
			end if
		else
			dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, 0 - (0 / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} := sli_dynamic_handle0{unknown} -> value
		end if
	end if
	call dynamics.update
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(btn_clear_dynamics{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_dynamic_positions{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_dynamic_positions[i{int}]{int} := 100
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	call dynamics.update
	btn_clear_dynamics{int} := 0
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

on ui_control(mnu_line_mode{int})
	if((last_touched_handle{int} # - 1) and (last_touched_handle{int} < 17))
		line_mode[active_chord_set{int}, last_touched_handle{int} - (last_touched_handle{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} := mnu_line_mode{int}
	end if
	call dynamics.update
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end on

end on

on ui_control(btn_presetBrowser{int}){thread-unsafe}
	call instrument_browser.close
	ii{int} := btn_presetBrowser{int}
	call reset_page_buttons
	btn_find_page{int} := 1
	call hide_panels
	remote(btn_open_fx{int[]}, - 1)
	btn_presetBrowser{int} := 1
	preset_system.show(btn_presetBrowser{int})
	call update.preset_browser
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	UI_presetStrip{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	btn_chord_page_enter{int} := 0
	lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	btn_settings_page{int} := 0
	call fxRack.close
	call global_fx.close
	call instrument_browser.close
	call find.position_slot_buttons
	call midiexport.update_label_visibility
	if(btn_presetBrowser{int} = 0)
		call preset_system.return_to_shape_page
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_preset_browser_bg{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_preset_browser_bg{int} := 0
	if(saving_preset{int} = 1)
		call off_saving_preset_dialog
	end if
	preset_system.show(0)
	call preset_system.return_to_shape_page
end on

on ui_control(btn_clear_tags{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_clear_tags{int} := 0
	if(saving_preset{int} # 1)
		call clear_tags
		call on_button_tag
		call update.btn_active_status
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_prevPreset{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_prevPreset{int} := 0
	if(((preset_scan{int} = 0) and (saving_preset{int} = 0)) and (preset.is_loading{int} = 0))
		btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := 0
		btn_preset_button[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] # - 1)
			preset.idx{int} := final_preset_numbers_array[((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - 1) + NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}) mod NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}]{int}
		else
			preset.idx{int} := final_preset_numbers_array[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, - 1] - 1]{int}
		end if
		btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := 1
		if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}) = - 1)
			btn_preset_button[(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}) + 1]{int} -> value := 1
		else
			btn_preset_button[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
		if(not in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}], scroll.up{int}, (scroll.up{int} + 12) - 1))
			dec(scroll.up{int})
			call update.preset_button_focus
			call update.scrollarea
		end if
		vlue_preset_idx{int} -> value := preset.idx{int}
		call update.btn_active_status
		unmark_new_presets(preset.idx{int})
		browser.load_preset
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_nextPreset{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_nextPreset{int} := 0
	if(((preset_scan{int} = 0) and (saving_preset{int} = 0)) and (preset.is_loading{int} = 0))
		btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := 0
		btn_preset_button[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] # - 1)
			preset.idx{int} := final_preset_numbers_array[(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] + 1) mod NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}]{int}
		else
			preset.idx{int} := final_preset_numbers_array[0]{int}
		end if
		btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := 1
		if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}) >= 12)
			btn_preset_button[(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}) - 1]{int} -> value := 1
		else
			btn_preset_button[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
		if(not in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}], scroll.up{int}, (scroll.up{int} + 12) - 1))
			inc(scroll.up{int})
			if(scroll.up{int} > search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}])
				scroll.up{int} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]
			else
				if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}) > 12)
					scroll.up{int} := (search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - 12) + 2
				end if
			end if
			call update.scrollarea
		end if
		vlue_preset_idx{int} -> value := preset.idx{int}
		call update.btn_active_status
		unmark_new_presets(preset.idx{int})
		browser.load_preset
	end if
	call read_slot_colors
end on

on ui_control(btn_current_favorite{int})
	if(saving_preset{int} = 0)
		favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{int}]{int} := btn_current_favorite{int} -> value
		save.favorite_array
		final_favorite_presets_array[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := btn_current_favorite{int} -> value
		if(in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}], scroll.up{int}, (scroll.up{int} + 12) - 1))
			btn_preset_favorite[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}]{int} -> value := btn_current_favorite{int} -> value
		end if
		call update.btn_active_status
	end if
end on

on ui_control(sli_scrollbar{int})
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} > 12)
		scroll.up{int} := (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12) - (((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12) * sli_scrollbar{int}) / 1000000)
		scroll.up{int} := scroll.up{int}
		call repaint.scrollarea
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_tag1{int}){thread-unsafe}
	if(tag_mask_array[1 - 1]{int} = 1)
		ii{int} := get_category_idx(1 - 1)
		if((filtermethodPerCategory[ii{int}]{int} = filter.TOGGLE{int}) or (tag_button_array[1 - 1]{int} -> key_alt = 1))
			i{int} := category_accum[ii{int}]{int}
			while(i{int} <= (category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int} - 1)) 
				tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := eq(i{int}, 1 - 1) * tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			btn_tag1{int} := btn_tag1{int} .or. tag_button_array[1 - 1]{int} -> key_alt
		end if
		if(tag_button_array[1 - 1]{int} -> key_control = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (33 - 1)) 
				tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			tag_button_array[1 - 1]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
	end if
	if(saving_preset{int} = 0)
		if(tag_mask_array[1 - 1]{int} = 1)
			floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]})
			call on_button_tag
		else
			floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, 1 - 1, 0)
			tag_button_array[1 - 1]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		call update.btn_active_status
	else
		tag_button_array[0]{int} -> value := 1
	end if
end on

		if((filtermethodPerCategory[ii{int}]{int} = filter.TOGGLE{int}) or (tag_button_array[12 - 1]{int} -> key_alt = 1))
			i{int} := category_accum[ii{int}]{int}
			while(i{int} <= (category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int} - 1)) 
				tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := eq(i{int}, 12 - 1) * tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			btn_tag12{int} := btn_tag12{int} .or. tag_button_array[12 - 1]{int} -> key_alt
		end if
		if(tag_button_array[12 - 1]{int} -> key_control = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (33 - 1)) 
				tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			tag_button_array[12 - 1]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
	end if
	if(saving_preset{int} = 0)
		if(tag_mask_array[12 - 1]{int} = 1)
			floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]})
			call on_button_tag
		else
			floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, 12 - 1, 0)
			tag_button_array[12 - 1]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		call update.btn_active_status
	else
		tag_button_array[0]{int} -> value := 1
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_tag27{int}){thread-unsafe}
	if(tag_mask_array[27 - 1]{int} = 1)
		ii{int} := get_category_idx(27 - 1)
		if((filtermethodPerCategory[ii{int}]{int} = filter.TOGGLE{int}) or (tag_button_array[27 - 1]{int} -> key_alt = 1))
			i{int} := category_accum[ii{int}]{int}
			while(i{int} <= (category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int} - 1)) 
				tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := eq(i{int}, 27 - 1) * tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			btn_tag27{int} := btn_tag27{int} .or. tag_button_array[27 - 1]{int} -> key_alt
		end if
		if(tag_button_array[27 - 1]{int} -> key_control = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (33 - 1)) 
				tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			tag_button_array[27 - 1]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
	end if
	if(saving_preset{int} = 0)
		if(tag_mask_array[27 - 1]{int} = 1)
			floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]})
			call on_button_tag
		else
			floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, 27 - 1, 0)
			tag_button_array[27 - 1]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		call update.btn_active_status
	else
		tag_button_array[0]{int} -> value := 1
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_preset_favorite0{unknown})
	final_favorite_presets_array[scroll.up{int} + 0]{int} := btn_preset_favorite0{unknown} -> value
	favorite_presets_array[final_preset_numbers_array[0 + scroll.up{int}]{int}]{int} := btn_preset_favorite0{unknown} -> value
	save.favorite_array
	if(final_preset_numbers_array[0 + scroll.up{int}]{int} = preset.idx{int})
		btn_current_favorite{int} -> value := btn_preset_favorite0{unknown} -> value
	end if
	call update.btn_active_status
end on

on ui_control(btn_preset_button0{unknown}){thread-unsafe}
	doubleclick_start(btn_preset_button0{any}, btn_presetBrowserDC{int})
	if((preset.idx{int} # - 1) and (preset_numbers_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} = final_preset_numbers_array[scroll.up{int} + 0]{int}))
		btn_preset_button0{int} := 1
	else
		btn_preset_onoff[scroll.up{int} + 0]{int} := btn_preset_button0{unknown} -> value
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (12 - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # 0)
			btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # (scroll.up{int} + 0))
			btn_preset_onoff[i{int}]{int} := 0
		else
			if(btn_preset_button0{unknown} -> value = 1)
				preset.idx{int} := final_preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}
			else
				preset.idx{int} := - 1
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	vlue_preset_idx{int} -> value := preset.idx{int}
	call update.btn_active_status
	unmark_new_presets(preset.idx{int})
	doubleclick_check(btn_presetBrowserDC{int})
	browser.load_preset
end on

	while(i{int} <= (12 - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # 4)
			btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # (scroll.up{int} + 4))
			btn_preset_onoff[i{int}]{int} := 0
		else
			if(btn_preset_button4{unknown} -> value = 1)
				preset.idx{int} := final_preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}
			else
				preset.idx{int} := - 1
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	vlue_preset_idx{int} -> value := preset.idx{int}
	call update.btn_active_status
	unmark_new_presets(preset.idx{int})
	doubleclick_check(btn_presetBrowserDC{int})
	browser.load_preset
end on

	doubleclick_start(btn_preset_button5{any}, btn_presetBrowserDC{int})
	if((preset.idx{int} # - 1) and (preset_numbers_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} = final_preset_numbers_array[scroll.up{int} + 5]{int}))
		btn_preset_button5{int} := 1
	else
		btn_preset_onoff[scroll.up{int} + 5]{int} := btn_preset_button5{unknown} -> value
