on ui_control(sli_preset_preview_vol{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME{int}, vol_arr[(sli_preset_preview_vol{int} * eq(UI_preset_browser{int} -> hide, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})) / 1000]{int}, preview_group_idx{int}, 0, - 1)
end on

on ui_control(btn_midiexport{int})
	btn_midiexport{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(btn_devSave{int})
	UI_devSave{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_devSave{int}]{int}
end on

on ui_control(btn_devLoad{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_devLoad{int} := 0
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array(preset.array{int[]}, 0)
	wait_async(preset.load_id{int})
	call load_preset
	update_purge
end on

on ui_control(btn_devOverwrite{int})
	btn_devOverwrite{int} := 0
	if(eq(development[0]{int}, 22714) = 1)
		call save_preset
		save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, preset_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_devSave_confirm{int})
	btn_devSave_confirm{int} := 0
	if(eq(development[0]{int}, 22714) = 1)
		call save_preset
		save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, preset_path{string} & txt_devPresetName{string} & ".nka")
	end if
	btn_devSave{int} := 0
	UI_devSave{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_devSave{int}]{int}
end on

on ui_control(btn_devSave_cancel{int})
	btn_devSave_cancel{int} := 0
	btn_devSave{int} := 0
	UI_devSave{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_devSave{int}]{int}
end on

on ui_control(btn_save{int})
	preset.overwrite{int} := 0
	if(saving_preset{int} = 0)
		saving_preset{int} := user.SAVES_NEW{int}
		call on_saving_preset_dialog
	else
		btn_save{int} := 1
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_save_confirm{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_save_confirm{int} := 0
	preset.overwrite{int} := (preset.overwrite{int} + 1) mod 2
	check.preset_overwrite
	if(preset.overwrite{int} = 0)
		if(saving_preset{int} = user.SAVES_NEW{int})
			save.preset
		else
			if(saving_preset{int} = user.EDITS_TAGS{int})
				edit.tags
			end if
		end if
		preset.overwrite{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_save_cancel{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_save_cancel{int} := 0
	call off_saving_preset_dialog
end on

on ui_control(btn_edit_tags{int}){thread-unsafe}
	if(((saving_disabled{int} = 0) and (preset_scan{int} = 0)) and ((saving_preset{int} = 0) or (saving_preset{int} = user.EDITS_TAGS{int})))
		if(btn_edit_tags{int} = 1)
			saving_preset{int} := user.EDITS_TAGS{int}
			call on_saving_preset_dialog
		else
			edit.tags
		end if
	else
		btn_edit_tags{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_delete_preset{int}){thread-unsafe}
	btn_delete_preset{int} := 0
	if(((saving_disabled{int} = 0) and (preset_scan{int} = 0)) and (saving_preset{int} = 0))
		if(saving_preset{int} # 0)
			call off_saving_preset_dialog
		end if
		saving_preset{int} := user.DELETES_PRESET{int}
		if(btn_delete_preset{int} -> key_alt = 1)
			delete.all_user_presets_from_nka
		end if
		delete.preset
	end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_scan_presets{int}){thread-unsafe}
	file_browser{int} -> basepath := base_path{string}
	if(saving_preset{int} # 0)
		call off_saving_preset_dialog
	end if
	if(saving_preset{int} = 0)
		visibility.preset.save.dialog(0)
		btn_scan_presets{int} := 1
		call on_btn_scan_presets
		lbl_scan_info{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		if(preset_scan{int} = 0)
			preset_scan_info{int} := 0
			preset.frame_count{int} := 0
			preset_scan{int} := 1
			preset.usr_display_num{int} := 0
			preset.usr_count{int} := 0
			preset.deleted_count{int} := 0
			preset.count{int} := 0
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[user_preset_tags0{int[]}] - 1)) 
				user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int} := 0
				user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int} := 0
				user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string} := 0
				user_deleted_presets[i{int}]{int} := 0
				user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int} := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			array.clear(preset.array{int[]})
			fs_navigate(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}), 1)
		end if
	end if
end on

on ui_control(file_browser{int}){thread-unsafe}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}), 2))
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}), 2)))
	if(preset.usr_count{int} < 10)
		wait(5000)
	end if
	message("file name: " & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}), 0))
	if((preset_scan{int} = 1) and (preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} # - 9999))
		if(preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} = PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int})
			if((preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_scan_presets{int} -> key_alt = 0))
				lbl_scan_info{int} -> text := "Scanning Files: " & (preset.usr_display_num{int} + 1)
				save_scanned_preset_vars
				inc(preset.usr_display_num{int})
			else
				if(((preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} = 0) or (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} = 1)) and (btn_scan_presets{int} -> key_alt = 1))
					lbl_scan_info{int} -> text := "Scanning Files: " & (preset.usr_display_num{int} + 1)
					preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int} := validate.user_preset_idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int})
					preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
					save_scanned_preset_vars
					inc(preset.usr_display_num{int})
					inc(preset.deleted_count{int})
				end if
			end if
			save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}), 0) & ".nka")
		else
			if(preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} < PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int})
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (num_elements[preset.array{int[]}] - 1)) 
					preset.arrayOG[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[i{int}]{int}
					preset.array[i{int}]{int} := 0
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= ((num_elements[preset.array{int[]}] - 1) - preset.CONTENT_IDX{int})) 
					preset.array[i{int} + preset.CONTENT_IDX{int}]{int} := preset.arrayOG[i{int}]{int}
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}, preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int})
				floatmask.set(presetmask{int[]}, 0, 1)
				update_user_preset_to_1_1(presetmask{int[]}, preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int})
				preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} := presetmask[0]{int}
				preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int} := presetmask[1]{int}
				preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} := PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int}
				preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
				preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int} := validate.user_preset_idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int})
				lbl_scan_info{int} -> text := "Scanning Files: " & "Old User Presets found"
				save_scanned_preset_vars
				inc(preset.usr_display_num{int})
				save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}), 0) & ".nka")
			end if
		end if
		btn_scan_presets{int} -> value := 1
		fs_navigate(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}), 1)
	else
		get_user_preset_after_scan
		save.resource_arrays
		preset.count{int} := preset.count{int} - NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}
		call update.preset_situation
		i{int} := NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int}
		while(i{int} <= (NUM_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
			favorite_presets_array[i{int}]{int} := 0
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		save.favorite_array
		saving_preset{int} := 0
		call on_button_tag
		if(load_new{int} = 1)
			load_new{int} := 0
		end if
		call update.btn_active_status
		btn_scan_presets{int} := 0
		call on_btn_scan_presets
		preset_scan{int} := 0
	end if
end on

on async_complete
	if(NI_ASYNC_ID{int} = preset.load_id{int})
		if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} = 1)
			preset.load_id{int} := - 1
		else
			if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} = 0)
				preset.load_id{int} := 0
			end if
		end if
	end if
end on

on ui_control(lbl_help_overlay{int})
	lbl_help_overlay{int} := 0
	panel.help{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	btn_help{int} := 0
end on

on ui_control(btn_help{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[help_trigger_controls{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(help_trigger_controls[i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
			lbl_help_overlay{int} -> picture := help_pictures[i{int}]{string}
			i{int} := num_elements[help_trigger_controls{int[]}] - 1
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if((btn_play_page{int} .and. seq.view_mode{int}) = 1)
		lbl_help_overlay{int} -> picture := help_pictures[3]{string}
	end if
	panel.help{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_help{int}]{int}
end on

function check_decoding
	decode[0]{int} := - 1
	_id{int} := load_array_str(decode{int[]}, decode_path{string})
	if(_id{int} = - 1)
	end if
end function

function save_preset
	preset.n{int} := 0 + (is_user_preset_save * preset.CONTENT_IDX{int})
	preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int} := PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int}
	inc(preset.n{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}] - 1)) 
		preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int} := slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0

function load_preset_array override
{thread-unsafe}
	message("preset_numbers_array: " & preset_numbers_array[preset.idx{int}]{int} & ", preset.idx: " & preset.idx{int})
	floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[preset.idx{int}]{int}, preset_tags1[preset.idx{int}]{int})
	if(is_user_preset(presetmask{int[]}) = 1)
		preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
		message("loading user_preset")
	else
		preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, preset_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
		message(preset_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
		message("loading factory_preset")
	end if
	while(preset.load_id{int} > 0) 
		wait(10)
	end while
	if(is_user_preset(presetmask{int[]}) = 1)
		if(preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} < PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int})
			update_user_preset_to_1_1(presetmask{int[]}, preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int})
			preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} := presetmask[0]{int}
			preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int} := presetmask[1]{int}
			preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} := PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int}
			preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
			save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
		end if
	end if
end function

function get_user_preset_after_scan{thread-unsafe}
	floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[preset.idx{int}]{int}, preset_tags1[preset.idx{int}]{int})
	if(is_user_preset(presetmask{int[]}) = 1)
		preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
		message(base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
		wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"))
		if(preset.load_id{int} = - 1)
			load_new{int} := 0
			preset.idx{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
		else
			preset.idx{int} := preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} - 1]{int}
			load_new{int} := 1
		end if
		preset.idx{int} := preset.idx{int}
	end if
end function

function scanning_automation
	if((preset_scan_info{int} = 0) and (btn_scan_presets{int} -> value = 1))
		if(preset_scan{int} = 1)
			lbl_scan_animation{int} -> picture_state := preset.frame_count{int}
		end if
		if((preset_scan{int} = 0) and in_range(preset.frame_count{int}, 1, 50))
			lbl_scan_animation{int} -> picture_state := preset.frame_count{int}
			if(preset.frame_count{int} >= 50)
				preset_scan_info{int} := 1
				preset.frame_count{int} := 0
				btn_scan_presets{int} -> value := 0
				call on_btn_scan_presets
			end if
		end if
		preset.frame_rate{int} := (preset.frame_rate{int} + 1) mod real_to_int(round([(1 / int_to_real(30)) / (int_to_real(1000) / 1e+06)]))
		preset.frame_count{int} := (preset.frame_count{int} + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{int}, 31) + 1)) mod 51
	else
		if((preset_scan_info{int} = 1) and (preset_scan{int} = 0))
			preset.frame_rate{int} := (preset.frame_rate{int} + 1) mod real_to_int(round([(1 / int_to_real(30)) / (int_to_real(1000) / 1e+06)]))
			preset.frame_count{int} := (preset.frame_count{int} + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{int}, 31) + 1)) mod 100
			if(preset.frame_count{int} >= 99)
				preset_scan_info{int} := 0
				lbl_scan_info{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				lbl_presetcount{int} -> text := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} & "/" & NUM_PRESETS{int}
			else
				if(btn_scan_presets{int} -> key_alt = 0)
					lbl_scan_info{int} -> text := "User Presets found: " & preset.usr_display_num{int}
				else
					lbl_scan_info{int} -> text := "Files recovered: " & preset.usr_display_num{int}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function off_saving_preset_dialog{thread-unsafe}
	saving_disabled{int} := 1
	saving_preset{int} := 0
	btn_save{int} := 0
	btn_edit_tags{int} := 0
	preset.overwrite{int} := 0
	txt_presetname{string} -> font_type := fonts.current_preset_font[0]{int}
	btn_overwrite{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	visibility.preset.save.dialog(0)
	UI_preset_save_dialog{int} -> hide := hide_state[0]{int}
	bit_list[0]{int} := bit_list2[0]{int}
	bit_list[1]{int} := bit_list2[1]{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (33 - 1)) 
		tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := floatmask.get(bit_list{int[]}, i{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	btn_scan_presets{int} := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets
	call on_button_tag
	call update.btn_active_status
end function

function delete.preset{thread-unsafe}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka"))
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 0
	user_deleted_presets[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := 0
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
	i{int} := search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[favorite_presets_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} < (num_elements[favorite_presets_array{int[]}] - 1))
			favorite_presets_array[i{int}]{int} := favorite_presets_array[i{int} + 1]{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	save.favorite_array
	preset.idx{int} := preset_numbers_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - 1]{int}
	call update.preset_situation
	save.resource_arrays
	saving_preset{int} := 0
	call on_button_tag
	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] # - 1)
		preset.idx{int} := final_preset_numbers_array[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] mod NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}]{int}
	else
		preset.idx{int} := preset.idx{int}
	end if
	btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := 1
	if(in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}, 0, 12 - 1))
		btn_preset_button[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}]{int} -> value := 1
	end if
	call update.preset_button_focus
	call update.scrollarea
	call update.btn_active_status
	if(search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.last_idx{int}] = - 1)
		message("loaded preset has been deleted")
		browser.load_preset
	end if
end function

function check.preset_overwrite{thread-unsafe}
	i{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka")
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka"))
	if(saving_preset{int} = user.EDITS_TAGS{int})
		if(i{int} = preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int})
			preset.load_id{int} := 0
		end if
	end if
	if(((preset.load_id{int} = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} # 0)) and (preset.overwrite{int} = 1))
		txt_presetname{string} -> font_type := fonts.current_preset_font[0]{int}
		btn_overwrite{int} -> text := "File already exists. Overwrite?"
		btn_overwrite{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	else
		txt_presetname{string} -> font_type := fonts.current_preset_font[0]{int}
		btn_overwrite{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		preset.overwrite{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function set_preset_numbers
	i{int} := NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int}
	while(i{int} <= (1499 - 1)) 
		preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function doubleclick_start(ui_control : any, double_click_control : int)
	set_bounds(double_click_control{int}, ui_control{any} -> x, ui_control{any} -> y, ui_control{any} -> width, ui_control{any} -> height)
	double_click_control{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	double_click_control{int} := 0
	clicktime[0]{int} := get_ui_id(ui_control{any})
	clicktime[1]{int} := ENGINE_UPTIME{int}
end function

function tag_state_handling override

	floatmask.clear(bit_list2{int[]})
	floatmask.clear(presetmask{int[]})
	floatmask.clear(tagmask{int[]})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
		floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, final_preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}]]{int}, preset_tags1[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, final_preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}]]{int})
		floatmask.set(presetmask{int[]}, 33 - 1, favorite_presets_array[final_preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}]{int})
		floatmask.or(tagmask{int[]}, presetmask{int[]}, tagmask{int[]})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (5 - 1)) 
		if((filtermethodPerCategory[ii{int}]{int} = filter.TOGGLE{int}) or (filtermethodPerCategory[ii{int}]{int} = filter.ADDITIVE{int}))
			bit_list2[0]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
			bit_list2[1]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
			floatmask.set_range(bit_list2{int[]}, category_accum[ii{int}]{int}, 33 - 1, 0)
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (5 - 1)) 
				if(filtermethodPerCategory[iii{int}]{int} # filter.SUBTRACTIVE{int})
					if(activeTagsPerCategory[iii{int}]{int} = 0)
						floatmask.set_range(bit_list2{int[]}, category_accum[iii{int}]{int}, category_accum[iii{int} + 1]{int}, 1)
					end if
				end if
				inc(iii{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} < NUM_PRESETS{int}) 
				floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[i{int}]{int}, preset_tags1[i{int}]{int})
				floatmask.set(presetmask{int[]}, 33 - 1, favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}]{int})
				floatmask.get_range(presetmask{int[]}, 0, category_accum[ii{int}]{int}, bitlist_return{int[]})
				floatmask.and(bit_list2{int[]}, bitlist_return{int[]}, bitlist_return{int[]})
				u{int} := 0
				v{int} := 0
				iii{int} := 0
				while(iii{int} <= (ii{int} - 1)) 
					if(filtermethodPerCategory[iii{int}]{int} # filter.SUBTRACTIVE{int})
						floatmask.get_range(bitlist_return{int[]}, category_accum[iii{int}]{int}, category_accum[iii{int} + 1]{int}, bitlist_return1{int[]})
						if(floatmask.count(bitlist_return1{int[]}, 1) >= 1)
							inc(u{int})
						end if
						inc(v{int})
					end if
					inc(iii{int})
				end while
				if((u{int} = v{int}) and (floatmask.equal(bitlist_return{int[]}, bit_list2{int[]}) = 1))
					floatmask.get_range(presetmask{int[]}, category_accum[ii{int}]{int}, category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int}, bitlist_return1{int[]})
					floatmask.or(tagmask{int[]}, bitlist_return1{int[]}, tagmask{int[]})
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
		inc(ii{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (33 - 1)) 
		tag_mask_array[i{int}]{int} := floatmask.get(tagmask{int[]}, i{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= ((5 - 1) - 1)) 
		floatmask.get_range(tagmask{int[]}, category_accum[ii{int}]{int}, category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int}, bitlist_return{int[]})
		category_active[ii{int}]{int} := ne(bool(floatmask.count(bitlist_return{int[]}, 1)))
		lbl_categories[ii{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.category_font[category_active[ii{int}]{int}]{int}
		i{int} := category_accum[ii{int}]{int}
		while(i{int} <= (category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int} - 1)) 
			u{int} := 0
			while(u{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
				set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{int}]{int}, font.types[u{int}]{int}, fonts.base_font[u{int} * tag_mask_array[i{int}]{int}]{int} + (eq(tag_mask_array[i{int}]{int}, 0) * 6))
				inc(u{int})
			end while
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		inc(ii{int})
	end while
end function

function tags_wait{thread-unsafe}
	wait(1)
end function

function filter_presets override
{thread-unsafe}
	declare local escape : int := 0
	declare local allowed : int := 0
	declare local bit_count : int := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[final_favorite_presets_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		final_preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int} := - 1
		final_favorite_presets_array[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (5 - 1)) 
		floatmask.get_range(bit_list{int[]}, category_accum[i{int}]{int}, category_accum[i{int} + 1]{int}, bitlist_return{int[]})
		activeTagsPerCategory[i{int}]{int} := floatmask.count(bitlist_return{int[]}, 1)
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	z{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (NUM_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
		floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[i{int}]{int}, preset_tags1[i{int}]{int})
		floatmask.set(presetmask{int[]}, 33 - 1, favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}]{int})
		v{int} := 0
		while((v{int} < 5) and (escape{int} = 0)) 
			if(filtermethodPerCategory[v{int}]{int} = filter.ADDITIVE{int})
				floatmask.get_range(presetmask{int[]}, category_accum[v{int}]{int}, category_accum[v{int} + 1]{int}, bitlist_return{int[]})
				floatmask.and(bitlist_return{int[]}, bit_list{int[]}, bitlist_return{int[]})
				bit_count{int} := floatmask.count(bitlist_return{int[]}, 1)
				allowed{int} := allowed{int} + ((bool(bit_count{int}) .or. ne(bool(activeTagsPerCategory[v{int}]{int}))) * category_elements[v{int}]{int})
				escape{int} := ne(bool(bit_count{int}) .or. abs(bool(activeTagsPerCategory[v{int}]{int}) - 1))
			else
				if((filtermethodPerCategory[v{int}]{int} = filter.SUBTRACTIVE{int}) or (filtermethodPerCategory[v{int}]{int} = filter.TOGGLE{int}))
					floatmask.not(bit_list{int[]}, bitlist_return{int[]})
					floatmask.or(bitlist_return{int[]}, presetmask{int[]}, bitlist_return{int[]})
					floatmask.get_range(bitlist_return{int[]}, category_accum[v{int}]{int}, category_accum[v{int} + 1]{int}, bitlist_return{int[]})
					bit_count{int} := floatmask.count(bitlist_return{int[]}, 1)
					allowed{int} := allowed{int} + bit_count{int}
				end if
			end if
			inc(v{int})
			tags_wait
		end while
		if(allowed{int} = 33)
			final_preset_new[z{int}]{int} := preset_new[i{int}]{int}
			final_preset_title_array[z{int}]{string} := preset_title_array[i{int}]{string}
			if(final_preset_new[z{int}]{int} = 1)
				final_preset_title_array[z{int}]{string} := final_preset_title_array[z{int}]{string} & " (New)"
			end if
			final_preset_numbers_array[z{int}]{int} := preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}
			final_preset_info[z{int}]{string} := preset_info[i{int}]{string}
			final_favorite_presets_array[z{int}]{int} := favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i{int}]{int}]{int}
			inc(z{int})
		end if
		escape{int} := 0
		allowed{int} := 0
		end_of_presets_array[i{int}]{int} := i{int}
		btn_preset_onoff[i{int}]{int} := 0
		bit_count{int} := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} # 0)
		NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{int} := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}
	end if
	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} := z{int}
end function

function update.preset_button_focus
	if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] # - 1) and (preset.idx{int} # - 1))
		btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{int} := 1
		if((scroll.up{int} > search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]) and (scroll.up{int} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)))
			scroll.up{int} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] + (ge(scroll.up{int} - 3, 0) * - 3)
			if(scroll.up{int} > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12))
				scroll.up{int} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]
			end if
		else
			if(((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - scroll.up{int}) > 12) and (scroll.up{int} <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)))
				scroll.up{int} := ((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] - 12) + 1) + (le(scroll.up{int} + 3, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}) * 3)
			end if
		end if
		if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)) and (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} > 12))
			scroll.up{int} := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12
		end if
		scroll.up{int} := ge(scroll.up{int}, 0) * scroll.up{int}
	else
		if(preset.idx{int} = - 1)
			scroll.up{int} := 0
		end if
	end if
	if(scroll.up{int} > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12))
		scroll.up{int} := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12
	end if
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} < 12)
		scroll.up{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function play_preview{thread-unsafe}
	declare local preview_zone_id : int
	if(sli_preset_preview_vol{int} > 0)
		call kill_preview
		preview_counter{int} := (preview_counter{int} + 1) mod num_elements[preview_id{int[]}]
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME{int}, vol_arr[(sli_preset_preview_vol{int} * eq(UI_preset_browser{int} -> hide, HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})) / 1000]{int}, preview_group_idx{int}, 0, - 1)
		preview_id[preview_counter{int}]{int} := play_note(lsb(preset.idx{int}), msb(preset.idx{int}) + 1, 0, - 1)
		set_event_par_arr(preview_id[preview_counter{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int})
		set_event_par_arr(preview_id[preview_counter{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, preview_group_idx{int})
		wait(1)
		preview_zone_id{int} := get_event_par(preview_id[preview_counter{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int})
		message("lsb: " & lsb(preset.idx{int}) & " msb+1: " & (msb(preset.idx{int}) + 1) & " groups: " & get_sample(preview_zone_id{int}, NI_FILE_NAME{int}))
	end if
end function

function repaint.scrollarea
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (12 - 1)) 
		btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int} -> text := "      " & final_preset_title_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{string}
		btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int} -> value := btn_preset_onoff[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int}
		btn_preset_favorite[i{int}]{int} -> value := final_favorite_presets_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int}
		btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int}]{int}
		btn_preset_favorite[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[end_of_presets_array[i{int} + scroll.up{int}]{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(floatmask.is_empty(bit_list{int[]}) = 1)
		scroll.up_origin{int} := scroll.up{int}
	end if
	lbl_scrollhandle{int} -> y := sli_scrollbar{int} -> y + ((215 - handle_size{int}) - ((sli_scrollbar{int} * (215 - handle_size{int})) / 1000000))
end function

function update.scrollarea
	call repaint.scrollarea
	sli_scrollbar{int} := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)) * scroll.up{int})
end function

function disable_logging
	disable_logging(NI_LOG_MESSAGE{int})
	disable_logging(NI_LOG_WARNING{int})
	disable_logging(NI_LOG_WATCHING{int})
end function

function get_category_idx(tag_idx : int) -> result : int
	i{int} := 0
	while((i{int} < num_elements[category_accum{int[]}]) and (category_accum[i{int}]{int} <= tag_idx{int})) 
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	result{int} := max(0, i{int} - 1)
end function

function clear_tags
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[tag_button_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	floatmask.clear(bit_list{int[]})
end function

function update.preset_browser{thread-unsafe}
	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}] = - 1)
		preset.idx{int} := 0
	end if
	btn_scan_presets{int} := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]})
	call update.btn_active_status
	call on_button_tag
end function

function preset_system.show(Boolean : int)
	file_browser{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_scan_animation{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	UI_preset_browser{int} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	btn_preset_browser_bg{int} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	btn_preset_browser_front{int} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	btn_presetBrowser{int} := Boolean{int}
	btn_find_page{int} := Boolean{int}
	UI_preset_save_dialog{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_mw_bg{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{int})]{int}
	lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{int})]{int}
	anim.mw_fade{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{int})]{int}
	anim.mw_lightstrip{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{int})]{int}
	anim.mw_fingertouch{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{int})]{int}
	if(Boolean{int} = 0)
		kill_preview
	end if
end function

function delete.all_user_presets_from_nka
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (500 - 1)) 
		user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int} := 0
		user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int} := 0
		user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string} := 0
		user_deleted_presets[i{int}]{int} := 0
		user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	save.resource_arrays
	___print_string{string} := "user_preset_titles: "
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= 10) 
		___print_string{string} := ___print_string{string} & user_preset_titles[lib.i{int}]{string} & ", "
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
	message(___print_string{string})
end function

function preset_system.return_to_shape_page
	btn_shape_page{int} := 1
	panel.find_external{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	panel.shape{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	call update_morph_faders
	call find.position_slot_buttons
	call instrument_browser.close
	call midiexport.update_label_visibility
end function

function trigger_free_mode(s : int, triggered_note : int, pressed_note : int, velocity : int)
	declare local _to_trigger : int := 0
	if(search[recent_notes{int[]}, pressed_note{int}] # - 1)
		if(recent_triggered[search[recent_notes{int[]}, pressed_note{int}]]{int} = 0)
			_to_trigger{int} := 1
		end if
		recent_triggered[search[recent_notes{int[]}, pressed_note{int}]]{int} := 1
	end if
	if((last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} = - 1) or ((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{int} = NI_CB_TYPE_NOTE{int}) and (_to_trigger{int} = 1)))
		if((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{int} = NI_CB_TYPE_NOTE{int}) and (last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} # - 1))
			note_off(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int})
		end if
		if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0) and in_range(triggered_note{int}, instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int}, instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int}))
			if(executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} = 0)
				inc(slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int})
				if(slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} >= instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int})
					slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} := 0
				end if
				executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} := 1
			end if
			last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} := play_note(triggered_note{int}, velocity{int}, 0, - 1)
			redirect_output(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, s{int})
			set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int})
			set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} + instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int}) + 1)
		end if
		if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) and in_range(triggered_note{int}, 48, 72))
			if(executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} = 0)
				inc(slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int})
				if(slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} >= instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int})
					slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} := 0
				end if
				executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} := 1
			end if
			last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} := play_note(triggered_note{int}, velocity{int}, 0, - 1)
			redirect_output(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, s{int})
			set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int})
			if(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} > 0)
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int}) + 1) + (ii{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1)))
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
			else
				set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int}) + 1)
			end if
		end if
		if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1) and in_range(triggered_note{int}, instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int}, instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int}))
			last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} := play_note(triggered_note{int}, velocity{int}, 0, - 1)
			redirect_output(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, s{int})
			set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int})
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + ii{int}) + 1)
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, int((1e+06 * real(current_controller_value[s{int}]{int})) / 127), 1)
		end if
		if(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} # - 1)
			set_event_mark(last_note_ids[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int}, MARK_1{int})
			if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} = 1)
				mf.sustained_events[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} := mf_insert_event(s{int}, mf.on_note_timestamps[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} - transport_stamp{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, triggered_note{int}, velocity{int})
				mf.sustained_events_positions[s{int}, pressed_note{int}]{int} := NI_SONG_POSITION{int}
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function sort_buffer
	declare local min_note : int
	declare local max_note : int
	call set_note_selection
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 0)
			min_note{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int}
			max_note{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
			select(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int})
			case 0
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				a{int} := 0
				while(a{int} < selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
					play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1) - a{int}]{int}
					inc(a{int})
				end while
			case 1
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				a{int} := 0
				while(a{int} < selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
					play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
					inc(a{int})
				end while
			case 2
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				a{int} := 0
				while(a{int} < selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
					play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1) - a{int}]{int}
					inc(a{int})
				end while
			case 3
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				a{int} := 0
				while(a{int} < selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
					play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
					inc(a{int})
				end while
			case 4
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				a{int} := 0
				while(a{int} < selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
					play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1) - a{int}]{int}
					inc(a{int})
				end while
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 2)
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} * 2) - 2
					a{int} := 0
					while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2)) 
						play_buffer[i{int}, a{int} + selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int} + 1]{int}
						inc(a{int})
					end while
				end if
			case 5
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				a{int} := 0
				while(a{int} < selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
					play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
					inc(a{int})
				end while
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 2)
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} * 2) - 2
					a{int} := 0
					while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2)) 
						play_buffer[i{int}, a{int} + selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2) - a{int}]{int}
						inc(a{int})
					end while
				end if
			case 6
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 1)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := min_note{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 2)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := min_note{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := max_note{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 3)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 3
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 3)
					a{int} := 0
					while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2)) 
						play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2)]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - a{int}) - 1]{int}
						play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - a{int}) - 3]{int}
						inc(a{int})
					end while
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := (2 * selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) - 4
				end if
			case 7
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 1)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := min_note{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 2)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := max_note{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := min_note{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 3)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 3
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 3)
					a{int} := 0
					while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2)) 
						play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2)]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
						play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int} + 2]{int}
						inc(a{int})
					end while
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := (2 * selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) - 4
				end if
			case 8
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 1)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := min_note{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 2)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := min_note{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := max_note{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 3)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 3]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 4
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 3)
					select(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 6]{int})
					case 1
						a{int} := 0
						while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2)) 
							play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2)]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - a{int}) - 1]{int}
							play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - a{int}) - 3]{int}
							inc(a{int})
						end while
						a{int} := 0
						while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 3)) 
							play_buffer[i{int}, ((a{int} * 2) + ((selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2) * 2))]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int} + 2]{int}
							play_buffer[i{int}, ((a{int} * 2) + ((selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2) * 2)) + 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int} + 1]{int}
							inc(a{int})
						end while
						play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := (4 * selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) - 10
					end select
				end if
			case 9
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 1)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := min_note{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 2)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := max_note{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := min_note{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 3)
					play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, 3]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int}
					play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 4
				end if
				if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 3)
					select(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 6]{int})
					case 1
						a{int} := 0
						while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2)) 
							play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2)]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
							play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int} + 2]{int}
							inc(a{int})
						end while
						a{int} := 0
						while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 3)) 
							play_buffer[i{int}, ((a{int} * 2) + ((selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2) * 2))]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - a{int}) - 3]{int}
							play_buffer[i{int}, ((a{int} * 2) + ((selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2) * 2)) + 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - a{int}) - 2]{int}
							inc(a{int})
						end while
						play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := (4 * selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) - 10
					end select
				end if
			case 10 to 13
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				a{int} := 0
				while((a{int} * 2) < selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
					play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2)]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1) - a{int}]{int}
					play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
					inc(a{int})
				end while
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				if((SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 11) or (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 13))
					a{int} := 0
					while(a{int} < play_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
						help_buffer[i{int}, (play_cursor[i{int}]{int} - a{int}) - 1]{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
						inc(a{int})
					end while
					a{int} := 0
					while(a{int} < play_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
						play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int} := help_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
						inc(a{int})
					end while
				end if
				if(((SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 12) or (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 13)) and (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 2))
					select(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 6]{int})
					case 1
						a{int} := 0
						while(a{int} < (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2)) 
							play_buffer[i{int}, (a{int} + selected_cursor[i{int}]{int})]{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2) - a{int}]{int}
							inc(a{int})
						end while
						play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} * 2) - 2
					end select
				end if
			case 14
				play_cursor[i{int}]{int} := selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}
				a{int} := 0
				while(a{int} < selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}) 
					play_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, a{int}]{int}
					inc(a{int})
				end while
			end select
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function set_note_selection
	declare local i : int
	declare local ii : int
	declare local hold_value : int
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			array.clear(sorting_buffer{int[]})
			selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (cursor{int} - 1)) 
				sorting_buffer[ii{int}]{int} := note_buffer[ii{int}]{int}
				inc(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int})
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			sort[sorting_buffer{int[]}, 1]
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := sorting_buffer[ii{int}]{int}
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			if((SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 2]{int} # 0) and (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} # 0))
				select(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 2]{int})
				case 1
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int}
					selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
				case 2
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						hold_value{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
						selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int}
						if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 1)
							if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 2)
								selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := hold_value{int}
							else
								selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2]{int}
							end if
							selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
						else
							selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
						end if
					else
						hold_value{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
						selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int}
						if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} > 1)
							if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 2)
								selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := sorting_buffer[selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2]{int}
								selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := sorting_buffer[selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int}
							else
								selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := sorting_buffer[selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 2]{int}
								selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := sorting_buffer[selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int}
							end if
							selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
						else
							selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
						end if
					end if
				case 3
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, cursor{int} / 2]{int}
					selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
				case 4
					hold_value{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, (cursor{int} / 2) - 1]{int}
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, cursor{int} / 2]{int}
					if(cursor{int} > 2)
						selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := hold_value{int}
						selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, cursor{int} / 2]{int}
						selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
					else
						selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
					end if
				case 5
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					if(cursor{int} = 2)
						selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int}
						selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
					else
						if(cursor{int} > 2)
							selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 2]{int}
							selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 3
						else
							if(cursor{int} = 1)
								selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
							end if
						end if
					end if
				case 6
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					if(cursor{int} > 1)
						selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int}
						selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
					else
						selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
					end if
				case 7
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
				case 8
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
				case 9
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
					selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, 1]{int} := selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int}
					selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 2
					if(cursor{int} = 1)
						selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 1
					end if
				end select
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function trigger_seq{thread-unsafe}
	declare local n : int
	declare local hold : int
	declare local cur_pitch : int
	declare local played_note_is_in_range : int
	declare local _unfade : int
	declare local _act_step : int
	if((cursor{int} > 0) and (seq.active{int} = 1))
		played_note_is_in_range{int} := 0
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= cursor{int}) 
			if(in_range(note_buffer[ii{int}]{int}, global_range.low{int}, global_range.high{int}))
				played_note_is_in_range{int} := 1
			end if
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		if(time_check{int} = 1)
			time_check{int} := 0
		end if
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			if((((slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1) and (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} # 0)) and (played_note_is_in_range{int} = 1)) and (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} # 14))
				if(((real(play_pos{int}) mod midi_steps[i{int}]{real}) < 1) and (play_pos{int} >= 0))
					executed_rr_inc[i{int}]{int} := 0
					if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 0) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 3))
						if(seq.step_state[i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real})]{int} # 0)
							velo{int} := clamp([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}, 0))], 0, 127)
							if(((apply_accent[i{int}]{int} = 1) and (btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1)) and (velo{int} # 0))
								velo{int} := int(scale.range(real(velo{int}), 0, 127, 0, [127 - real(accent_offset[2]{int})])) + (accent_offset[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real})) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int}]{int} * ne(sgn(int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}) mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2)))))
							end if
							if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
								if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
									if(velo{int} > 0)
										ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
										while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
											if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
												note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
												last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
											end if
											inc(ii{int})
										end while
										ii{int} := 0
										while(ii{int} <= 8) 
											velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), ii{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
											if(seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), ii{int}]{int} # 99)
												cur_pitch{int} := seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), ii{int}]{int}
												if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 1)
													note_custom_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} + (12 * cur_pitch{int})
													mf.note_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int}
												else
													if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 2)
														if(cur_pitch{int} >= 0)
															note_custom_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} mod 2]{int} + (12 * (cur_pitch{int} / 2))
															mf.note_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} mod 2]{int}
														else
															note_custom_hold{int} := (play_buffer[i{int}, abs(cur_pitch{int}) mod 2]{int} - (12 * ((abs(cur_pitch{int}) - 1) / 2))) - 12
															mf.note_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, abs(cur_pitch{int}) mod 2]{int}
														end if
													else
														if(cur_pitch{int} >= 0)
															note_custom_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} mod selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}]{int} + (12 * (cur_pitch{int} / selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}))
															mf.note_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} mod selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}]{int}
														else
															note_custom_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} + selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}]{int} - 12
															mf.note_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} + selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}]{int}
														end if
													end if
												end if
												note{int} := note_custom_hold{int} + (12 * oct_shifts[i{int}]{int})
												if((in_range(note{int}, instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int}, instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int}) and (velo{int} > 0)) and (last_note_ids[i{int}, note_custom_hold{int}]{int} = - 1))
													note_id[i{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
													last_note_ids[i{int}, note_custom_hold{int}]{int} := note_id[i{int}]{int}
													set_event_mark(note_id[i{int}]{int}, MARK_1{int})
													if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} = 1)
														mf.event{int} := mf_insert_event(i{int}, (((NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - transport_stamp{int}) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{int} * 2)) / mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}) * mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, note{int}, velo{int})
														mf_set_event_par(mf.event{int}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}, mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int})
													end if
													_allow_group(note_id[i{int}]{int}, i{int}, note{int})
												end if
											end if
											inc(ii{int})
										end while
									end if
								else
									if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
										if(velo{int} > 0)
											ii{int} := 48
											while(ii{int} <= 72) 
												if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
													note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
													last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
												end if
												inc(ii{int})
											end while
											iii{int} := instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - 1
											if(instrument.release_layers[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 0)
												iii{int} := instrument.release_layers[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - 1
											end if
											ii{int} := 0
											while(ii{int} <= iii{int}) 
												if(seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), abs(ii{int} - 8)]{int} # 99)
													velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), abs(ii{int} - 8)]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
													note{int} := drum_note_translation[seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), abs(ii{int} - 8)]{int} + 3]{int}
													note_id[i{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
													last_note_ids[i{int}, note{int}]{int} := note_id[i{int}]{int}
													set_event_mark(note_id[i{int}]{int}, MARK_1{int})
													if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} = 1)
														mf.event{int} := mf_insert_event(i{int}, (((NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - transport_stamp{int}) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{int} * 2)) / mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}) * mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, note{int}, velo{int})
														mf_set_event_par(mf.event{int}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}, mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int})
													end if
													_allow_group(note_id[i{int}]{int}, i{int}, note{int})
												end if
												inc(ii{int})
											end while
										end if
									end if
								end if
							end if
							if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} > 1)
								if(velo{int} > 0)
									if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 6]{int} # 0)
										note{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, repeat.i[i{int}]{int}]{int}
										inc(repeat.ii[i{int}]{int})
										if(repeat.ii[i{int}]{int} > SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 6]{int})
											repeat.ii[i{int}]{int} := 0
											inc(repeat.i[i{int}]{int})
											aa[i{int}]{int} := repeat.i[i{int}]{int}
										end if
									else
										note{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, aa[i{int}]{int}]{int}
										inc(aa[i{int}]{int})
									end if
									mf.note_hold{int} := note{int}
									note_origin{int} := note{int}
									note{int} := note{int} + (oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} * 12)
									note{int} := note{int} + SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 5]{int}
									note{int} := note{int} + (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
									if(note_id[i{int}]{int} # 0)
										note_off(note_id[i{int}]{int})
										note_id[i{int}]{int} := 0
									end if
									note_id[i{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
									set_event_mark(note_id[i{int}]{int}, MARK_1{int})
									last_note_ids[i{int}, note_origin{int}]{int} := note_id[i{int}]{int}
									if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} = 1)
										mf.event{int} := mf_insert_event(i{int}, (((NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - transport_stamp{int}) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{int} * 2)) / mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}) * mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, note{int}, velo{int})
										mf_set_event_par(mf.event{int}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}, mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int})
									end if
									_allow_group(note_id[i{int}]{int}, i{int}, note{int})
									if(repeat.i[i{int}]{int} >= play_cursor[i{int}]{int})
										repeat.i[i{int}]{int} := 0
										aa[i{int}]{int} := 0
										if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int} > 0)
											inc(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int})
											if(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} > SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int})
												oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
											end if
										end if
										if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int} < 0)
											dec(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int})
											if(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} < SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int})
												oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
											end if
										end if
									end if
								end if
							end if
							if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 1)
								ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
								while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
									if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
										note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
										last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
									end if
									inc(ii{int})
								end while
								if(velo{int} > 0)
									ii{int} := 0
									while(ii{int} <= (play_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1)) 
										note{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
										note_origin{int} := note{int}
										note{int} := note{int} + (oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} * 12)
										note{int} := note{int} + SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 5]{int}
										note{int} := note{int} + (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
										note_id[i{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, velo{int}, 0, - 1)
										last_note_ids[i{int}, note_origin{int}]{int} := note_id[i{int}]{int}
										if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} = 1)
											mf.event{int} := mf_insert_event(i{int}, (((NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - transport_stamp{int}) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{int} * 2)) / mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}) * mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, note{int}, velo{int})
											mf_set_event_par(mf.event{int}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}, mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int})
										end if
										set_event_mark(note_id[i{int}]{int}, MARK_1{int})
										_allow_group(note_id[i{int}]{int}, i{int}, note{int})
										inc(ii{int})
									end while
									if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 6]{int} # 0)
										inc(repeat.ii[i{int}]{int})
										if(repeat.ii[i{int}]{int} > SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 6]{int})
											repeat.ii[i{int}]{int} := 0
											aa[i{int}]{int} := play_cursor[i{int}]{int}
										end if
									else
										aa[i{int}]{int} := play_cursor[i{int}]{int}
									end if
									if(aa[i{int}]{int} >= play_cursor[i{int}]{int})
										aa[i{int}]{int} := 0
										repeat.i[i{int}]{int} := 0
										if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int} > 0)
											inc(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int})
											if(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} > SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int})
												oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
											end if
										end if
										if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int} < 0)
											dec(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int})
											if(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} < SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int})
												oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
											end if
										end if
									end if
								end if
							end if
						end if
						if((SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 6]{int} = 0) and (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} # 1))
							if(aa[i{int}]{int} >= play_cursor[i{int}]{int})
								aa[i{int}]{int} := 0
								if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int} > 0)
									inc(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int})
									if(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} > SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int})
										oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
									end if
								end if
								if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int} < 0)
									dec(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int})
									if(oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} < SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 4]{int})
										oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
									end if
								end if
							end if
						end if
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
							if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} # 0)
								if(((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}, 0))) > 0)
									play_sus_note(i{int})
								end if
							else
								if((int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}) mod steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) = 0)
									_act_step{int} := int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}) / steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int}
									ii{int} := 0
									while(ii{int} <= 8) 
										velo{int} := clamp([velo{int} + (seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), ii{int}]{int} * 10)], 1, 127)
										if(seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, _act_step{int}, ii{int}]{int} # 99)
											cur_pitch{int} := seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, _act_step{int}, ii{int}]{int}
											if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 1)
												note_custom_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, 0]{int} + (12 * cur_pitch{int})
											else
												if(selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} = 2)
													if(cur_pitch{int} >= 0)
														note_custom_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} mod 2]{int} + (12 * (cur_pitch{int} / 2))
													else
														note_custom_hold{int} := (play_buffer[i{int}, abs(cur_pitch{int}) mod 2]{int} - (12 * ((abs(cur_pitch{int}) - 1) / 2))) - 12
													end if
												else
													if(cur_pitch{int} >= 0)
														note_custom_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} mod selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}]{int} + (12 * (cur_pitch{int} / selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}))
													else
														note_custom_hold{int} := play_buffer[i{int}, cur_pitch{int} + selected_cursor[i{int}]{int}]{int} - 12
													end if
												end if
											end if
											note{int} := note_custom_hold{int} + (12 * oct_shifts[i{int}]{int})
											if(in_range(note{int}, instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int}, instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int}) and (velo{int} > 0))
												message("note: " & note{int})
												if(last_note_ids[i{int}, note_custom_hold{int}]{int} = - 1)
													last_note_ids[i{int}, note_custom_hold{int}]{int} := play_note(note{int}, 100, 0, - 1)
													last_custom_sus[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := note_custom_hold{int}
													sustained.active{int} := 1
													set_event_mark(last_note_ids[i{int}, note_custom_hold{int}]{int}, MARK_1{int})
													set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[i{int}, note_custom_hold{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, int(1e+06 * (real([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}, 0))]) / 127)), 1)
													_allow_group(last_note_ids[i{int}, note_custom_hold{int}]{int}, i{int}, note{int})
												end if
											end if
										else
											if(last_custom_sus[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
												if(last_note_ids[i{int}, last_custom_sus[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int} # - 1)
													note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, last_custom_sus[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int})
													last_note_ids[i{int}, last_custom_sus[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int} := - 1
													last_custom_sus[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
												end if
											end if
										end if
										inc(ii{int})
									end while
								end if
							end if
							_unfade{int} := 0
							ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
							while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
								if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
									if(((int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}, 0))) > 0)
										if(faded[i{int}]{int} = 1)
											fade_in(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}, 10000)
											_unfade{int} := 1
										end if
										set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, int(1e+06 * (real([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}, 0))]) / 127)), 1)
										mf_insert_event(i{int}, (((NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - transport_stamp{int}) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{int})) / mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}) * mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{int}, dyn_cc_num{int}, int(real([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), 0]{int}, 0))])))
									else
										fade_out(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}, 40000, 0)
										faded[i{int}]{int} := 1
									end if
								end if
								inc(ii{int})
							end while
							if(_unfade{int} = 1)
								faded[i{int}]{int} := 0
							end if
						end if
					end if
					if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 3]{int} # 0)
						inc(bar_count[i{int}]{int})
						if(bar_count[i{int}]{int} >= (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int} * SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 3]{int}))
							bar_count[i{int}]{int} := 0
							aa[i{int}]{int} := 0
							oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
							repeat.i[i{int}]{int} := 0
							repeat.ii[i{int}]{int} := 0
						end if
					end if
					if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
						if(in_range(i{int}, slot_group_offset{int}, slot_group_offset{int} + 4))
							if(in_range(int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}), current_page{int} * visible_steps[i{int}]{int}, ((current_page{int} + 1) * visible_steps[i{int}]{int}) - 1))
								step_buffer{int} := clamp((int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}) mod visible_steps[i{int}]{int}) - 1, 0, 63) + (signbit((int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}) mod visible_steps[i{int}]{int}) - 1) * (visible_steps[i{int}]{int} - 1))
								lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, step_buffer{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 0
								if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
									lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, step_buffer{int}]{int} -> picture_state := (global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(step_buffer{int}) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int} * apply_accent[i{int}]{int}) * ne(sgn(step_buffer{int} mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))
								end if
								lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, int(real(play_pos{int}) / midi_steps[i{int}]{real}) mod visible_steps[i{int}]{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 2
							else
								lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, visible_steps[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int} -> picture_state := 0
								if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
									lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, visible_steps[i{int}]{int} - 1]{int} -> picture_state := (global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(((current_page{int} + 1) * visible_steps[i{int}]{int}) - 1) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int} * apply_accent[i{int}]{int}) * ne(sgn([((current_page{int} + 1) * visible_steps[i{int}]{int}) - (1 mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2)))]))
								end if
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		inc(play_pos{int})
		if(play_pos{int} > max_play_pos{int})
			play_pos{int} := 0
			last_beat{int} := 0
		end if
		if((mnu_keyswitch{int} = 4) and (end_flag{int} = 0))
			message("ending keyswitch")
			if(play_pos{int} > 1)
				play_pos{int} := 0
				seq.active{int} := 0
				message("triggered")
				wait(int(chord.midi_step{real} * 1000))
				call stop_engine
			end if
		end if
		if(end_flag{int} = 1)
			end_flag{int} := 0
			play_pos{int} := 0
			chord.playing{int} := 0
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= 10) 
				if(current_page{int} = (i{int} / (10 / 2)))
					ii{int} := 0
					while(ii{int} <= 63) 
						if(lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, ii{int}]{int} -> picture_state # 0)
							lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, ii{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 0
							if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
								lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, ii{int}]{int} -> picture_state := (global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(ii{int}) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int} * apply_accent[i{int}]{int}) * ne(sgn(ii{int} mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))
							end if
						end if
						inc(ii{int})
					end while
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
	end if
end function

function chord.get_lowest_note(root : int, mode : unknown, voicing : number) -> result : int
	chord.lowest_note{int} := 127
	_i{int} := 0
	while(_i{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
		if(chord.types[chord_modes_tones[mode{unknown}]{int}, _i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			preview_note{int} := (((chord.playback_octave{int} + root{int}) + modes[chord_modes_scale[mode{unknown}]{int}, chord.types[chord_modes_tones[mode{unknown}]{int}, _i{int}]{int} mod 7]{int}) + ((chord.types[chord_modes_tones[mode{unknown}]{int}, _i{int}]{int} / 7) * 12)) - (bool(voicing{number}) * 12)
			if(_i{int} < voicing{int})
				preview_note{int} := preview_note{int} + 12
			end if
			chord.lowest_note{int} := min(preview_note{int}, chord.lowest_note{int})
		end if
		inc(_i{int})
	end while
	result{int} := chord.lowest_note{int}
end function

function save.preset{thread-unsafe}
	preset.usr_name{string} := txt_presetname{string} -> text
	if(saving_preset{int} = user.EDITS_TAGS{int})
		preset.usr_name{string} := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}
	end if
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka")
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"))
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]})
	preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
	preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
	user_deleted_presets[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{int} := 1
	if((preset.load_id{int} = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} # 0))
		user_preset_tags0[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}
		user_preset_tags1[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}
		user_preset_titles[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{string} := preset.usr_name{string}
		user_deleted_presets[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := 1
		user_preset_info[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{string} := get_preset_info
	else
		user_preset_tags0[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}
		user_preset_tags1[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}
		user_preset_titles[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{string} := preset.usr_name{string}
		preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int} := validate.user_preset_idx(NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} + 999)
		user_preset_numbers[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
		user_preset_info[NUM_USER_PRESETS{int}]{string} := get_preset_info
	end if
	preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{int}]{int} := PRODUCT_PRESET_VERSION{int}
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
	call save_preset
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka")
	preset.last_idx{int} := preset.idx{int}
	call update.preset_situation
	if(saving_preset{int} = user.SAVES_NEW{int})
		preset.idx{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
		call filter_presets
	end if
	save.resource_arrays
	btn_save{int} := 0
	call off_saving_preset_dialog
	message("preset.idx: " & preset.idx{int})
	browser.load_preset
end function

function array.random_element(array : [])
