	return (array[random(0, num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)]{unknown})
end function

function chord_progression.generate(template : unknown)
	declare local _element : int
	declare local _root : int
	declare local _mode : int
	declare local _bass : int
	declare local _prev_root : int := - 1
	declare local _prev_mode : int := - 1
	declare local _new_scale : int := - 1
	declare local _lowest_note : int
	declare local _prev_lowest_note : int
	declare local _least_distance : int
	declare local _closest_voicing : int
	_closest_voicing{int} := 0
	_prev_lowest_note{int} := ((mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, 0]{int}) mod 12) + chord.playback_octave{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (16 - 1)) 
		if(possible_chord_structures[template{unknown}, i{int}]{int} = -1)
			_root{int} := - 1
			_mode{int} := 0
		else
			if(possible_chord_structures[template{unknown}, i{int}]{int} = 3)
				_root{int} := (mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, 0]{int}) mod 12
				_mode{int} := search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(0 + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}]
			else
				if(possible_chord_structures[template{unknown}, i{int}]{int} = 0)
					_element{int} := array.random_element(chord_generator.tonics{int[]})
					_root{int} := (mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, _element{int}]{int}) mod 12
					_mode{int} := search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(_element{int} + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}]
				else
					if(possible_chord_structures[template{unknown}, i{int}]{int} = 1)
						_element{int} := array.random_element(chord_generator.subdominants{int[]})
						_root{int} := (mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, _element{int}]{int}) mod 12
						_mode{int} := search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(_element{int} + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}]
					else
						if(possible_chord_structures[template{unknown}, i{int}]{int} = 2)
							_element{int} := array.random_element(chord_generator.dominants{int[]})
							_root{int} := (mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, _element{int}]{int}) mod 12
							_mode{int} := search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(_element{int} + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}]
						end if
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if((_mode{int} = 2) and (_root{int} # ((mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, 0]{int}) mod 12)))
			i{int} := i{int} - 1
			continue
		end if
		if((_root{int} # - 1) and (_mode{int} # - 1))
			_least_distance{int} := 127
			_lowest_note{int} := 127
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= 3) 
				_lowest_note{int} := chord.get_lowest_note(_root{int}, _mode{int}, ii{int})
				if(abs(_lowest_note{int} - _prev_lowest_note{int}) < _least_distance{int})
					_least_distance{int} := abs(_lowest_note{int} - _prev_lowest_note{int})
					_closest_voicing{int} := ii{int}
				end if
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
		end if
		if(((_root{int} # _prev_root{int}) or (_mode{int} # _prev_mode{int})) or (_root{int} = - 1))
			_bass{int} := - 1
			if(_closest_voicing{int} # 0)
				_bass{int} := _root{int}
			end if
			set_chord(i{int} + (active_chord_set{int} * 16), _root{int}, _mode{int}, _bass{int}, _closest_voicing{int}, 0)
			_prev_root{int} := _root{int}
			_prev_mode{int} := _mode{int}
			if((_root{int} # - 1) and (_mode{int} # - 1))
				_prev_lowest_note{int} := chord.get_lowest_note(_root{int}, _mode{int}, _closest_voicing{int})
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	call update_chord_slots
end function

function set_default_timeline
	chord_set_num{int} := 1
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_dynamic_positions{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_dynamic_positions[i{int}]{int} := 100
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (128 - 1)) 
		chords[i{int}, 0]{int} := - 1
		chords[i{int}, 1]{int} := - 1
		chords[i{int}, 3]{int} := - 1
		chords[i{int}, 4]{int} := - 1
		chords[i{int}, 2]{int} := - 1
		chords[i{int}, 5]{int} := - 1
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 7) 
		timeline_keyswitches[0, i{int}]{int} := - 1
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	set_chord(0, 0, 1, - 1, 0, 0)
	set_chord(2, 7, 1, 10, 0, 0)
	set_chord(4, 8, 0, - 1, 2, 0)
	set_chord(6, 5, 5, - 1, 0, 0)
	set_chord(8, 0, 1, - 1, 0, 0)
	set_chord(10, 7, 1, 10, 0, 0)
	set_chord(12, 5, 13, - 1, 0, 0)
	set_chord(14, 5, 1, - 1, 0, 0)
end function

function dynamics.update
	declare local _difference : int
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (16 + 1)) 
		sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_dynamics_unselected"
		sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_show_dynamics{int}]{int}
		btn_clear_dynamics{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_show_dynamics{int}]{int}
		mnu_line_mode{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_show_dynamics{int}]{int}
		sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int} -> value := dynamic_positions[active_chord_set{int}, i{int} - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int}
		if((i{int} > 0) and (i{int} # ((16 / 2) + 1)))
			_difference{int} := sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int} -> value - sli_dynamic_handle[i{int} - 1]{int} -> value
			sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} -> picture := line_pictures[0, 0]{string}
			sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} -> y := ((301 + 15) + ((((i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))) / (16 / 2)) * 70)) + (41 - int(scale.range(real(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int}]{int} -> value), 0, 127, 0, real(41))))
			if(_difference{int} > 0)
				sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} -> picture := line_pictures[line_mode[active_chord_set{int}, (i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int}, 0]{string}
			else
				if(_difference{int} < 0)
					sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} -> picture := line_pictures[line_mode[active_chord_set{int}, (i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int}, 1]{string}
					sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} -> y := ((301 + 15) + ((((i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))) / (16 / 2)) * 70)) + (41 - int(scale.range(real(sli_dynamic_handle[i{int} - 1]{int} -> value), 0, 127, 0, real(41))))
				end if
			end if
			sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} -> value := abs(_difference{int})
			sli_line[(i{int} - 1) - (i{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_show_dynamics{int}]{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if((last_touched_handle{int} # - 1) and (btn_show_dynamics{int} = 1))
		sli_dynamic_handle[last_touched_handle{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_dynamics_selected"
		if(last_touched_handle{int} < 17)
			mnu_line_mode{int} -> value := line_mode[active_chord_set{int}, last_touched_handle{int} - (last_touched_handle{int} / ((16 / 2) + 1))]{int}
		end if
	end if
end function

function set_chord_playback_volume
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME{int}, sli_chords_preview_vol{int} -> value, - 1, - 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + 15)
end function

function chord.update_active_slot(pointer : int)
	active_chord_set{int} := min(pointer{int} / 16, [chord_set_num{int} - 1])
	lbl_chord_set_page{int} -> text := (active_chord_set{int} + 1) & "/" & chord_set_num{int}
end function

function ui.update_skip_prev_buttons
	btn_prev_chord_set{int} -> picture := btn_prev_chord_set_picture{string}
	if(active_chord_set{int} <= 0)
		btn_prev_chord_set{int} -> picture := btn_prev_chord_set_picture{string} & "_disabled"
	end if
	btn_next_chord_set{int} -> picture := btn_next_chord_set_picture{string}
	if((active_chord_set{int} + 1) = chord_set_num{int})
		btn_next_chord_set{int} -> picture := btn_next_chord_set_picture{string} & "_disabled"
	end if
end function

function is_user_preset_save
	return (saving_preset{int} * preset.allow_user{int})
end function

function update_jam_slots
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_jam_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(jams[i{int}, 0]{int} # - 1)
			if((jams[i{int}, 2]{int} # - 1) and (jams[i{int}, 2]{int} # jams[i{int}, 0]{int}))
				btn_jam_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := root_names[jams[i{int}, 0]{int}]{string} & chord_type_string[jams[i{int}, 4]{int}]{string} & "/" & root_names[jams[i{int}, 2]{int}]{string}
			else
				btn_jam_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := root_names[jams[i{int}, 0]{int}]{string} & chord_type_string[jams[i{int}, 4]{int}]{string}
			end if
		else
			btn_jam_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := "-"
		end if
		if(i{int} = active_jam_slot{int})
			btn_jam_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		else
			btn_jam_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function update_chord_slots
	declare local _acc : int
	if(chord.meter{int} # mnu_signature{int})
		chord.meter{int} := mnu_signature{int}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (16 - 1)) 
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> x := (38 + ((78 * 2) * ((i{int} / 2) mod 4))) + int((real(i{int} mod 2) * (real(78 * 2) / real(eights_per_bar[chord.meter{int}]{int}))) * real(meters.2nd_chord_position[chord.meter{int}]{int} - 1))
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> width := int(((real((i{int} + 1) mod 2) * (real(78 * 2) / real(eights_per_bar[chord.meter{int}]{int}))) * real(meters.2nd_chord_position[chord.meter{int}]{int} - 1)) + ((real(i{int} mod 2) * (real(78 * 2) / real(eights_per_bar[chord.meter{int}]{int}))) * real(eights_per_bar[chord.meter{int}]{int} - (meters.2nd_chord_position[chord.meter{int}]{int} - 1))))
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_bar_separator{int[]}] - 1)) 
			set_bounds(lbl_bar_separator[i{int}]{int}, btn_chord_slot[(i{int} + 1) + ge(i{int}, 7)]{int} -> x - 2, btn_chord_slot[(i{int} + 1) + ge(i{int}, 7)]{int} -> y - 15, 0, (41 - 1) + 15)
			if(((i{int} + ge(i{int}, 7)) mod 2) = 0)
				lbl_bar_separator[i{int}]{int} -> pos_y := lbl_bar_separator[i{int}]{int} -> pos_y + 15
				lbl_bar_separator[i{int}]{int} -> height := lbl_bar_separator[i{int}]{int} -> height - 15
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
	chord_set_offset{int} := active_chord_set{int} * 16
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_chord_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 0]{int} # - 1)
			if((chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 2]{int} # - 1) and (chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 2]{int} # chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 0]{int}))
				_acc{int} := get_chord_accidental(chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 0]{int}, chord_modes_scale[chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 4]{int}]{int})
				btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := root_names[chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 0]{int}]{string} & chord_type_string[chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 4]{int}]{string} & "/" & root_notes[_acc{int}, chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 2]{int}]{string}
			else
				btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := root_names[chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 0]{int}]{string} & chord_type_string[chords[chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}, 4]{int}]{string}
			end if
		else
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := "-"
		end if
		if((chord_set_offset{int} + i{int}) = active_chord_slot{int})
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		else
			btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 7) 
		mnu_timeline_keyswitch[i{int}]{int} -> value := timeline_keyswitches[active_chord_set{int}, i{int}]{int} + 1
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function update.btn_active_status
	if(preset.idx{int} # - 1)
		btn_presetBrowser{int} -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}
		btn_current_favorite{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_current_favorite{int} -> value := favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{int}]{int}
		lbl_preset_infotext{int} -> text := preset_info[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}
	end if
	btn_clear_tags{int} -> picture := btn_clear_pics[floatmask.is_empty(bit_list{int[]})]{string}
	floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[preset.idx{int}]{int}, preset_tags1[preset.idx{int}]{int})
	btn_edit_tags{int} -> picture := btn_edit_pics[abs(is_user_preset(presetmask{int[]}) - 1)]{string}
	btn_delete_preset{int} -> picture := btn_delete_pics[abs(is_user_preset(presetmask{int[]}) - 1)]{string}
	saving_disabled{int} := abs(is_user_preset(presetmask{int[]}) - 1)
	tag_button_array[33 - 1]{int} -> picture := btn_favorite_pics[0]{string}
	if((search[final_favorite_presets_array{int[]}, 1] = - 1) and (floatmask.get(bit_list{int[]}, 33 - 1) = 0))
		tag_button_array[33 - 1]{int} -> picture := btn_favorite_pics[1]{string}
	end if
end function

function chord.get_current_jam
	if(active_jam_slot{int} # - 1)
		if(jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 0]{int} # - 1)
			active_root{int} := jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 0]{int}
			active_chord_type{int} := jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 4]{int}
			active_bass_note{int} := jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 2]{int}
		end if
		select_btn_voicing(max(0, jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 5]{int}))
	end if
end function

function chord.get_current_chord
	if(active_chord_slot{int} # - 1)
		active_root{int} := chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 0]{int}
		active_chord_type{int} := chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 4]{int}
		active_bass_note{int} := chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 2]{int}
	end if
	select_btn_voicing(max(0, chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 5]{int}))
end function

function chord.set_current_jam
	if(active_jam_slot{int} # - 1)
		jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 0]{int} := active_root{int}
		jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 4]{int} := active_chord_type{int}
		jams[active_jam_slot{int}, 2]{int} := active_bass_note{int}
	end if
end function

function chord.set_current_chord
	if(active_chord_slot{int} # - 1)
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 0]{int} := active_root{int}
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[active_chord_type{int}]{int}
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 4]{int} := active_chord_type{int}
		chords[active_chord_slot{int}, 2]{int} := active_bass_note{int}
	end if
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
end function

function remote_jam_slot_button
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_jam_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		btn_jam_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function remote_chord_slot_button
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_chord_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		btn_chord_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function get_preset_info
	return ("")
end function

function chord.save_history
	history_array[0, history_pointers[0]{int}]{int} := 1
	history_array[0, (history_pointers[0]{int} + 1) mod 10]{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (128 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (6 - 1)) 
			chords_history[history_pointers[0]{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := chords[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		chords.octaves_history[history_pointers[0]{int}, i{int}]{int} := chords.octaves[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
			timeline_keyswitches_history[history_pointers[0]{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := timeline_keyswitches[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	history_pointers[0]{int} := (history_pointers[0]{int} + 1) mod 10
	call ui.update_undo_redo_buttons
end function

function select_btn_voicing(idx : unknown)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_voicing{int[]}] - 1)) 
		btn_voicing[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		btn_voicing_states[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	btn_voicing[idx{unknown}]{int} -> value := 1
	btn_voicing_states[idx{unknown}]{int} := 1
end function

function update_chord_info_label
	declare local _acc : int
	lbl_chord_info{int} -> text := ""
	if(active_root{int} # - 1)
		if((active_bass_note{int} # - 1) and (active_bass_note{int} # active_root{int}))
			_acc{int} := get_chord_accidental(active_root{int}, chord_modes_scale[active_chord_type{int}]{int})
			lbl_chord_info{int} -> text := root_names[active_root{int}]{string} & chord_type_string[active_chord_type{int}]{string} & "/" & root_notes[_acc{int}, active_bass_note{int}]{string}
		else
			lbl_chord_info{int} -> text := root_names[active_root{int}]{string} & chord_type_string[active_chord_type{int}]{string}
		end if
	end if
end function

function update_type_buttons
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_chord_type{int[]}] - 1)) 
		btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		if((i{int} + chord_type_group_offset{int}) < num_elements[chord_type_names{string[]}])
			if((i{int} + chord_type_group_offset{int}) = search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}])
				btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
			end if
			btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int} -> text := chord_type_names[chord_type_order[i{int} + chord_type_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
		else
			btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function remote_chord_type_buttons(exclude : int)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_chord_type{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # exclude{int})
			btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		else
			btn_chord_type[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function ui.update_undo_redo_buttons
	btn_chord_undo{int} -> picture := btn_chord_undo_picture{string} & "_disabled"
	btn_chord_redo{int} -> picture := btn_chord_redo_picture{string} & "_disabled"
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		if(history_array[0, ((history_pointers[0]{int} + 1) + 10) mod 10]{int} = 1)
			btn_chord_redo{int} -> picture := btn_chord_redo_picture{string}
		end if
		if(history_array[0, ((history_pointers[0]{int} - 1) + 10) mod 10]{int} = 1)
			btn_chord_undo{int} -> picture := btn_chord_undo_picture{string}
		end if
	else
		if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1)
			if(history_array[1, ((history_pointers[1]{int} + 1) + 10) mod 10]{int} = 1)
				btn_chord_redo{int} -> picture := btn_chord_redo_picture{string}
			end if
			if(history_array[1, ((history_pointers[1]{int} - 1) + 10) mod 10]{int} = 1)
				btn_chord_undo{int} -> picture := btn_chord_undo_picture{string}
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function ui.update_slot_display
	anim.mw_fingertouch{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_chord_page_enter{int})]{int}
	anim.mw_fade{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_chord_page_enter{int})]{int}
	anim.mw_lightstrip{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_chord_page_enter{int})]{int}
	lbl_mw_bg{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_chord_page_enter{int})]{int}
	lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_chord_page_enter{int})]{int}
	panel.chord_timeline{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_chord_timeline_view{int}]{int}
	panel.chord_jam{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_chord_jam_view{int}]{int}
	btn_chord_copy{int} -> picture := btn_chord_copy_picture{string}
	btn_chord_paste{int} -> picture := btn_chord_paste_picture{string}
	call ui.update_undo_redo_buttons
	if(btn_chord_timeline_view{int} = 1)
		call update_chord_slots
		call ui.update_minus_button
	else
		if(btn_chord_jam_view{int} = 1)
			btn_chord_copy{int} -> picture := btn_chord_copy_picture{string} & "_disabled"
			btn_chord_paste{int} -> picture := btn_chord_paste_picture{string} & "_disabled"
			call update_jam_slots
		end if
	end if
	call ui.update_skip_prev_buttons
	call ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
	panel.chord_roots{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_chord_chromatic_selection{int}]{int}
	panel.chord_scales{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_chord_scale_selection{int}]{int}
	if(btn_chord_scale_selection{int} = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 6) 
			btn_scale[i{int}]{int} -> text := root_names[(mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, i{int}]{int}) mod 12]{string} & chord_type_string[search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(i{int} + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}]]{string}
			if(search[chord_modes_scale{int[]}, mode_triad_positions[(i{int} + octified_root_note_nums[mode_positions[mnu_scale_mode{int}]{int}]{int}) mod 7]{int}] = 2)
				btn_scale[i{int}]{int} -> text := root_names[(mnu_scale_root{int} + modes[mnu_scale_mode{int}, i{int}]{int}) mod 12]{string} & "="
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
end function

function history.pull_value(history : [], value : unknown)
	value{unknown} := history[play.history.pointer{int}]{unknown}
end function

function history.pull_array(history : [], array : [])
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)) 
		array[i{int}]{unknown} := history[(num_elements[array{[]}] * play.history.pointer{int}) + i{int}]{unknown}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function history.put_value(history : [], value : unknown)
	history[play.history.pointer{int}]{unknown} := value{unknown}
end function

function paste_bar(ks : unknown, s : unknown)
	declare local start_idx : int := current_page{int} * visible_steps[s{unknown}]{int}
	declare local stop_idx : int := ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[s{unknown}]{int}) + visible_steps[s{unknown}]{int}) - 1
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (visible_steps[s{unknown}]{int} - 1)) 
		seq.velo_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, start_idx{int} + i{int}, 0]{int} := arp_data.bar_copy[i{int} * 2]{int}
		seq.velo_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, start_idx{int} + i{int}, 1]{int} := arp_data.bar_copy[(i{int} * 2) + 1]{int}
		message("Paste from buffer slot: " & i{int} & " into seq slot: " & (start_idx{int} + i{int}))
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 8) 
			seq.pitch_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, start_idx{int} + i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := arp_data.bar_copy[(512 + (i{int} * 9)) + ii{int}]{int}
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, start_idx{int} + i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := arp_data.bar_copy[((512 + (9 * 256)) + (i{int} * 9)) + ii{int}]{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function kill_preview
	fade_out(preview_id[preview_counter{int}]{int}, 400000, 1)
end function

function stop_engine
	message("executed stop engine")
	call remote_jam_slot_button
	active_jam_slot{int} := - 1
	seq.active{int} := 0
	chord.playing{int} := 0
	chord.playing_preview{int} := 0
	chord.ended{int} := 0
	cursor{int} := 0
	array.clear(note_buffer{int[]})
	chord_playback.iterator{int} := 0
	chord.play_pos{int} := 0
	play_pos{int} := 0
	last_beat{int} := 0
	lbl_chord_play_indicator{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	chord.slot_playing{int} := 0
	call sort_buffer
	call release_all_notes
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		bar_count[i{int}]{int} := 0
		oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
		aa[i{int}]{int} := 0
		repeat.i[i{int}]{int} := 0
		repeat.ii[i{int}]{int} := 0
		if(current_page{int} = (i{int} / (10 / 2)))
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= 63) 
				if(lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, ii{int}]{int} -> picture_state # 0)
					lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, ii{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 0
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 1)
						lbl_velo_scaled[i{int} mod 5, ii{int}]{int} -> picture_state := (global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, int(round(real(ii{int}) / (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))]{int} * apply_accent[i{int}]{int}) * ne(sgn(ii{int} mod (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{int} / (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2))))
					end if
				end if
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	chord_playback.dynamics_callback_filter{int} := 0
end function

function copy_bar(ks : unknown, s : unknown)
	declare local start_idx : int := current_page{int} * visible_steps[s{unknown}]{int}
	declare local stop_idx : int := ((current_page{int} * visible_steps[s{unknown}]{int}) + visible_steps[s{unknown}]{int}) - 1
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (visible_steps[s{unknown}]{int} - 1)) 
		arp_data.bar_copy[i{int} * 2]{int} := seq.velo_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, start_idx{int} + i{int}, 0]{int}
		arp_data.bar_copy[(i{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := seq.velo_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, start_idx{int} + i{int}, 1]{int}
		message("Copy from step: " & (start_idx{int} + i{int}) & " into buffer slot: " & i{int})
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 8) 
			arp_data.bar_copy[(512 + (i{int} * 9)) + ii{int}]{int} := seq.pitch_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, start_idx{int} + i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
			arp_data.bar_copy[((512 + (9 * 256)) + (i{int} * 9)) + ii{int}]{int} := seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, start_idx{int} + i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function paste_arp(ks : unknown, s : unknown)
	if(arp_data.copy[(512 + ((9 * 256) * 2)) + 8]{int} = instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{int}]{int})
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 255) 
			seq.velo_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}, 0]{int} := arp_data.copy[i{int} * 2]{int}
			seq.velo_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}, 1]{int} := arp_data.copy[(i{int} * 2) + 1]{int}
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= 8) 
				seq.pitch_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := arp_data.copy[(512 + (i{int} * 9)) + ii{int}]{int}
				seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := arp_data.copy[((512 + (9 * 256)) + (i{int} * 9)) + ii{int}]{int}
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 6) 
			SEQ_PARAMETERS[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}]{int} := arp_data.copy[(512 + ((9 * 256) * 2)) + i{int}]{int}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int} := arp_data.copy[(512 + ((9 * 256) * 2)) + 7]{int}
	end if
end function

function load_keyswitch(id : int)
	mnu_keyswitch{int} := id{int}
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> picture_state := (mnu_keyswitch{int} * 2) + btn_keyswitches_show{int}
	call reset_oct_and_repeat_cursor
	if(id{int} < 4)
		current_keyswitch{int} := id{int}
		call ui.update_seq_display
		call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
		call ui.update_seq_params
		call update_key_colors
		call tempo.update
	else
		end_flag{int} := 1
	end if
	if(seq.active{int} = 1)
		play.history.create_new_undo_flag{int} := 1
	else
		call undo.flush
	end if
end function

function reset_oct_and_repeat_cursor
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		oct_cursor[i{int}]{int} := 0
		repeat.i[i{int}]{int} := 0
		repeat.ii[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function apply_acc_to_vel(slot : unknown, iter : int, idx : unknown, offset : int) -> result : int
	if(((iter{int} * 8) mod steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, slot{unknown}, 1]{int}]{int}) = 0)
		select(global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, (iter{int} * 8) / steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, slot{unknown}, 1]{int}]{int}]{int})
		case 0
			result{int} := clamp(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot{unknown}, iter{int}, idx{unknown}]{int}, 0, 65) - offset{int}
		case 1
			result{int} := clamp(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot{unknown}, iter{int}, idx{unknown}]{int}, 65, 95) - offset{int}
		case 2
			result{int} := clamp(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot{unknown}, iter{int}, idx{unknown}]{int}, 95, 127) - offset{int}
		end select
	else
		result{int} := clamp(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot{unknown}, iter{int}, idx{unknown}]{int}, 0, 65) - offset{int}
	end if
end function

function add_global_accent_preset(id : int, name : any, filter : int, v0 : int, v1 : int, v2 : int, v3 : int, v4 : int, v5 : int, v6 : int, v7 : int, v8 : int, v9 : int, v10 : int, v11 : int, v12 : int, v13 : int, v14 : int, v15 : int, v16 : int, v17 : int, v18 : int, v19 : int, v20 : int, v21 : int, v22 : int, v23 : int, v24 : int, v25 : int, v26 : int, v27 : int, v28 : int, v29 : int, v30 : int, v31 : int)
	add_menu_item(mnu_global_accent_meter{int}, name{any}, id{int})
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 0]{int} := v0{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 1]{int} := v1{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 2]{int} := v2{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 3]{int} := v3{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 4]{int} := v4{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 5]{int} := v5{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 6]{int} := v6{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 7]{int} := v7{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 8]{int} := v8{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 9]{int} := v9{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 10]{int} := v10{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 11]{int} := v11{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 12]{int} := v12{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 13]{int} := v13{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 14]{int} := v14{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 15]{int} := v15{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 16]{int} := v16{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 17]{int} := v17{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 18]{int} := v18{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 19]{int} := v19{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 20]{int} := v20{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 21]{int} := v21{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 22]{int} := v22{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 23]{int} := v23{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 24]{int} := v24{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 25]{int} := v25{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 26]{int} := v26{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 27]{int} := v27{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 28]{int} := v28{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 29]{int} := v29{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 30]{int} := v30{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 31]{int} := v31{int}
	global_accent_preset[id{int}, 32]{int} := filter{int}
end function

function arp.reset
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[seq.pitch_data{int[][][][]}, 4] - 1)) 
			seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 99
			seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := 0
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[seq.velo_data{int[][][][]}, 3] - 1)) 
		seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} := 1
		seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 1]{int} := 127
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call undo.create
end function

function global_accents.update
	declare local _shown_bars : int
	declare local _inc : int := 0
	panel.play.global_accents{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_use_global_accents{int}]{int}
	_shown_bars{int} := length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int} / num_pages{int}
	declare local _shown_steps : int := (eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * _shown_bars{int}) * 2
	mnu_global_accent_meter{int} := global_accent_meter_preset[current_keyswitch{int}]{int}
	if(mnu_global_accent_meter{int} # 99)
		if(global_accent_preset[mnu_global_accent_meter{int}, 32]{int} # mnu_signature{int})
			mnu_global_accent_meter{int} := 99
			global_accent_meter_preset[current_keyswitch{int}]{int} := 99
		end if
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (32 - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mnu_global_accent_meter{int}), i{int} + 1, 0)
		if(global_accent_preset[i{int}, 32]{int} = mnu_signature{int})
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mnu_global_accent_meter{int}), i{int} + 1, 1)
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (2 * 4)) 
		lbl_global_accent_barline[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((2 * 16) - 1)) 
		btn_global_accent[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_global_accent_bg[i{int} / 2]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (_shown_steps{int} - 1)) 
			btn_global_accent[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			btn_global_accent[i{int}]{int} -> x := 245 + int(round((real(i{int}) * (real(570) / real(_shown_steps{int}))) + (((real(570) / real(_shown_steps{int})) - 20) / 2)))
			btn_global_accent[i{int}]{int} -> picture := global_accent_pictures[global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int} + (((current_page{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) * _shown_bars{int})]{int}]{string}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (_shown_steps{int} - 1)) 
		if((i{int} mod 2) = 0)
			lbl_global_accent_bg[i{int} / 2]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_global_accent_bg[i{int} / 2]{int} -> x := (245 + int(round((real(i{int}) * (real(570) / real(_shown_steps{int}))) + (real(570) / real(_shown_steps{int}))))) - (btn_global_accent[i{int} + 1]{int} -> x - btn_global_accent[i{int}]{int} -> x)
			lbl_global_accent_bg[i{int} / 2]{int} -> width := btn_global_accent[i{int} + 1]{int} -> x - btn_global_accent[i{int}]{int} -> x
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	_inc{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (_shown_bars{int} - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) 
			if(barline_behavior[mnu_signature{int}, ii{int}]{int} > 0)
				lbl_global_accent_barline[_inc{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				lbl_global_accent_barline[_inc{int}]{int} -> picture := "lbl_line_vertical_0.25"
				lbl_global_accent_barline[_inc{int}]{int} -> x := 245 + int(round((real(i{int}) * (real(570) / real(_shown_bars{int}))) + (real(ii{int}) * ((real(570) / real(_shown_bars{int})) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int})))))
				if(barline_behavior[mnu_signature{int}, ii{int}]{int} = 2)
					lbl_global_accent_barline[_inc{int}]{int} -> picture := "lbl_line_vertical"
				end if
				inc(_inc{int})
			end if
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
		btn_apply_accent[i{int}]{int} -> value := apply_accent[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}
		btn_apply_accent[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} # 0) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} # 3))
				apply_accent[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} := 0
				btn_apply_accent[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			end if
		else
			apply_accent[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} := 0
			btn_apply_accent[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (_shown_steps{int} - 1)) 
			lbl_velo_scaled[i{int}, int(round(real([ii{int} + (((current_page{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) * _shown_bars{int})]) * (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2)))) mod visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 0
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(btn_use_global_accents{int} = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
			if(apply_accent[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} = 1)
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (_shown_steps{int} - 1)) 
					if((global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, ii{int} + (((current_page{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) * _shown_bars{int})]{int} # 0) and ((_shown_steps{int} <= steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) or (ne(sgn([(ii{int} + (((current_page{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) * _shown_bars{int})) mod ((eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2) / steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, 1]{int}]{int})])) = 1)))
						lbl_velo_scaled[i{int}, int(round(real([ii{int} + (((current_page{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) * _shown_bars{int})]) * (real(steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, 1]{int}]{int}) / real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * 2)))) mod visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} -> picture_state := global_accents[current_keyswitch{int}, ii{int} + (((current_page{int} * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) * 2) * _shown_bars{int})]{int}
					end if
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
end function

function update_page_buttons
	btn_pages[5]{int} -> text := current_page{int} + 1
	s{int} := 0
	while(s{int} <= (6 - 1)) 
		btn_pages[s{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		if(s{int} < length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int})
			_i{int} := 0
			while(_i{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
				set_control_par(btn_pages[s{int}]{int}, font.types[_i{int}]{int}, fonts.regular_white[_i{int}]{int})
				inc(_i{int})
			end while
			btn_pages[s{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_text_underline"
		else
			if(s{int} < 4)
				_i{int} := 0
				while(_i{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
					set_control_par(btn_pages[s{int}]{int}, font.types[_i{int}]{int}, fonts.regular_white[6]{int})
					inc(_i{int})
				end while
				btn_pages[s{int}]{int} -> picture := "alpha"
				if(seq.view_mode{int} = 1)
					btn_pages[s{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				end if
			else
				_i{int} := 0
				while(_i{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
					set_control_par(btn_pages[s{int}]{int}, font.types[_i{int}]{int}, fonts.regular_white[0]{int})
					inc(_i{int})
				end while
				btn_pages[s{int}]{int} -> picture := "alpha"
				if(seq.view_mode{int} = 1)
					btn_pages[s{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(s{int})
	end while
	btn_pages[current_page{int}]{int} -> value := 1
end function

function ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
	declare local i : int
	declare local ii : int
	declare local is_inverted : int
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
		if((btn_midi_mode{int} = 0) or (current_controller_channel{int} = (i{int} + slot_group_offset{int})))
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_velo_scaled{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
				is_inverted{int} := ne(signbit(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, ii{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}), 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, ii{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}), 0]{int}))
				lbl_velo_scaled[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> y := lbl_rhythm[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> y + int(real(lbl_rhythm[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> height) * (real(abs(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int} - (is_inverted{int} * 127))) / 128))
				lbl_velo_scaled[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> height := ((140 + (int(round(real(59) * 2.5)) * seq.view_mode{int})) + ((59 + ((59 + 4) * i{int})) * ne(seq.view_mode{int}))) - lbl_velo_scaled[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> y
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function ui.update_sequencer_slot(slot_idx_page : unknown, slot_idx_global : unknown, slot_height : int, position_y : int)
	_visible_steps{int} := visible_steps[slot_idx_global{unknown}]{int}
	if((slot.loaded_sound[slot_idx_global{unknown}]{int} = - 1) or (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, slot_idx_global{unknown}, 0]{int} = 14))
		_visible_steps{int} := 16
		xy_velo{real[]} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	end if
	lbl_seq_bg[slot_idx_page{unknown}]{int} -> pos_x := 245
	lbl_seq_bg[slot_idx_page{unknown}]{int} -> width := 570
	lbl_seq_bg[slot_idx_page{unknown}]{int} -> pos_y := 140 + position_y{int}
	lbl_seq_bg[slot_idx_page{unknown}]{int} -> height := slot_height{int}
	lbl_seq_bg[slot_idx_page{unknown}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_rhythm{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
		lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> picture := "lbl_rhythm_range" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[slot_idx_global{unknown}]{int}]{string}
		lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> height := int(round(real(slot_height{int}) * (abs(real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot_idx_global{unknown}, ii{int} + (current_page{int} * _visible_steps{int}), 1]{int}) - real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot_idx_global{unknown}, ii{int} + (current_page{int} * _visible_steps{int}), 0]{int})) / 127)))
		lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_y := ((140 + slot_height{int}) - int(real(slot_height{int}) * (real(min(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot_idx_global{unknown}, ii{int} + (current_page{int} * _visible_steps{int}), 0]{int}, seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot_idx_global{unknown}, ii{int} + (current_page{int} * _visible_steps{int}), 1]{int})) / 127))) - lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> height
		lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_y := lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_y + position_y{int}
		lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> picture_state := ge(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot_idx_global{unknown}, ii{int} + (current_page{int} * _visible_steps{int}), 0]{int}, seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, slot_idx_global{unknown}, ii{int} + (current_page{int} * _visible_steps{int}), 1]{int})
		if((slot.loaded_sound[slot_idx_global{unknown}]{int} = - 1) or (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, slot_idx_global{unknown}, 0]{int} = 14))
			lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> picture := "lbl_rhythm_range" & slot_colors.suffixes[0]{string}
			lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> height := slot_height{int}
			lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_y := 140
			lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_y := lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_y + position_y{int}
			lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 0
		end if
		lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> width := int(round((real(570) / real(_visible_steps{int})) * real(ii{int} + 1))) - int(round((real(570) / real(_visible_steps{int})) * real(ii{int})))
		lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_x := 245 + int(round((real(570) / real(_visible_steps{int})) * real(ii{int})))
		if(ii{int} >= _visible_steps{int})
			lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		inc(ii{int})
	end while
	ii{int} := 0
	while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_velo_scaled{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
		set_bounds(lbl_velo_scaled[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int}, lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_x, lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_y, lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> width, 2)
		lbl_velo_scaled[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := lbl_rhythm[slot_idx_page{unknown}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide
		inc(ii{int})
	end while
end function

function ui.update_sequencer_matrix_names
	if(((seq_matrix.last_d1{int} # - 1) and (seq_matrix.last_d2{int} # - 1)) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3))
		lbl_seq_matrix_full_name{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_seq_matrix_full_name{int} -> text := search[drum_content_ids{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}], abs(seq_matrix.last_d2{int} - 8)
	else
		lbl_seq_matrix_full_name{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
		lbl_seq_matrix_names[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		if(((abs(i{int} - 8) < _num_drum_insts{int}) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1))
			lbl_seq_matrix_names[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
				if(search[drum_content_ids{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}] # - 1)
					lbl_seq_matrix_names[i{int}]{int} -> text := search[drum_content_ids{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}], abs(i{int} - 8)
				end if
			else
				lbl_seq_matrix_names[i{int}]{int} -> text := (i{int} - 5) * - 1
			end if
		end if
		if(not (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0) and (seq.view_mode{int} = 1))
			lbl_seq_matrix_names[i{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
		else
			lbl_seq_matrix_names[i{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function ui.update_sequencer_matrix
	_visible_steps{int} := visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
		_visible_steps{int} := (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}) / num_pages{int}
	end if
	if(((slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} = - 1) or (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 14)) or ((SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} # 0) and (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)))
		_visible_steps{int} := 16
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 1] - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
			lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			if(i{int} < _visible_steps{int})
				lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_play_led_0_g0"
				lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_x := ((lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, i{int}]{int} -> pos_x + (lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, i{int}]{int} -> width / 2)) - (lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> width / 2)) - 1
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> pos_x := 245 + (int(round(real(570) / real(_visible_steps{int}))) * i{int})
				end if
				if(((abs(ii{int} - 8) < _num_drum_insts{int}) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1))
					lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_play_led_0" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
					if(seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int} + (current_page{int} * _visible_steps{int}), ii{int}]{int} # 0)
						lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_play_led_" & seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int} + (current_page{int} * _visible_steps{int}), ii{int}]{int} & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(not (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0) and (seq.view_mode{int} = 1))
				lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_play_led_0_g0"
			end if
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function update_num_drum_insts
	_num_drum_insts{int} := 9
	if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
		_num_drum_insts{int} := instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
		if(instrument.release_layers[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 0)
			_num_drum_insts{int} := instrument.release_layers[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
		end if
	end if
end function

function matrix.get_nearest_active_button(D1 : unknown, D2 : int) -> result : int
	declare local top : int
	declare local bottom : int
	top{int} := - 1
	bottom{int} := - 1
	if(D2{int} > 0)
		i{int} := D2{int} - 1
		while(i{int} >= 0) 
			if(lbl_seq_matrix[D1{unknown}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
				if(top{int} = - 1)
					top{int} := abs(i{int} - D2{int})
				end if
			end if
			dec(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := D2{int} + 1
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
			if(lbl_seq_matrix[D1{unknown}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
				if(bottom{int} = - 1)
					bottom{int} := abs(i{int} - D2{int})
				end if
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		if(top{int} < bottom{int})
			result{int} := D2{int} - top{int}
		else
			if(top{int} > bottom{int})
				result{int} := D2{int} + bottom{int}
			else
				if(top{int} = bottom{int})
					result{int} := D2{int} - top{int}
				end if
			end if
		end if
	else
		i{int} := D2{int} + 1
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
			if(lbl_seq_matrix[D1{unknown}, i{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
				if(bottom{int} = - 1)
					bottom{int} := i{int}
					result{int} := D2{int} + bottom{int}
				end if
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
end function

function redo.load
	play.history.pointer{int} := (play.history.pointer{int} + 1) mod 9
	message("load redo at " & play.history.pointer{int})
	if((play.history.valid[play.history.pointer{int}]{int} = 1) and (play.history.pointer{int} # ((play.history.actual{int} + 1) mod 9)))
		history.pull_value(play.history.signature{int[]}, mnu_signature{int})
		history.pull_value(play.history.length{int[]}, mnu_length_bar{int})
		history.pull_value(play.history.global_accents_enable{int[]}, btn_use_global_accents{int})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.global_accents{int[]}, _global_accents{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.global_accents_links{int[]}, apply_accent{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.seq.velo_data{int[]}, _seq.velo_data{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.seq.pitch_data{int[]}, _seq.pitch_data{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets{int[]}, _seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.SEQ_PARAMETERS{int[]}, _SEQ_PARAMETERS{int[]})
		call ui.update_seq_display
	else
		play.history.pointer{int} := (max(play.history.pointer{int} - 1, 0) + (le(play.history.pointer{int}, 0) * (9 - 1))) mod 9
	end if
	call history.update_buttons
end function

function matrix.get_array_D2(ui_id : int) -> result : int
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (32 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 8) 
			if(lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} = ui_id{int})
				result{int} := ii{int}
			end if
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function matrix.get_array_D1(ui_id : int) -> result : int
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (32 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 8) 
			if(lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} = ui_id{int})
				result{int} := i{int}
			end if
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function seq.y_to_px(value : real)
	return ((int(round(abs(1 - value{real}) * real(144))) + xy_seq{real[]} -> y) + (10 / 2))
end function

function set_velo_step_to_mouse
	if(xy_velo{real[]} -> key_shift = 0)
		if(seq.write_min{int} = 1)
			seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 0]{int} := a{int}
		else
			if(seq.write_max{int} = 1)
				seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 1]{int} := a{int}
			end if
		end if
		if(xy_velo{real[]} -> key_alt = 1)
			seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 0]{int} := 0
			seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 1]{int} := 0
		end if
		if(abs(tb_idx_before{int} - tb_idx{int}) >= 2)
			i{int} := min(tb_idx_before{int}, tb_idx{int}) + 1
			while(i{int} <= (max(tb_idx_before{int}, tb_idx{int}) - 1)) 
				if(seq.write_min{int} = 1)
					seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} := (a{int} + tb_value_before{int}) / 2
				else
					if(seq.write_max{int} = 1)
						seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 1]{int} := (a{int} + tb_value_before{int}) / 2
					end if
				end if
				if(xy_velo{real[]} -> key_alt = 1)
					seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} := 0
					seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 1]{int} := 0
				end if
				lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, i{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> height := int(round(real(int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) * (abs(real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}) - real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 0]{int})) / 127)))
				lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, i{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> pos_y := ((140 + int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) - int(round(real(int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) * (real(min(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 0]{int}, seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 1]{int})) / 127)))) - lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, i{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> height
				lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, i{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> picture_state := ge(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 0]{int}, seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int}, 1]{int})
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
		i{int} := 0
		lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, tb_idx{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> height := int(round(real(int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) * (abs(real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 1]{int}) - real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 0]{int})) / 127)))
		lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, tb_idx{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> pos_y := ((140 + int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) - int(round(real(int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) * (real(min(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 0]{int}, seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 1]{int})) / 127)))) - lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, tb_idx{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> height
		lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, tb_idx{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> picture_state := ge(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 0]{int}, seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, tb_idx{int}, 1]{int})
		call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
	else
		if(xy_velo{real[]} -> key_shift = 1)
			if(seq.write_scaled{int} = 0)
				seq.write_first_touch{real} := xy_velo[1]{real}
			end if
			seq.write_scaled{int} := 1
			s{int} := 0
			while(s{int} <= (visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 0]{int} := seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, s{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), 0]{int}
				seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 1]{int} := seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, s{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), 1]{int}
				if(seq.write_min{int} = 1)
					seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 0]{int} := int(real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, s{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), 0]{int}) * (xy_velo[1]{real} / seq.write_first_touch{real}))
				else
					if(seq.write_max{int} = 1)
						seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 1]{int} := int(real(max(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, s{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), 1]{int}, 1)) * (xy_velo[1]{real} / seq.write_first_touch{real}))
					end if
				end if
				lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, s{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> height := int(round(real(int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) * (abs(real(clamp(seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 1]{int}, 0, 127)) - real(clamp(seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 0]{int}, 0, 127))) / 127)))
				lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, s{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> pos_y := ((140 + int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) - int(round(real(int(round(real(59) * 2.5))) * (real(min(clamp(seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 0]{int}, 0, 127), clamp(seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 1]{int}, 0, 127))) / 127)))) - lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, s{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> height
				lbl_rhythm[active_slot{int} mod 5, s{int} mod visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> picture_state := ge(seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 0]{int}, seq.velo_scale_buffer[s{int}, 1]{int})
				call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
				inc(s{int})
			end while
		end if
	end if
end function

function update_solo_mute_buttons
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		btn_solo[i{int}]{int} -> value := solo_mute_states[0, i{int}]{int}
		btn_mute[i{int}]{int} -> value := solo_mute_states[1, i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function check_development
	development[0]{int} := - 1
	_id{int} := load_array_str(development{int[]}, development_path{string})
	if(_id{int} = - 1)
	end if
end function

function jam.save_history
	history_array[1, history_pointers[1]{int}]{int} := 1
	history_array[1, (history_pointers[1]{int} + 1) mod 10]{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (6 - 1)) 
			jams_history[history_pointers[1]{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := jams[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		jams.octaves_history[history_pointers[0]{int}, i{int}]{int} := jams.octaves[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	history_pointers[1]{int} := (history_pointers[1]{int} + 1) mod 10
	call ui.update_undo_redo_buttons
end function

function execute_morph_faders
	declare local _offset : int
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if((btn_midi_mode{int} = 0) or (current_controller_channel{int} = i{int}))
			_offset{int} := int((real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 127) * real(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int} -> value - sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> value))
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> value + _offset{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
			sli_volume[i{int}]{int} -> value := get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
		if(sli_volume.previous[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} # sli_volume[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> value)
			lbl_volume[i{int}]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, (NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}) + slot_group_offset{int}) & "dB"
			timed_display.trigger(lbl_volume[i{int}]{int}, "Vol", 0)
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		sli_volume.previous[i{int}]{int} := sli_volume[i{int}]{int} -> value
		sli_volume_disp[i{int}]{int} -> value := max(sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int} -> value, sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> value)
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function motion.modwheel_show_glow(bool : int)
	if((mw_active{int} = 0) and (bool{int} = 1))
		animation.abort(mw_fade_animation{int})
		mw_fade_animation{int} := animation.picture.start(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fade{int}), 29, 0, 5, 2)
	else
		if((mw_active{int} = 1) and (bool{int} = 0))
			animation.abort(mw_fade_animation{int})
			mw_fade_animation{int} := animation.picture.start(get_ui_id(anim.mw_fade{int}), 0, 29, 15, 3)
		end if
	end if
	if((mw_active{int} = 1) and (bool{int} = 1))
		mw_touched_counter{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function reset_slot_buttons
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function update_ks_pressed_states
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
		set_key_pressed(keyswitches[i{int}]{int} + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), 0)
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	set_key_pressed(43 + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), 0)
	if(btn_midi_mode{int} = 0)
		if(mnu_keyswitch{int} # 4)
			set_key_pressed(keyswitches[current_keyswitch{int}]{int} + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), 1)
		else
			set_key_pressed(43 + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), 1)
		end if
	end if
end function

function instrument_browser.close
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
		btn_open_fx[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_solo[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_mute[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	instrument_browser{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
end function

function instrument_browser.open
	declare local _idx : int
	panel.shape_controls{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	remote(btn_open_fx{int[]}, - 1)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
		btn_open_fx[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		btn_solo[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		btn_mute[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	_idx{int} := search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]
	if((slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} # - 1) and (_idx{int} # - 1))
		current_category{int} := (_idx{int} / 16) / 11
		current_section{int} := (_idx{int} / 16) mod 11
		if((_idx{int} mod 16) > (8 - 1))
			scroll_instr_offset{int} := (_idx{int} mod 16) - (8 - 1)
			sli_sc_scrollbar{int} := (- scroll_instr_offset{int} * (1000000 / (current_instr_num{int} - 8))) + 1000000
		end if
	else
		current_category{int} := 0 / 11
		current_section{int} := 0 mod 11
		scroll_instr_offset{int} := 0
		sli_sc_scrollbar{int} := 1000000
	end if
	instrument_browser{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	call instrument_browser.update_scroll
	lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> POS_Y := sli_sc_scrollbar{int} -> POS_Y + ((brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int}) - ((sli_sc_scrollbar{int} * (brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int} - sc_handle_size{int})) / 1000000))
	call instrument_browser.update
end function

function instrument_browser.update_scroll
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
		btn_sound[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		if(instrument_browser.structure[current_category{int}, current_section{int}, i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			message("show inst browser item " & i{int} & " + " & scroll_instr_offset{int})
			btn_sound[i{int}]{int} -> text := instrument.names[instrument_browser.structure[current_category{int}, current_section{int}, i{int} + scroll_instr_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
			btn_sound[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			set_font_types(btn_sound[i{int}]{int}, fonts.regular_white{int[]})
			if(slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} = instrument_browser.structure[current_category{int}, current_section{int}, i{int} + scroll_instr_offset{int}]{int})
				btn_sound[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
			else
				if(search[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}, instrument_browser.structure[current_category{int}, current_section{int}, i{int} + scroll_instr_offset{int}]{int}] # - 1)
					ii{int} := 0
					while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
						inc(ii{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
			btn_sound[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function instrument.load(slot_id : int, id : int)
	declare local _show_delay_comp : int := 0
	declare local _empty_slot : int := 0
	slot.loaded_sound[slot_id{int}]{int} := id{int}
	message("load inst " & id{int})
	if(id{int} # - 1)
		btn_slot[slot_id{int}]{int} -> text := instrument.names[id{int}]{string}
		if(instrument.type[id{int}]{int} = 3)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
				SEQ_PARAMETERS[i{int}, slot_id{int}, 0]{int} := 0
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
		if(instrument.type[id{int}]{int} = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
				if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[i{int}, slot_id{int}, 0]{int} = 0)
					SEQ_PARAMETERS[i{int}, slot_id{int}, 0]{int} := 1
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
	else
		btn_slot[slot_id{int}]{int} -> text := ""
	end if
	lbl_slot_icon[slot_id{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> picture := get_slot_icon(slot_id{int})
	call update_morph_faders
	call update_slot_names
	update_purge
	call global_range.compute
	call update_key_colors
	call ui.update_seq_params
	call undo.flush
	update_speed_flag{int} := 1
end function

function unmark_new_presets(preset_idx : unknown)
end function

function execute_shape_controls
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} := sli_oct[i{int}]{int} -> value
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PAN{int}, sli_pan[i{int}]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{int}, sli_rev_send[i{int}]{int} -> value, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function midiexport.update_label_visibility
	lbl_midiexport_dummy{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_midiexport{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_midiexport_chord{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	if(btn_chord_page_enter{int} = 0)
		if(transport_stamp{int} # - 1)
			lbl_midiexport_dummy{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		else
			if(midi.seq_data_written{int} = 0)
				lbl_midiexport_dummy{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			else
				lbl_midiexport{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			end if
		end if
	else
		lbl_midiexport_chord{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	end if
end function

function hide_panels
	panel.shape{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.global{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.arp{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.custom{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.find_external{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.seq_tables{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.settings{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.chord{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	preset_system.show(0)
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
end function

function on_button_tag override
{thread-unsafe}
	bit_list2[0]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
	bit_list2[1]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
	if((saving_preset{int} = 0) and (tag_button_pressed{int} = 0))
		tag_button_pressed{int} := 1
		call filter_presets
		if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} = 0)
			p{int} := 33 - 1
			while((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} = 0) and (p{int} >= 0)) 
				if(floatmask.get(bit_list{int[]}, p{int}) = 1)
					tag_button_array[p{int}]{int} -> value := 0
					floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, p{int}, 0)
					call filter_presets
					wait(5)
				end if
				dec(p{int})
			end while
		end if
		call tag_state_handling
		if(preset_scan{int} = 0)
			lbl_presetcount{int} -> text := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} & "/" & NUM_PRESETS{int}
		end if
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[end_of_presets_array{int[]}] - 1)) 
			end_of_presets_array[i{int}]{int} := is_in_range(i{int}, 0, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 1)
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		scroll.up{int} := real_to_int(round(scale.range(int_to_real(scroll.up{int}), 0, int_to_real(max(1, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{int} - 12)), 0, int_to_real(max(1, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)))))
		call update.preset_button_focus
		if(btn_clear_tags{int} -> value = 1)
			if(preset.idx{int} # - 1)
				if(floatmask.is_empty(bit_list{int[]}) = 1)
					scroll.up{int} := scroll.up{int}
				else
					scroll.up{int} := search[final_preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]
				end if
			else
				scroll.up{int} := scroll.up_origin{int}
			end if
			btn_clear_tags{int} := 0
		end if
		if(btn_presetBrowser{int} = 1)
			call repaint.scrollarea
			if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} > 12)
				sli_scrollbar{int} := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int} - 12)) * scroll.up{int})
				sli_scrollbar{int} -> mouse_behaviour := - (((508 - 215) * 12) + (2 * (NUM_PRESETS{int} - NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int})))
				handle_size{int} := real_to_int(round(int_to_real(215) / (int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{int}) / int_to_real(12))))
				if(handle_size{int} < 30)
					handle_size{int} := 30
				end if
			else
				sli_scrollbar{int} := 1000000
				handle_size{int} := 215
			end if
			lbl_scrollhandle{int} -> height := handle_size{int}
			lbl_scrollhandle{int} -> POS_Y := sli_scrollbar{int} -> POS_Y + ((215 - handle_size{int}) - ((sli_scrollbar{int} * (215 - handle_size{int})) / 1000000))
		end if
		tag_button_pressed{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function Co5.get_pos(key : int, mode : unknown) -> result : int
	declare local _mover : int := 0
	declare local _counter : int := 0
	while(_mover{int} # key{int}) 
		inc(_counter{int})
		_mover{int} := (_mover{int} + 7) mod 12
	end while
	result{int} := ((_counter{int} - root_key.mode_shifts[mode{unknown}]{int}) + 12) mod 12
end function

function undo.create
	if(play.history.actual{int} # - 1)
		i{int} := play.history.pointer{int}
		while(i{int} # play.history.actual{int}) 
			i{int} := (i{int} + 1) mod 9
			play.history.valid[i{int}]{int} := 0
		end while
		play.history.actual{int} := - 1
	end if
	play.history.pointer{int} := (play.history.pointer{int} + 1) mod 9
	message("create undo at " & play.history.pointer{int})
	play.history.changed{int} := 1
	play.history.valid[play.history.pointer{int}]{int} := 1
	play.history.valid[(play.history.pointer{int} + 1) mod 9]{int} := 0
	history.put_value(play.history.signature{int[]}, mnu_signature{int})
	history.put_value(play.history.length{int[]}, mnu_length_bar{int})
	history.put_value(play.history.global_accents_enable{int[]}, btn_use_global_accents{int})
	history.put_array(_play.history.global_accents{int[]}, _global_accents{int[]})
	history.put_array(_play.history.global_accents_links{int[]}, apply_accent{int[]})
	history.put_array(_play.history.seq.velo_data{int[]}, _seq.velo_data{int[]})
	history.put_array(_play.history.seq.pitch_data{int[]}, _seq.pitch_data{int[]})
	history.put_array(_play.history.seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets{int[]}, _seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets{int[]})
	history.put_array(_play.history.SEQ_PARAMETERS{int[]}, _SEQ_PARAMETERS{int[]})
	call history.update_buttons
end function

function get_chord_accidental(key : unknown, mode : unknown) -> result : int
	declare local _pos : int
	_pos{int} := Co5.get_pos(key{unknown}, mode{unknown})
	if(_pos{int} > 5)
		result{int} := 1
	else
		result{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function closest_bass_note(root : int, bass : int)
	return ((root{int} - ((root{int} mod 12) - bass{int})) - (12 * (signbit((root{int} mod 12) - bass{int}) + eq(root{int} mod 12, bass{int}))))
end function

function ui.update_next_prev_group_buttons
	btn_chord_type_prev_group{int} -> picture := btn_chord_type_prev_group_picture{string}
	if(active_chord_type_group{int} = 0)
		btn_chord_type_prev_group{int} -> picture := btn_chord_type_prev_group_picture{string} & "_disabled"
	end if
	btn_chord_type_next_group{int} -> picture := btn_chord_type_next_group_picture{string}
	if(active_chord_type_group{int} = 3)
		btn_chord_type_next_group{int} -> picture := btn_chord_type_next_group_picture{string} & "_disabled"
	end if
end function

function global_range.compute
	global_range.high{int} := 0
	global_range.low{int} := 127
	inclusive_range.high{int} := 127
	inclusive_range.low{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} # 3)
				global_range.low{int} := clamp(min(instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - ((12 * oct_shifts[i{int}]{int}) * ne(btn_midi_mode{int})), global_range.low{int}), [((44 + (12 * mnu_ks{int})) - 0) * ne(btn_midi_mode{int})], 127)
				global_range.high{int} := clamp(max(instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - ((12 * oct_shifts[i{int}]{int}) * ne(btn_midi_mode{int})), global_range.high{int}), [((44 + (12 * mnu_ks{int})) - 0) * ne(btn_midi_mode{int})], 127)
				inclusive_range.low{int} := clamp(max(instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - ((12 * oct_shifts[i{int}]{int}) * ne(btn_midi_mode{int})), inclusive_range.low{int}), [((44 + (12 * mnu_ks{int})) - 0) * ne(btn_midi_mode{int})], 127)
				inclusive_range.high{int} := clamp(min(instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - ((12 * oct_shifts[i{int}]{int}) * ne(btn_midi_mode{int})), inclusive_range.high{int}), [((44 + (12 * mnu_ks{int})) - 0) * ne(btn_midi_mode{int})], 127)
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(global_range.high{int} < global_range.low{int})
		global_range.low{int} := 60
		global_range.high{int} := 60
	end if
	if(inclusive_range.high{int} < inclusive_range.low{int})
		inclusive_range.low{int} := - 1
		inclusive_range.high{int} := - 1
	end if
	message(" GLOBAL RANGE " & global_range.low{int} & " - " & global_range.high{int})
end function

function set_font_types(control_id : any, font_array : int[])
	_i{int} := 0
	while(_i{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
		set_control_par(control_id{any}, font.types[_i{int}]{int}, font_array[_i{int}]{int})
		inc(_i{int})
	end while
end function

function version.update
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(version[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			LIB_VERSION_NUM{string} := LIB_VERSION_NUM{string} & version[i{int}]{int}
			if(version[i{int} + 1]{int} # - 1)
				LIB_VERSION_NUM{string} := LIB_VERSION_NUM{string} & "."
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function nks.update_global_fx_labels
	sli_comp_threshold{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}) & " dB"
	sli_comp_gain{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int}) & " dB"
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		sli_reverb_length{int} -> label := "N/A"
		sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> label := ((real(sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value / 10000) / 100) * 300) & " ms"
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
			sli_reverb_length{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
				sli_reverb_length{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
					sli_reverb_length{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " ms"
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	sli_reverb_output{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}) & " dB"
	if(btn_lfo_sync[0]{int} -> value = 1)
		frequency[0]{real} := ((tempo{real} * 24) / 60) / real(ticks_durations[scale.range(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> value, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1)]{int})
		sli_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> label := durations[scale.range(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> value, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1)]{string}
	else
		frequency[0]{real} := scale.range.log(real(sli_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 0.01, 15.01)
		sli_lfo_freq[0]{int} -> label := (int_to_real(real_to_int(frequency[0]{real} * 100)) / 100) & " Hz"
	end if
	sli_lfo_type[0]{int} -> label := lfo_type_strings[mnu_lfo_type[0]{int} -> value]{string}
end function

function ui.update_keyswitches_show
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> picture_state := (mnu_keyswitch{int} * 2) + btn_keyswitches_show{int}
	lbl_keyswitch_underline{int} -> pos_x := btn_keyswitch[mnu_keyswitch{int}]{int} -> pos_x + 58
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_keyswitch{int[]}] - 1)) 
		btn_keyswitch[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	btn_keyswitch[mnu_keyswitch{int}]{int} -> value := 1
	if(seq.view_mode{int} = 0)
		panel.play.keyswitches{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_keyswitches_show{int}]{int}
		btn_slot[4]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		btn_mute[4]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		btn_solo[4]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		btn_mute[9]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		btn_solo[9]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		lbl_slot_icon[4]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		btn_apply_accent[4]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_rhythm{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
			lbl_rhythm[4, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
			lbl_velo_scaled[4, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		lbl_seq_bg[4]{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		panel.play.global{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_keyswitches_show{int})]{int}
		if(btn_keyswitches_show{int} = 0)
			call ui.update_seq_display
		end if
	end if
end function

function array.reduce(array : [], func : (): unknown) -> result : unknown
	result{unknown} := array[0]{unknown}
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)) 
		result{unknown} := func(result{unknown}, array[lib.i{int}]{unknown})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function nks.update_all_labels
	nks.update_shape_slider
	nks.update_attack_release_labels
	nks.update_global_fx_labels
end function

function motion.mw_animation
	declare local pic_state : int
	pic_state{int} := int(126 * (real(motion.modwheel{int}) / 127))
	if(btn_midi_mode{int} = 1)
		pic_state{int} := 126
	end if
	anim.mw_lightstrip{int} -> picture_state := pic_state{int}
	anim.mw_fingertouch{int} -> picture_state := pic_state{int}
	anim.bg_top_left{int} -> picture_state := pic_state{int}
	anim.bg_top_right{int} -> picture_state := pic_state{int}
	anim.bg_side_left{int} -> picture_state := pic_state{int}
	anim.bg_side_right{int} -> picture_state := pic_state{int}
	anim.bg_bottom{int} -> picture_state := pic_state{int}
	anim.bg_score_title{int} -> picture_state := pic_state{int}
	if(NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{int} # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{int})
		motion.modwheel_show_glow(1)
	end if
	mw_active{int} := 1
end function

function set_eq_gain(slot : int, band : unknown, value : int)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	case 1
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	case 2
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	end select
end function

function get_info_from_transfer(info : unknown)
	return (transfer.additional_info[info{unknown}]{int})
end function

function max4(a : int, b : number, c : int, d : number)
	return (max(a{int}, b{number}) - ((max(a{int}, b{number}) - max(c{int}, d{number})) .and. sh_right([max(a{int}, b{number}) - max(c{int}, d{number})], 31)))
end function

function get_data_from_transfer(idx1 : unknown, idx2 : unknown)
	return (transfer.chord_array[idx1{unknown}, idx2{unknown}]{int})
end function

function prepare_info_to_transfer(meter : unknown)
