	transfer.additional_info[0]{int} := meter{unknown}
end function

function fxRack.save{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _inc : int
	_inc{int} := 0
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := 1
	inc(_inc{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := delay_sync[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
			fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value
			inc(_inc{int})
			fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
			inc(_inc{int})
			fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
			inc(_inc{int})
			fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
			inc(_inc{int})
			fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
			inc(_inc{int})
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value
	inc(_inc{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 2) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value
		inc(_inc{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 2) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value
		inc(_inc{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 2) 
		fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := eq.sli_q[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value
		inc(_inc{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int}
	inc(_inc{int})
	fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} := eq_bypass[active_slot{int}]{int}
	wait_async(save_array_str(fxRack.save_array{int[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}) & "../fx-presets/fxpreset" & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} & ".nka"))
	fxRack.save_array[0]{int} := 0
end function

function chord.preview
	fade_out(by_marks(MARK_2{int}), 5000, 1)
	if(chord.playing{int} = 0)
		if(chords_preview[0]{int} # - 1)
			if(btn_engine_preview{int} = 0)
				chord.lowest_note{int} := 127
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
					if(chord.types[chords_preview[3]{int}, i{int}]{int} # - 1)
						preview_note{int} := ((((chord.playback_octave{int} + (chords_preview[6]{int} * 12)) + chords_preview[0]{int}) + modes[chords_preview[1]{int}, chord.types[chords_preview[3]{int}, i{int}]{int} mod 7]{int}) + ((chord.types[chords_preview[3]{int}, i{int}]{int} / 7) * 12)) - (bool(chords_preview[5]{int}) * 12)
						if(i{int} < chords_preview[5]{int})
							preview_note{int} := preview_note{int} + 12
						end if
						chord.lowest_note{int} := min(preview_note{int}, chord.lowest_note{int})
						if(sli_chords_preview_vol{int} # 0)
							preview_event_id{int} := play_note(preview_note{int}, chord_velocity{int}, 0, 2000000)
							preview.allow_group(preview_event_id{int}, preview_note{int})
							message(root_notes[0, preview_note{int} mod 12]{string})
						end if
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if(chords_preview[2]{int} # - 1)
					preview_note{int} := closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords_preview[2]{int})
					if(sli_chords_preview_vol{int} # 0)
						preview_event_id{int} := play_note(preview_note{int}, chord_velocity{int}, 0, 2000000)
						preview.allow_group(preview_event_id{int}, preview_note{int})
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(btn_engine_preview{int} = 1)
				if((((((chords_preview[0]{int} = chords_preview_buffer[0]{int}) and (chords_preview[1]{int} = chords_preview_buffer[1]{int})) and (chords_preview[3]{int} = chords_preview_buffer[3]{int})) and (chords_preview[2]{int} = chords_preview_buffer[2]{int})) and (chords_preview[5]{int} = chords_preview_buffer[5]{int})) and (seq.active{int} = 1))
					call stop_engine
					message("same input")
				else
					if(seq.active{int} = 0)
						seq.active{int} := 1
						chord.started{int} := 1
					end if
					chord.playing{int} := 1
					chord.playing_preview{int} := 1
				end if
				chords_preview_buffer[0]{int} := chords_preview[0]{int}
				chords_preview_buffer[1]{int} := chords_preview[1]{int}
				chords_preview_buffer[3]{int} := chords_preview[3]{int}
				chords_preview_buffer[2]{int} := chords_preview[2]{int}
				chords_preview_buffer[5]{int} := chords_preview[5]{int}
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function set_eq_q(slot : int, band : unknown, value : int)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW1{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	case 1
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW2{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	case 2
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_BW3{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	end select
end function

function fxRack.execute_slider
	declare local _target : int := fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int}]{int} + loaded_fx_subtypes[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int}, 2 + (fxRack.control{int} * 2)
	declare local _is_delay_sync : int := 0
	if(fx_bypass[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} = 1)
		if(_target{int} = ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int})
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL{int}, drywet[(1000000 - fxRack.value{int}) / 1000]{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int})
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, drywet[fxRack.value{int} / 1000]{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int})
		else
			if((((_target{int} = ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME{int}) or (_target{int} = ENGINE_PAR_DL_TIME{int})) or (_target{int} = ENGINE_PAR_PSYDL_TIME{int})) and (delay_sync[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} = 1))
				set_engine_par(fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int}]{int} + loaded_fx_subtypes[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int}, 8, ni_sync_units[scale.range(fxRack.value{int}, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ni_sync_units{int[]}] - 1)]{int} + NI_SYNC_UNIT_ABS{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int})
				_is_delay_sync{int} := 1
			else
				set_engine_par(_target{int}, fxRack.value{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int})
			end if
		end if
		if(fxRack.do_not_trigger_label{int} = 0)
			if((active_slot{int} = fxRack.slot{int}) and (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} = fxRack.fx_slot{int}))
				lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{int}]{int} -> text := get_engine_par_disp(_target{int}, - 1, fxRack.fx_slot{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + fxRack.slot{int}) & fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} + loaded_fx_subtypes[fxRack.slot{int}, current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{int}]{int}]{int}, 2 + (fxRack.control{int} * 2)
				if(_is_delay_sync{int} = 1)
					lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{int}]{int} -> text := durations[scale.range(fxRack.value{int}, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ni_sync_units{int[]}] - 1)]{string}
				end if
				timed_display.trigger(lbl_fxrack_control[fxRack.control{int}]{int}, fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} + loaded_fx_subtypes[fxRack.slot{int}, current_fx_slot[fxRack.slot{int}]{int}]{int}, 1 + (fxRack.control{int} * 2), 0)
			end if
		else
			fxRack.do_not_trigger_label{int} := 0
		end if
	end if
end function

function update_window
	panel.shape{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.global{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.arp{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.custom{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.chord{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	if(btn_shape_page{int} = 1)
		panel.shape{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	else
		if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
			panel.play{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			mnu_keyswitch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		end if
	end if
end function

function gt(a : number, b : number)
	return (- sh_right(b{number} - a{number}, 31))
end function

function fxRack.reset(sl : unknown){thread-unsafe}
	declare local _fx_slot : int
	declare local _band : int
	mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
	tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
	message("set attack from " & sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{int} -> value & " to " & get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}))
	sli_attack[sl{unknown}]{int} -> value := get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
		sli_release[sl{unknown}]{int} -> value := get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
	end if
	_band{int} := 0
	while(_band{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		set_eq_freq(sl{unknown}, _band{int}, _band{int} * 500000)
		eq.sli_freq[sl{unknown}, _band{int}]{int} -> value := _band{int} * 500000
		set_eq_gain(sl{unknown}, _band{int}, 500000)
		eq.sli_gain[sl{unknown}, _band{int}]{int} -> value := 500000
		set_eq_q(sl{unknown}, _band{int}, 500000)
		eq.sli_q[sl{unknown}, _band{int}]{int} -> value := 500000
		inc(_band{int})
	end while
	_fx_slot{int} := 0
	while(_fx_slot{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		loaded_fx_types[sl{unknown}, _fx_slot{int}]{int} := 6
		loaded_fx_subtypes[sl{unknown}, _fx_slot{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(_fx_slot{int})
	end while
	call update_eq_handles
	call eq.curve
	load_fx(sl{unknown})
end function

function fxRack.update_allround{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _slots : int
	_slots{int} := 0
	while(_slots{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		load_fx(_slots{int})
		inc(_slots{int})
	end while
end function

function load_fx(sl : int){thread-unsafe}
	declare local _fx_slots : int
	declare local _fx_id : int
	declare local _num_fx_elements : int
	declare local _fixed_parameters : int
	if(get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, - 1, eq_position[sl{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}) # EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER{int})
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_NONE{int}, - 1, ne(eq_position[sl{int}]{int}) * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}))
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_FILTER{int}, - 1, eq_position[sl{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}))
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE{int}, FILTER_TYPE_EQ3BAND{int}, - 1, eq_position[sl{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}))
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int}, ne(eq_bypass[sl{int}]{int}), - 1, eq_position[sl{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		set_eq_freq(sl{int}, i{int}, eq.sli_freq[sl{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value)
		set_eq_gain(sl{int}, i{int}, eq.sli_gain[sl{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value)
		set_eq_q(sl{int}, i{int}, eq.sli_q[sl{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value)
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[sl{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	sli_attack[sl{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int}]
	if(s{int} # - 1)
		fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
		fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
		fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
		fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
		fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_release[sl{int}]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
			call fxRack.execute_slider
		end if
	end if
	string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
	s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
		end if
	end if
	s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int}]
	if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
				tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
				string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
						ii{int} := 0
						while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[sl{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(ii{int})
						end while
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				end if
			end if
		end if
		if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
			lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
			timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
		end if
	end if
	sli_release[sl{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	_fx_slots{int} := 0
	while(_fx_slots{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		_fx_id{int} := fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}]{int}]{int} + loaded_fx_subtypes[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}]{int} = 0)
			wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, fx_types[0]{int}, - 1, _fx_slots{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}))
			wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE{int}, loaded_fx_subtypes[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}]{int}, 0, - 1, _fx_slots{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}))
		else
			wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, _fx_id{int}, 0, - 1, _fx_slots{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int}))
		end if
		_num_fx_elements{int} := all_fx_settings.sizes[_fx_id{int}]{int}
		if(_num_fx_elements{int} > (2 + (_fx_id{int}, 1 * 2)))
			_fixed_parameters{int} := 2 + (_fx_id{int}, 1 * 2)
			while(_fixed_parameters{int} <= (_num_fx_elements{int} - 1)) 
				set_engine_par(_fx_id{int}, _fixed_parameters{int}, _fx_id{int}, _fixed_parameters{int} + 1, - 1, _fx_slots{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int})
				_fixed_parameters{int} := _fixed_parameters{int} + 2
			end while
		end if
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int}, ne(fx_bypass[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}]{int}), - 1, _fx_slots{int} + 1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + sl{int})
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
			if(ii{int} < _fx_id{int}, 1)
				fxRack.do_not_trigger_label{int} := 1
				s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int}]
				if(s{int} # - 1)
					fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
					fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
					fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
					fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
					fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int}
					if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
						call fxRack.execute_slider
					end if
				end if
				string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
				s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int}]
				if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
								inc(i{int})
							end while
						else
							if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
								i{int} := 0
								while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
									ii{int} := 0
									while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
										mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
										tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
										set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
										string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
										inc(ii{int})
									end while
									inc(i{int})
								end while
							end if
						end if
					end if
					if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
						lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
						timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
					end if
				end if
				s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int}]
				if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
								inc(i{int})
							end while
						else
							if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
								i{int} := 0
								while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
									ii{int} := 0
									while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
										mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
										tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
										set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
										string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
										inc(ii{int})
									end while
									inc(i{int})
								end while
							end if
						end if
					end if
					if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
						lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
						timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
					end if
				end if
				sli_fxrack_control[sl{int}, _fx_slots{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
			end if
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(_fx_slots{int})
	end while
end function

function reset_page_buttons
	btn_find_page{int} := 0
	btn_shape_page{int} := 0
	btn_play_page{int} := 0
end function

function update_eq_handles
	xy_eq[0]{real} := real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, 0]{int} -> value) / 1e+06
	xy_eq[1]{real} := real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, 0]{int} -> value) / 1e+06
	xy_eq[2]{real} := real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, 1]{int} -> value) / 1e+06
	xy_eq[3]{real} := real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, 1]{int} -> value) / 1e+06
	xy_eq[4]{real} := real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, 2]{int} -> value) / 1e+06
	xy_eq[5]{real} := real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, 2]{int} -> value) / 1e+06
end function

function floatmask.or(float_mask1 : int[], float_mask2 : int[], return_mask : int[])
	return_mask[0]{int} := float_mask1[0]{int} .or. float_mask2[0]{int}
	return_mask[1]{int} := float_mask1[1]{int} .or. float_mask2[1]{int}
end function

function fxRack.update{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _slots : int
	declare local _fx_slots : int
	declare local _fx_id : int
	declare local _num_fx_elements : int
	declare local _fixed_parameters : int
	while(fxRack.update_in_progress{int} = 1) 
		wait(100)
	end while
	fxRack.update_in_progress{int} := 1
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		lbl_fx[i{int}]{int} -> text := ""
		lbl_fx[i{int}]{int} -> picture := fx_labels.pictures[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}]{string}
		if(i{int} = current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int})
			lbl_fx[i{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 2
		else
			lbl_fx[i{int}]{int} -> picture_state := 1 - fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}
		end if
		btn_fxrack_bypass[i{int}]{int} -> value := fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}
		lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{int}]{int} -> text := fx_names_full[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}]{string}
		lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int}]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} = 6)
			btn_fxrack_bypass[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			lbl_fxrack_type_side[i{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} -> picture_state := 0
	if((btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} = 0) and (current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} # - 1))
		if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} # - 1)
			lbl_active_fx_overlay{int} -> picture := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> picture
			lbl_active_fx_overlay{int} -> pos_x := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> pos_x
			lbl_active_fx_overlay{int} -> pos_y := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> pos_y
			lbl_active_fx_overlay{int} -> picture_state := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> picture_state
			lbl_active_fx_overlay{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		end if
		if(loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 6)
			lbl_fxrack_effect_big{int} -> picture := "lbl_fxbig_" & fxtypes.suffix[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{string}
		end if
		lbl_fxrack_effect_big{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_fxrack_effect_big_frame{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	else
		lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} -> picture_state := 2
		lbl_active_fx_overlay{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_effect_big{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_effect_big_frame{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	end if
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> picture := "lbl_bg_fx_panel_top" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
	btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} -> picture := "btn_fxslot" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
	lbl_fxrack_slot_info_bottom{int} -> text := "Slot " & (active_slot{int} + 1)
	lbl_fxrack_slot_info_bottom{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
	set_control_par_str_arr(xy_fxRack{real[]}, CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_fxslot" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}, 0)
	set_control_par_str_arr(xy_fxRack{real[]}, CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_fxslot" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}, 2)
	set_control_par_str_arr(xy_fxRack{real[]}, CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE{int}, "btn_fxslot" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}, 4)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
		mnu_fxrack_effect[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
		lbl_fxrack_control[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	btn_fxrack_delay_sync{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			iii{int} := 0
			while(iii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
				sli_fxrack_control[i{int}, ii{int}, iii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				motion.update_visibility(sli_fxrack_control[i{int}, ii{int}, iii{int}]{int})
				inc(iii{int})
			end while
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} > - 1)
		effect_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		eq_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_type_top{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_fxrack_type_top{int} -> text := fx_names_full[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{string}
		mnu_fxrack_effect[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		mnu_fxrack_effect[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} -> value := loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
		if(loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 6)
			btn_fxrack_effect_previous{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			btn_fxrack_effect_next{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			lbl_fxrack_effect_big_frame{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			lbl_fxrack_effect_big{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			lbl_fxrack_type_top{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			btn_fxrack_type_none{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			lbl_fxrack_type_selected{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			mnu_fxrack_effect[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_fxrack_type_big{int[]}] - 1)) 
				if(1 = 1)
					btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
					btn_fxrack_type_big[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				else
					btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					btn_fxrack_type_big[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			btn_fxrack_effect_previous{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			btn_fxrack_effect_next{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			btn_fxrack_type_none{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_fxrack_type_selected{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_fxrack_type_selected{int} -> pos_x := (170 + (85 * loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int})) + lbl_fxrack_type_selected_pos_offsets[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int}
			lbl_fxrack_type_selected{int} -> width := 70 - (lbl_fxrack_type_selected_pos_offsets[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} * 2)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_fxrack_type_big{int[]}] - 1)) 
				if(0 = 1)
					btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
					btn_fxrack_type_big[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				else
					btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					btn_fxrack_type_big[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
		call btn_fxrack_type.reset
		if(loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} # 6)
			btn_fxrack_type[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
		if(fxRack.loaded_new[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
			fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := 1
		end if
		btn_fxrack_block{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		if(fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
			btn_fxrack_block{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		_fx_id{int} := fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int} + loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
			if(i{int} < _fx_id{int}, 1)
				sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> x := (110 + 100) + (((i{int} + 1) * 500) / (_fx_id{int}, 1 + 1))
				sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> picture := "fader-2-disabled"
				if(fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> picture := "fader-2"
				end if
				lbl_fxrack_control[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				lbl_fxrack_control[i{int}]{int} -> text := _fx_id{int}, 1 + (i{int} * 2)
				lbl_fxrack_control[i{int}]{int} -> x := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> x + ((sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> width - lbl_fxrack_control[i{int}]{int} -> width) / 2)
				if(fxRack.loaded_new[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> default_value := _fx_id{int}, 3 + (i{int} * 2)
					sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value := _fx_id{int}, 3 + (i{int} * 2)
					motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := 0
				end if
				if(fx_list_ids[loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}]{int}, 0 = EFFECT_TYPE_REPLIKA{int})
					btn_fxrack_delay_sync{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					btn_fxrack_delay_sync{int} -> value := delay_sync[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
					btn_fxrack_delay_sync{int} -> x := sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, 0]{int} -> x + 44
				end if
				motion.update_visibility(sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int})
				motion.update_position.fader(sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int})
			else
				sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}, i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				lbl_fxrack_control[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		fxRack.loaded_new[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} := 0
	else
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_fxrack_type_big{int[]}] - 1)) 
			if(0 = 1)
				btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				btn_fxrack_type_big[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			else
				btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				btn_fxrack_type_big[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_fxrack_type{int[]}] - 1)) 
			btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		btn_fxrack_effect_previous{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		btn_fxrack_effect_next{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_effect_big_frame{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_effect_big{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_type_top{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		btn_fxrack_type_none{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_type_selected{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		xy_fxRack{real[]} -> active_index := - 1
		btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} := 1
		btn_fxrack_block{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} -> picture_state := 2
		effect_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		eq_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		call eq.curve
		btn_eq_position{int} := eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_eq_position{int} -> text := eq_position.text[eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
		btn_eq_bypass{int} := eq_bypass[active_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_attack{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_release{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
				eq.sli_freq[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				eq.sli_gain[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				eq.sli_q[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				if(i{int} = active_slot{int})
					eq.sli_freq[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					eq.sli_gain[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					eq.sli_q[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				end if
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			sli_attack[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			sli_release[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			if(i{int} = active_slot{int})
				sli_attack[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				sli_release[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				lbl_attack{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				lbl_release{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				btn_attack_release_blocker{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 2)
					btn_attack_release_blocker{int} -> text := "Unavailable for legato instruments."
					btn_attack_release_blocker{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					motion.btn_enable[search[motion.btn_enable{int[]}, sli_attack[i{int}]{int}]]{int} := 0
				else
					if(search[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}] # i{int})
						btn_attack_release_blocker{int} -> text := "Only available in the first instance."
						btn_attack_release_blocker{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
						motion.btn_enable[search[motion.btn_enable{int[]}, sli_attack[i{int}]{int}]]{int} := 0
					end if
				end if
			end if
			motion.update_visibility(sli_attack[i{int}]{int})
			motion.update_visibility(sli_release[i{int}]{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		call update_eq_handles
	end if
	load_fx(active_slot{int})
	call motion.update
	fxRack.update_in_progress{int} := 0
end function

function ui.update_seq_params
	mnu_pattern{int} := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int}
	mnu_rate{int} := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}
	mnu_selection{int} := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 2]{int}
	mnu_reset{int} := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 3]{int}
	sli_octave{int} := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 4]{int}
	sli_transpose{int} := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 5]{int}
	sli_repeat{int} := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 6]{int}
	lbl_note_order{int} -> picture_state := mnu_pattern{int}
	lbl_octave{int} -> text := sli_octave{int}
	lbl_transpose{int} -> text := sli_transpose{int}
	lbl_repeat{int} -> text := sli_repeat{int}
end function

function fxRack.reorder_animation(direction : int){thread-unsafe}
	fxRack.swapAnimation{int} := animation.position.start(lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}, lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int} -> x, lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int} -> y, lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int} -> x, lbl_fx_slot_pos[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}, 5, 1)
	lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int} -> x := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> x
	lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}]{int} -> y := lbl_fx[current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} -> y
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int})
			xy_fxRack[fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} + 1]{real} := abs(fx_slot_pos[i{int}]{real} - 1)
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} := current_fx_slot[active_slot{int}]{int} + direction{int}
	call fxRack.update
end function

function find_key_nka(array : int[], nka : unknown, key : int, parent_folder : unknown, search_depth : int) -> result : string
	declare local path : string
	declare local it : int
	array[0]{int} := - 1
	it{int} := 0
	path{string} := ""
	_id{int} := load_array_str(array{int[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}) & path{string} & parent_folder{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka")
	while(((_id{int} # - 1) and (it{int} < search_depth{int})) and (array[0]{int} # key{int})) 
		array[0]{int} := - 1
		path{string} := path{string} & "../"
		_id{int} := load_array_str(array{int[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}) & path{string} & parent_folder{unknown} & nka{unknown} & ".nka")
		inc(it{int})
	end while
	result{string} := get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}) & path{string} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"
end function

function global_fx.reload{thread-unsafe}
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_IRC{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}))
		load_ir_sample(ir_names[mnu_ir{int}]{string}, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_IRC_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_PLATEREVERB{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}))
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_RAUM{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}))
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					wait_async(set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{int}, EFFECT_TYPE_REVERB2{int}, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int}))
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_IRC_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{int}, sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := "Time"
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		lbl_reverb_length{int} -> text := "N/A"
	else
		if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 1)
			set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
		else
			if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 2)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
			else
				if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 3)
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{int}, sli_reverb_length{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{int}, ne(btn_comp_bypass{int}), - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{int}, sli_comp_threshold{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{int}, sli_comp_gain{int}, - 1, 0, NI_MAIN_BUS{int})
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_reverb_output{int} -> value, - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{int})
end function

function validate.user_preset_idx(idx : int) -> result : int
	declare local preset_exists : int
	preset_exists{int} := 0
	if(search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, idx{int}] # - 1)
		preset.count{int} := 0
		preset_exists{int} := 1
		while(preset_exists{int} = 1) 
			if(search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.count{int} + 999] # - 1)
				inc(preset.count{int})
			else
				preset_exists{int} := 0
			end if
		end while
		result{int} := preset.count{int} + 999
	else
		result{int} := idx{int}
	end if
end function

function btn_fxrack_type.reset
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (7 - 2)) 
		btn_fxrack_type[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function fxRack.close
	fx_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	fx_general_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
end function

function fxRack.open{thread-unsafe}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
		xy_fxRack[fx_slot_order[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} + 1]{real} := abs(fx_slot_pos[i{int}]{real} - 1)
		lbl_fx[i{int}]{int} -> pos_y := lbl_fx_slot_pos[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	call fxRack.update
	call global_fx.close
	fx_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	fx_general_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
end function

function lfo.execute
	if(PLAYED_VOICES_INST{int} > 0)
		inc(lfo.counter{int})
		if(lfo.counter{int} >= LFO.UPDATE_RATE{int})
			lfo.counter{int} := 0
			idx{int} := 0
			while(idx{int} <= (1 - 1)) 
				if(btn_lfo_bypass[idx{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
					if(btn_lfo_sync[idx{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						frequency[idx{int}]{real} := ((tempo{real} * 24) / 60) / real(ticks_durations[scale.range(sli_lfo_freq[idx{int}]{int} -> value, 0, 1000000, 0, num_elements[ticks_durations{int[]}] - 1)]{int})
					else
						frequency[idx{int}]{real} := scale.range.log(real(sli_lfo_freq[idx{int}]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 0.01, 15.01)
					end if
					phi[idx{int}]{real} := phi[idx{int}]{real} + ((2 * NI_MATH_PI{real}) * (frequency[idx{int}]{real} / (1e+06 / int_to_real(1000 * LFO.UPDATE_RATE{int}))))
					if(phi[idx{int}]{real} = (2 * NI_MATH_PI{real}))
						phi[idx{int}]{real} := 0
					end if
					select(mnu_lfo_type[idx{int}]{int} -> value)
					case 0
						lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (lfo.A{real} * sin(phi[idx{int}]{real})) + lfo.A{real}
					case 1
						lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (2 * lfo.A{real}) * int_to_real(real_to_int(round((sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}) + 1) / 2)))
					case 2
						lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (((2 * lfo.A{real}) / NI_MATH_PI{real}) * asin(sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}))) + lfo.A{real}
					case 3
						lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (((- 2 * lfo.A{real}) / NI_MATH_PI{real}) * atan(cos(phi[idx{int}]{real} / 2) / sin(phi[idx{int}]{real} / 2))) + lfo.A{real}
					end select
					call motion.apply_lfo
				end if
				inc(idx{int})
			end while
			if(motion.once{int} = 0)
				motion.once{int} := 1
			end if
		end if
	else
		if(motion.once{int} = 1)
			idx{int} := 0
			while(idx{int} <= (1 - 1)) 
				phi[idx{int}]{real} := 0
				select(mnu_lfo_type[idx{int}]{int} -> value)
				case 0
					lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (lfo.A{real} * sin(phi[idx{int}]{real})) + lfo.A{real}
				case 1
					lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (2 * lfo.A{real}) * int_to_real(real_to_int(round((sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}) + 1) / 2)))
				case 2
					lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (((2 * lfo.A{real}) / NI_MATH_PI{real}) * asin(sin(phi[idx{int}]{real}))) + lfo.A{real}
				case 3
					lfo[idx{int}]{real} := (((- 2 * lfo.A{real}) / NI_MATH_PI{real}) * atan(cos(phi[idx{int}]{real} / 2) / sin(phi[idx{int}]{real} / 2))) + lfo.A{real}
				end select
				inc(idx{int})
			end while
			call motion.apply_lfo
			motion.once{int} := 0
			message("stopped lfo")
		end if
	end if
end function

function assert_summary
	declare local success_rate : real
	success_rate{real} := (int_to_real(tests.counter_successful{int}) / int_to_real(tests.counter_successful{int} + tests.counter_unsuccessful{int})) * 100
	_tests_summary_message(tests.separator{string}, tests.counter_successful{int} + tests.counter_unsuccessful{int}, tests.time_init{int}, tests.time_end{int}, success_rate{real})
end function

function floatmask.not(float_mask : int[], return_mask : int[])
	return_mask[0]{int} := .not. float_mask[0]{int}
	return_mask[1]{int} := .not. float_mask[1]{int}
end function

function motion.update_position.fader(ui_id : int){thread-unsafe}
	motion.id{int} := search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, ui_id{int}]
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> x := (ui_id{int} -> x + (ui_id{int} -> width / 2)) - (motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> width / 2)
	motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> y := (ui_id{int} -> y + ui_id{int} -> height) + 5
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int} -> x := (ui_id{int} -> x + ui_id{int} -> width) + 2
	motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int} -> y := ui_id{int} -> y
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> x := (ui_id{int} -> x + (ui_id{int} -> width / 2)) - 20
	motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> y := ui_id{int} -> y
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> x := (ui_id{int} -> x + (ui_id{int} -> width / 2)) - 2
	motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> y := ui_id{int} -> y
	call motion.update
end function

function release_all_sus_notes
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
				while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
					if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
						note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
						last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
					end if
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function animation.picture.start(ui_id : int, start_pos : int, end_pos : int, length : int, mode : int) -> result : int
	declare local id : int := search[animation.controls{int[]}, - 1]
	if(id{int} # - 1)
		animation.controls[id{int}]{int} := ui_id{int}
		animation.time_left[id{int}]{int} := length{int}
		animation.length[id{int}]{int} := length{int}
		animation.type[id{int}]{int} := 1
		animation.start_pos[id{int}, 0]{int} := start_pos{int}
		animation.end_pos[id{int}, 0]{int} := end_pos{int}
		animation.mode[id{int}]{int} := mode{int}
	else
		message("***Error in animation.ksp *** too many animations at the same time. Increase value of MAX_ANIMATIONS")
	end if
	result{int} := id{int}
end function

function clip(x : int, top : number)
	return ((x{int} * is_in_range(x{int}, 0, top{number})) - (top{int} * sh_right(top{int} - x{int}, 31)))
end function

function timed_display.trigger(control_id : int, text : unknown, time : int)
	declare local _id : int := search[timed_display.controls{int[]}, control_id{int}]
	if(_id{int} # - 1)
		timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := time{int}
		if(time{int} = 0)
			timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := 1200
		end if
		timed_display.texts[_id{int}]{string} := text{unknown}
		timed_display.properties[_id{int}]{int} := 0
		timed_display.counters[_id{int}]{int} := 0
	else
		_id{int} := search[timed_display.controls{int[]}, - 1]
		if(_id{int} # - 1)
			timed_display.controls[_id{int}]{int} := control_id{int}
			timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := time{int}
			if(time{int} = 0)
				timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := 1200
			end if
			timed_display.texts[_id{int}]{string} := text{unknown}
			timed_display.counters[_id{int}]{int} := 0
			timed_display.properties[_id{int}]{int} := 0
		else
			control_id{int} -> text := text{unknown}
		end if
	end if
end function

function div(x : number, y : number)
	return ((x{number} + (x{number} mod y{number})) / y{number})
end function

function ResetRand
	___M.Seed{int} := 1107155288
end function

function array.cumsum(array : number[], new_array : number[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{number[]}] - 1)) 
		new_array[lib.i{int}]{number} := new_array[max(0, lib.i{int} - 1)]{number} + array[lib.i{int}]{number}
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function array.max(array : int[]) -> result : int
	result{int} := array[0]{int}
	lib.i{int} := 1
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		result{int} := max(array[lib.i{int}]{int}, result{int})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function floatmask.clear(float_mask : int[])
	float_mask[0]{int} := 0
	float_mask[1]{int} := 0
end function

function Rand(min : number, max : number) -> result : int
	___M.Seed{int} := (8088405 * ___M.Seed{int}) + 1
	result{int} := ((sh_right(___M.Seed{int}, 8) .and. 16777215) mod ((max{number} - min{number}) + 1)) + min{int}
end function

function motion.add_fader(ui_id : int, id : int, min : int, max : int, slot : int)
	motion.id{int} := id{int}
	if(motion.ui_ids[motion.id{int}]{int} # - 1)
		message("motion id already in use")
	end if
	if(motion.id{int} # - 1)
		motion.ui_ids[motion.id{int}]{int} := ui_id{int}
		motion.min[motion.id{int}]{int} := min{int}
		motion.max[motion.id{int}]{int} := max{int}
		motion.type[motion.id{int}]{int} := 2
		motion.slot[motion.id{int}]{int} := slot{int}
		declare local _parent : int := ui_id{int} -> parent_panel
		motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> x := (ui_id{int} -> x + (ui_id{int} -> width / 2)) - (motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> width / 2)
		motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> y := (ui_id{int} -> y + ui_id{int} -> height) + 5
		motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> parent_panel := _parent{int}
		motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> z_layer := 1
		motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int} -> x := (ui_id{int} -> x + ui_id{int} -> width) + 2
		motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int} -> y := ui_id{int} -> y
		motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int} -> parent_panel := _parent{int}
		set_slider_properties(motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int}, ui_id{int} -> default, "", - 1200)
		motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> width := 20
		motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> height := 100
		motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
		motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> x := (ui_id{int} -> x + (ui_id{int} -> width / 2)) - 20
		motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> y := ui_id{int} -> y
		motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> parent_panel := _parent{int}
		set_slider_properties(motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int}, ui_id{int} -> default, "", - 1200)
		motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> width := 15
		motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> height := 100
		motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
		motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> x := ui_id{int} -> x + (ui_id{int} -> width / 2)
		motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> y := ui_id{int} -> y
		motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> parent_panel := _parent{int}
		motion.update_visibility(ui_id{int})
	end if
end function

function fxRack.load{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _inc : int
	_inc{int} := 0
	if(fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int} = 1)
		fxRack.save_array[0]{int} := 0
		inc(_inc{int})
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			fx_bypass[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
			inc(_inc{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			delay_sync[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
			inc(_inc{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			loaded_fx_types[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
			inc(_inc{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			loaded_fx_subtypes[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
			inc(_inc{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (3 - 1)) 
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
				sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
				inc(_inc{int})
				motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
				inc(_inc{int})
				motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
				inc(_inc{int})
				motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
				inc(_inc{int})
				motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_fxrack_control[active_slot{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
				inc(_inc{int})
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		motion.sli_min[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		motion.sli_max[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		motion.btn_enable[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		motion.mnu_source[search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 2) 
			eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
			inc(_inc{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 2) 
			eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
			inc(_inc{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= 2) 
			eq.sli_q[active_slot{int}, i{int}]{int} -> value := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
			inc(_inc{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		eq_position[active_slot{int}]{int} := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		inc(_inc{int})
		eq_bypass[active_slot{int}]{int} := fxRack.save_array[_inc{int}]{int}
		call eq.curve
		call update_eq_handles
		call motion.update
		call fxRack.update_allround
		s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]
		if(s{int} # - 1)
			fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
			fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
			fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
			fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
			fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}
			if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
				call fxRack.execute_slider
			end if
		end if
		string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
		s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]
		if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
								inc(ii{int})
							end while
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
				lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
				timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
			end if
		end if
		s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int}]
		if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
