						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
								inc(ii{int})
							end while
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
				lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
				timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
			end if
		end if
		sli_attack[active_slot{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
		s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]
		if(s{int} # - 1)
			fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
			fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
			fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
			fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
			fxRack.ui_id{int} := sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}
			if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
				call fxRack.execute_slider
			end if
		end if
		string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
		s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]
		if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
								inc(ii{int})
							end while
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
				lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
				timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
			end if
		end if
		s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int}]
		if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
								inc(ii{int})
							end while
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
			if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
				lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
				timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
			end if
		end if
		sli_release[active_slot{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
	else
		message("INSTRUMENT FX PRESET OF " & slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} & " NOT FOUND")
	end if
end function

function non_rpt_random(last_random : int, min_random : int, max_random : number) -> result : int
	result{int} := Rand(min_random{int} + 1, max_random{number})
	result{int} := (last_random{int} + result{int}) mod (max_random{int} + 1)
	last_random{int} := result{int}
end function

function trim(input : real, decim : int)
	return (round(input{real} * pow(10, int_to_real(decim{int}))) / pow(10, int_to_real(decim{int})))
end function

function min(a : int, b : number)
	return (a{int} - ((a{int} - b{int}) .and. sh_right([b{int} - a{int}], 31)))
end function

function floatmask.sh_right(float_mask : int[], pos : int)
	if(pos{int} < 32)
		float_mask[1]{int} := sh_right_safe(float_mask[1]{int}, pos{int}) .or. sh_left(float_mask[0]{int}, 32 - pos{int})
		float_mask[0]{int} := sh_right_safe(float_mask[0]{int}, pos{int})
	else
		float_mask[1]{int} := sh_right_safe(float_mask[0]{int}, pos{int} - 32)
		float_mask[0]{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function motion.update{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _type_str : string := ""
	declare local _curr_contr : int := 0
	if(motion.update_defense{int} = 0)
		motion.update_defense{int} := 1
		motion.iterator{int} := 0
		while(motion.iterator{int} <= (140 - 1)) 
			if(motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
				if(motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int})
					motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
					motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
					motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> width := 60
					motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> height := 20
					motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> x := (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> x + (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> width / 2)) - 60
					motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> y := (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> y + motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> height) + 5
					motion.lbl_min[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> parent_panel := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> parent_panel
					motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> width := 60
					motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> height := 20
					motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> x := (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> x + (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> width / 2)) - 60
					motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> y := (motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> y + motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> height) + 5
					motion.lbl_max[_curr_contr{int}]{int} -> parent_panel := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> parent_panel
					inc(_curr_contr{int})
					if(_curr_contr{int} > 4)
						message(" *** ERROR *** to many motion controls at the same time! Increase MOTION.MAX_CONCURRENT_CONTROLS! ")
					end if
				end if
				motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_fx_modulation" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
				if(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value = 0)
					motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_fx_toggle_modwheel"
				else
					if(motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
						motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_fx_toggle_lfo"
					end if
				end if
			else
				motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_fx_handles" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
			end if
			inc(motion.iterator{int})
		end while
		wait(10000)
		motion.update_defense{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function max(a : int, b : number)
	return (a{int} - ((a{int} - b{int}) .and. sh_right([a{int} - b{int}], 31)))
end function

function binary.to.decimal(length : int, input_array : int[]) -> result : int
	result{int} := 0
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (length{int} - 1)) 
		result{int} := result{int} + (input_array[(length{int} - 1) - lib.i{int}]{int} * real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real(lib.i{int}))))
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function chord.get_history(back : int)
	if(history_array[0, ((history_pointers[0]{int} + back{int}) + 10) mod 10]{int} = 1)
		if(history_array[0, ((history_pointers[0]{int} + 1) + 10) mod 10]{int} = 0)
			call chord.save_history
			history_pointers[0]{int} := ((history_pointers[0]{int} + back{int}) + 10) mod 10
		end if
		history_pointers[0]{int} := ((history_pointers[0]{int} + back{int}) + 10) mod 10
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (128 - 1)) 
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (6 - 1)) 
				chords[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := chords_history[history_pointers[0]{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			chords.octaves[i{int}]{int} := chords.octaves_history[history_pointers[0]{int}, i{int}]{int}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
				timeline_keyswitches[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := timeline_keyswitches_history[history_pointers[0]{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		call update_chord_slots
		call ui.update_minus_button
		call chord.get_current_chord
		active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		mnu_bass_note{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		call update_chord_info_label
		remote_chromatic_buttons(active_root{int})
	end if
	call ui.update_undo_redo_buttons
end function

function update_key_colors
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 127) 
		set_key_color(i{int}, KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{int})
		set_key_type(i{int}, NI_KEY_TYPE_NONE{int})
		set_key_name(i{int}, "")
		set_key_pressed(i{int}, 0)
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := global_range.low{int}
	while(i{int} <= global_range.high{int}) 
		set_key_color(i{int}, KEY_COLOR_BLUE{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(btn_midi_mode{int} = 0)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
			set_key_color(keyswitches[i{int}]{int} + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), KEY_COLOR_RED{int})
			set_key_type(keyswitches[i{int}]{int} + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), NI_KEY_TYPE_CONTROL{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		if(mnu_keyswitch{int} # 4)
			set_key_color(keyswitches[current_keyswitch{int}]{int} + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), KEY_COLOR_ORANGE{int})
			set_key_pressed(keyswitches[current_keyswitch{int}]{int} + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), 1)
			set_key_color(43 + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), KEY_COLOR_GREEN{int})
		else
			set_key_color(43 + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), KEY_COLOR_LIME{int})
		end if
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
			set_key_name(keyswitches[i{int}]{int} + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), keyswitches_names[i{int}]{string})
			set_key_type(keyswitches[i{int}]{int} + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), NI_KEY_TYPE_CONTROL{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		set_key_name(43 + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), keyswitches_names[4]{string})
		set_key_type(43 + (12 * mnu_ks{int}), NI_KEY_TYPE_CONTROL{int})
	end if
end function

function find.position_slot_buttons
	panel.find_external{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_shape_page{int} .or. btn_play_page{int}]{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		btn_solo[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[0]{int}
		btn_mute[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[0]{int}
		btn_solo[i{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_solo" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}
		btn_mute[i{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_mute" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int}]{int}]{string}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
		btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_shape_page{int} .or. btn_play_page{int}]{int}
		lbl_slot_icon[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_shape_page{int} .or. btn_play_page{int}]{int}
		btn_apply_accent[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_play_page{int}]{int}
		lbl_slot_icon[i{int}]{int} -> picture := get_slot_icon(i{int} + slot_group_offset{int})
		btn_solo[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_shape_page{int} .or. btn_play_page{int}]{int}
		btn_mute[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_shape_page{int} .or. btn_play_page{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	update_slot_names
	if(btn_shape_page{int} = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> picture := "alpha"
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> width := 100
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> height := 70
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text_alignment := 1
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> textpos_y := 45
			a{int} := ((850 / 2) - (btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> width / 2)) - ((btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> width + UI.SLOT_BUTTON_SHAPE_DISTANCE{int}) * 2)
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> x := a{int} + ((btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> width + UI.SLOT_BUTTON_SHAPE_DISTANCE{int}) * (i{int} mod 5))
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> y := 100 + 18
			lbl_slot_icon[i{int}]{int} -> x := btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> x + 26
			lbl_slot_icon[i{int}]{int} -> y := btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> y - 1
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			set_bounds(btn_solo[i{int}]{int}, (btn_slot[i{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> pos_x + (btn_slot[i{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> width / 2)) - 21, (100 + 25) + 62)
			set_bounds(btn_mute[i{int}]{int}, (btn_slot[i{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> pos_x + (btn_slot[i{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> width / 2)) + 8, (100 + 25) + 62)
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> text := "" & str_slot_group_numbers[0]{string}
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> textpos_y := 0
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> pos_x := btn_slot0{unknown} -> pos_x - 44
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> picture := "btn_shape_previous"
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> pos_y := (btn_slot0{unknown} -> pos_y + 20) - 2
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> width := 60
		btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> height := 18
		btn_next_slot_group{int} -> text := str_slot_group_numbers[1]{string} & " "
		btn_next_slot_group{int} -> textpos_y := 0
		btn_next_slot_group{int} -> pos_x := (850 - btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> pos_x) - 60
		btn_next_slot_group{int} -> pos_y := (btn_slot0{unknown} -> pos_y + 20) - 2
		btn_next_slot_group{int} -> picture := "btn_shape_next"
		btn_next_slot_group{int} -> width := 60
		btn_next_slot_group{int} -> height := 18
		update_slot_group_underline_position
	else
		if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_play_channel_select" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> pos_x := 63 + 1
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> pos_y := (140 + ((59 + 4) * i{int})) - 1
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> width := (245 - 63) + (visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} * int(round(real(570) / real(visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}))))
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> height := (59 + 4) - 2
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> textpos_y := 8
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text_alignment := 0
				set_bounds(lbl_slot_icon[i{int}]{int}, btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> x + 1, btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> y + 5)
				set_bounds(btn_apply_accent[i{int}]{int}, ((btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> x + 245) - 63) - 24, (btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> y + (59 / 2)) - 9)
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
				set_bounds(btn_solo[i{int}]{int}, btn_slot[i{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> x + 51, btn_slot[i{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> y + 33)
				set_bounds(btn_mute[i{int}]{int}, btn_solo[i{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> x + 25, btn_slot[i{int} mod (10 / 2)]{int} -> y + 33)
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			set_bounds(lbl_slot_group{int}, (btn_slot[0]{int} -> pos_x + (btn_slot[0]{int} -> width / 2)) - (lbl_slot_group{int} -> width / 2), btn_slot[0]{int} -> pos_y - 100)
			set_bounds(btn_prev_slot_group{int}, 15, 124, 50, 80)
			btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> text := str_slot_group_numbers[0]{string}
			btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> textpos_y := 10
			btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> picture := "btn_skip_small_vertical_up"
			set_bounds(btn_next_slot_group{int}, 14, 169, 50, 34)
			btn_next_slot_group{int} -> text := " " & str_slot_group_numbers[1]{string}
			btn_next_slot_group{int} -> picture := "btn_skip_small_vertical_down"
			update_slot_group_underline_position
			if(seq.view_mode{int} = 1)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
					btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> width := (52 * seq.view_mode{int}) + ((245 - 63) * ne(seq.view_mode{int}))
					btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := ""
					btn_solo[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[eq(i{int}, active_slot{int})]{int}
					btn_mute[i{int}]{int} -> hide := hide_state[eq(i{int}, active_slot{int})]{int}
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				btn_solo[active_slot{int}]{int} -> x := btn_solo[active_slot{int} - slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> x + 42
				btn_mute[active_slot{int}]{int} -> x := btn_mute[active_slot{int} - slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> x + 42
				btn_solo[active_slot{int}]{int} -> y := lbl_play_instrument_title{int} -> y + 25
				btn_mute[active_slot{int}]{int} -> y := lbl_play_instrument_title{int} -> y + 25
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function on_btn_scan_presets
	lbl_scan_animation{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{int}]{int}
	set_bounds(lbl_scan_animation{int}, btn_scan_presets{int} -> x + 1, btn_scan_presets{int} -> y + 1)
	btn_scan_presets{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_scan_presets{int})]{int}
	btn_disable_input{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{int}]{int}
	lbl_scan_info{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{int}]{int}
	lbl_scan_info{int} -> text := "Scanning files..."
	if(btn_scan_presets{int} -> value = 0)
		file_browser{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_scan_info{int} -> text := ""
	end if
end function

function vector.set(ls : int[], idx : int, val : int)
	ls[min(ls[0]{int} + 1, idx{int} + 1)]{int} := val{int}
	if(idx{int} > ls[0]{int})
		inc(ls[0]{int})
	end if
end function

function flip_bit(x : int, pos : int)
	return (.not. (.not. (x{int} .and. .not. (x{int} .and. sh_left(1, pos{int}))) .and. .not. (sh_left(1, pos{int}) .and. .not. (x{int} .and. sh_left(1, pos{int})))))
end function

function save.resource_arrays
	save_array(user_deleted_presets{int[]}, 1)
	save_array(user_preset_tags0{int[]}, 1)
	save_array(user_preset_tags1{int[]}, 1)
	save_array(user_preset_titles{string[]}, 1)
	save_array(user_preset_numbers{int[]}, 1)
	save_array(user_preset_info{string[]}, 1)
end function

function read_slot_colors
	declare local _idx : int
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		_idx{int} := search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			slot_colors[i{int}]{int} := ((_idx{int} / 16) / 11) + 1
		else
			slot_colors[i{int}]{int} := 0
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function bitlist.get(bit_list : int, idx : int)
	return (sh_right(bit_list{int}, 31 - idx{int}) .and. 1)
end function

function clear_bit(x : int, pos : int)
	return (x{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{int}))
end function

function set_bit(x : int, pos : int)
	return (x{int} .or. sh_left(1, pos{int}))
end function

function load_preset{thread-unsafe}
	declare local _preset_version : int
	preset.is_loading{int} := 1
	floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[preset.idx{int}]{int}, preset_tags1[preset.idx{int}]{int})
	preset.n{int} := 0 + (is_user_preset(presetmask{int[]}) * preset.CONTENT_IDX{int})
	_preset_version{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
	inc(preset.n{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[slot.loaded_sound{int[]}] - 1)) 
		slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_volume{int[]}] - 1)) 
		sli_volume[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_volume_min{int[]}] - 1)) 
		sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_volume_max{int[]}] - 1)) 
		sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_solo_mute_states{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_solo_mute_states[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_oct{int[]}] - 1)) 
		sli_oct[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_pan{int[]}] - 1)) 
		sli_pan[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_rev_send{int[]}] - 1)) 
		sli_rev_send[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[mnu_output{int[]}] - 1)) 
		mnu_output[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_fx_bypass{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_fx_bypass[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_delay_sync{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_delay_sync[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_loaded_fx_types{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_loaded_fx_types[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_loaded_fx_subtypes{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_loaded_fx_subtypes[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_sli_fxrack_control[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[eq_position{int[]}] - 1)) 
		eq_position[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[eq_bypass{int[]}] - 1)) 
		eq_bypass[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_eq.sli_freq{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_eq.sli_freq[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_eq.sli_gain{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_eq.sli_gain[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_eq.sli_q{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_eq.sli_q[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_attack{int[]}] - 1)) 
		sli_attack[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_release{int[]}] - 1)) 
		sli_release[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(btn_global_fx_lock{int} = 0)
		mnu_reverb_type{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		mnu_ir{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		sli_reverb_length{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		sli_reverb_output{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		btn_comp_bypass{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		sli_comp_threshold{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		sli_comp_gain{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_lfo_bypass{int[]}] - 1)) 
			btn_lfo_bypass[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[sli_lfo_freq{int[]}] - 1)) 
			sli_lfo_freq[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_lfo_sync{int[]}] - 1)) 
			btn_lfo_sync[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[mnu_lfo_type{int[]}] - 1)) 
			mnu_lfo_type[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	else
		preset.n{int} := preset.n{int} + 12
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[motion.sli_min{int[]}] - 1)) 
		motion.sli_min[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[motion.sli_max{int[]}] - 1)) 
		motion.sli_max[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[motion.btn_enable{int[]}] - 1)) 
		motion.btn_enable[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[motion.mnu_source{int[]}] - 1)) 
		motion.mnu_source[i{int}]{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[oct_shifts{int[]}] - 1)) 
		oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	current_keyswitch{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
	inc(preset.n{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_seq.velo_data{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_seq.velo_data[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_seq.pitch_data{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_seq.pitch_data[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_SEQ_PARAMETERS{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_SEQ_PARAMETERS[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	btn_use_global_accents{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
	inc(preset.n{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[global_accent_meter_preset{int[]}] - 1)) 
		global_accent_meter_preset[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_global_accents{int[]}] - 1)) 
		_global_accents[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[apply_accent{int[]}] - 1)) 
		apply_accent[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	mnu_signature{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
	inc(preset.n{int})
	mnu_length_bar{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
	inc(preset.n{int})
	if(btn_chorddesigner_lock{int} = 0)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_chords{int[]}] - 1)) 
			_chords[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_jams{int[]}] - 1)) 
			_jams[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_timeline_keyswitches{int[]}] - 1)) 
			_timeline_keyswitches[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_dynamic_positions{int[]}] - 1)) 
			_dynamic_positions[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[_line_mode{int[]}] - 1)) 
			_line_mode[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		btn_dynamics_active{int} -> value := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		chord_set_num{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
		inc(preset.n{int})
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[chords.octaves{int[]}] - 1)) 
			chords.octaves[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (num_elements[jams.octaves{int[]}] - 1)) 
			jams.octaves[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.n{int}]{int}
			inc(preset.n{int})
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
	if(_preset_version{int} = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (4 - 1)) 
					SEQ_PARAMETERS[ii{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} := 1
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
	call read_slot_colors
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		sli_volume.previous[i{int}]{int} := sli_volume[i{int}]{int}
		solo_mute_states[0, i{int}]{int} := 0
		solo_mute_states[1, i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	call update_solo_mute_buttons
	call ui.update_seq_params
	call ui.update_seq_display
	call update_morph_faders
	call execute_morph_faders
	call execute_shape_controls
	call global_fx.reload
	call fxRack.update_allround
	call update_slot_names
	call global_range.compute
	call update_key_colors
	call ui.update_seq_params
	call update_jam_slots
	call update_chord_slots
	call dynamics.update
	panel.play.arp{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	load_keyswitch(1)
	call set_solo_mute
	update_speed_flag{int} := 1
	midi_update_flag{int} := 1
	chord_set_num{int} := max(chord_set_num{int}, 1)
	set_controller(dyn_cc_num{int}, 98)
	wait(1000)
	current_controller{int} := dyn_cc_num{int}
	current_controller_channel{int} := 0
	call controller_callback
	preset.is_loading{int} := 0
end function

function preview.update_purge
end function

function isBitSet(x : int, pos : int)
	return (sh_right(x{int}, pos{int}) .and. 1)
end function

function scale.clamp.to(input : int, fromMin : number, fromMax : number, toMin : int, toMax : int)
	return (real_to_int(scale.range(int_to_real(((input{int} * (1 + (sh_right(fromMax{int} - input{int}, 31) .or. sh_right(input{int} - fromMin{int}, 31)))) - (fromMin{int} * sh_right(input{int} - fromMin{int}, 31))) - (fromMax{int} * sh_right(fromMax{int} - input{int}, 31))), int_to_real(fromMin{int}), int_to_real(fromMax{int}), int_to_real(toMin{int}), int_to_real(toMax{int}))))
end function

function vector.search(ls : int[], value : int)
	return (search[ls{int[]}, value{int}, 1, ls[0]{int}])
end function

function scale.range.log(input : number, currentMin : number, currentMax : number, scaleToMin : real, scaleToMax : real)
	return (pow(10, (log(scaleToMin{real}) / log(10)) + (((input{number} - currentMin{number}) / (currentMax{number} - currentMin{number})) * ((log(scaleToMax{real}) / log(10)) - (log(scaleToMin{real}) / log(10))))))
end function

function update_user_preset_to_1_1(float_mask : int[], old_user_preset_version : int)
	if(old_user_preset_version{int} = 1)
		floatmask.clear(bit_list2{int[]})
		floatmask.get_range(float_mask{int[]}, 14, 33, bit_list2{int[]})
		floatmask.set_range(float_mask{int[]}, 14, 33, 0)
		floatmask.sh_right(bit_list2{int[]}, 1)
		floatmask.or(float_mask{int[]}, bit_list2{int[]}, float_mask{int[]})
	end if
end function

function scale.slider(input : int, scaleToMin : number, scaleToMax : number)
	return (real_to_int(((int_to_real(input{int}) * (scaleToMax{number} - scaleToMin{number})) / 1e+06) + scaleToMin{real}))
end function

function edit.tags{thread-unsafe}
	preset.usr_name{string} := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}
	message("@preset.usr_name: " & preset.usr_name{string})
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka")
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"))
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 0
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka")
	wait_async(save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & preset.usr_name{string} & ".nka"))
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[preset.array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		preset.arrayBuffer[i{int}]{int} := preset.array[i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int} := 1
	floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]})
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka")
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka"))
	user_deleted_presets[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := 0
	user_deleted_presets[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := 1
	user_preset_tags0[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}
	user_preset_tags1[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{int} := preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}
	user_preset_titles[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{string} := txt_presetname{string} -> text
	user_preset_info[search[user_preset_numbers{int[]}, preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}]]{string} := get_preset_info
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[preset.array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		preset.array[i{int}]{int} := preset.arrayBuffer[i{int}]{int}
		preset.arrayBuffer[i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka")
	message("SAVED AS: " & base_path{string} & txt_presetname{string} -> text & ".nka")
	call update.preset_situation
	preset.idx{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
	save.resource_arrays
	btn_save{int} := 0
	call off_saving_preset_dialog
	browser.load_preset
end function

function scale.range.slider(input : number, scaleToMin : number, scaleToMax : number)
	return (real_to_int(((input{number} * (scaleToMax{number} - scaleToMin{number})) / 1e+06) + scaleToMin{real}))
end function

function _test_message_unsuccessful(count : unknown, got : unknown, expected : unknown, time_elapsed : unknown)
	message("Test " & count{unknown} & " FAILED. Got " & got{unknown} & ", expected " & expected{unknown} & "." & " Ran for " & time_elapsed{unknown} & " ms.")
end function

function nks.update_shape_slider
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
		sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}) & " dB"
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int} -> value, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
		sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}) & " dB"
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	execute_morph_faders
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		sli_pan[i{int}]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PAN{int}, - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
		sli_rev_send[i{int}]{int} -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0{int}, - 1, 7, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int}) & " dB"
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function assert_side_effects_summary
	declare local success_rate : real
	success_rate{real} := (int_to_real(stests.counter_successful{int}) / int_to_real(stests.counter_successful{int} + stests.counter_unsuccessful{int})) * 100
	_tests_summary_message(stests.separator{string}, stests.counter_successful{int} + stests.counter_unsuccessful{int}, stests.time_init{int}, stests.time_end{int}, success_rate{real})
end function

function assert(func : unknown, expected : unknown)
	declare local result : int
	if((tests.counter_successful{int} + tests.counter_unsuccessful{int}) = 0)
		_test_init_message(tests.separator{string})
		tests.time_init{int} := KSP_TIMER{int}
	end if
	tests.time_elapsed{int} := KSP_TIMER{int}
	result{int} := func{unknown}
	tests.time_elapsed{int} := KSP_TIMER{int} - tests.time_elapsed{int}
	tests.time_end{int} := KSP_TIMER{int}
	if(result{int} = expected{unknown})
		inc(tests.counter_successful{int})
		_test_message_successful(tests.counter_successful{int} + tests.counter_unsuccessful{int}, result{int}, expected{unknown}, tests.time_elapsed{int})
	else
		inc(tests.counter_unsuccessful{int})
		_test_message_unsuccessful(tests.counter_successful{int} + tests.counter_unsuccessful{int}, result{int}, expected{unknown}, tests.time_elapsed{int})
	end if
end function

function bool(x : number)
	return (1 + sh_right(abs(x{number}) - 1, 31))
end function

function assert_side_effects(func : (): unknown, variable : unknown, expected : unknown)
	if((stests.counter_successful{int} + stests.counter_unsuccessful{int}) = 0)
		_test_init_message(stests.separator{string})
		stests.time_init{int} := KSP_TIMER{int}
	end if
	stests.time_elapsed{int} := KSP_TIMER{int}
	func
	stests.time_elapsed{int} := KSP_TIMER{int} - stests.time_elapsed{int}
	stests.time_end{int} := KSP_TIMER{int}
	if(variable{unknown} = expected{unknown})
		inc(stests.counter_successful{int})
		_test_message_successful(stests.counter_successful{int} + stests.counter_unsuccessful{int}, variable{unknown}, expected{unknown}, stests.time_elapsed{int})
	else
		inc(stests.counter_unsuccessful{int})
		_test_message_unsuccessful(stests.counter_successful{int} + stests.counter_unsuccessful{int}, variable{unknown}, expected{unknown}, stests.time_elapsed{int})
	end if
end function

function decimal.to.binary(input : int, output_array : number[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[output_array{number[]}] - 2)) 
		output_array[(num_elements[output_array{number[]}] - 2) - lib.i{int}]{number} := abs(sh_right(- (input{int} .and. sh_left(1, lib.i{int})), 31))
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function floatmask.is_empty(float_mask : number[])
	return (ne(bool(float_mask[0]{number} + float_mask[1]{number})))
end function

function vector.combine(ls : int[], ls2 : int[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (ls2[0]{int} - 1)) 
		vector.push_back(ls{int[]}, ls2[min(ls2[0]{int} + 1, lib.i{int} + 1)]{int})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function gui_animation.show_side_panels(bool : int)
	if(bool{int} = 1)
		anim.mw_fingertouch{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		anim.mw_fade{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_mw_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		anim.mw_lightstrip{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	else
		anim.mw_fingertouch{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		anim.mw_fade{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_mw_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_global_fx_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		anim.mw_lightstrip{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	end if
end function

function timeline.update_midi_export
	declare local _num_bars : int := 0
	declare local _end_idx : int
	declare local _idx : int
	declare local _mix : real
	declare local _dyn_value : int
	declare local _last_dyn_value : int := - 1
	mf_remove_event(by_track(10))
	_num_bars{int} := (16 / 2) * chord_set_num{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((_num_bars{int} * 2) - 1)) 
		if(chords[i{int}, 0]{int} # - 1)
			_end_idx{int} := i{int} + 1
			while((chords[_end_idx{int}, 0]{int} = - 1) and (_end_idx{int} < (_num_bars{int} * 2))) 
				inc(_end_idx{int})
			end while
			chord.lowest_note{int} := 127
			_i{int} := 0
			while(_i{int} <= (7 - 1)) 
				if(chord.types[chords[i{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} # - 1)
					chord.note{int} := ((((chord.playback_octave{int} + (chords.octaves[i{int}]{int} * 12)) + chords[i{int}, 0]{int}) + modes[chords[i{int}, 1]{int}, chord.types[chords[i{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} mod 7]{int}) + ((chord.types[chords[i{int}, 3]{int}, _i{int}]{int} / 7) * 12)) - (bool(chords[i{int}, 5]{int}) * 12)
					if(_i{int} < chords[i{int}, 5]{int})
						chord.note{int} := chord.note{int} + 12
					end if
					chord.lowest_note{int} := min(chord.note{int}, chord.lowest_note{int})
					mf_insert_event(10, [(((i{int} / 2) * 480) * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) + (((i{int} mod 2) * 480) * (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1))], MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, chord.note{int}, chord_velocity{int})
					mf_insert_event(10, [(((_end_idx{int} / 2) * 480) * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) + (((_end_idx{int} mod 2) * 480) * (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1))], MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_OFF{int}, chord.note{int}, 0)
				end if
				inc(_i{int})
			end while
			if(chords[i{int}, 2]{int} # - 1)
				mf_insert_event(10, [(((i{int} / 2) * 480) * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) + (((i{int} mod 2) * 480) * (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1))], MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords[i{int}, 2]{int}), chord_velocity{int})
				mf_insert_event(10, [(((_end_idx{int} / 2) * 480) * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) + (((_end_idx{int} mod 2) * 480) * (meters.2nd_chord_position[mnu_signature{int}]{int} - 1))], MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_OFF{int}, closest_bass_note([chord.lowest_note{int}], chords[i{int}, 2]{int}), 0)
			end if
			if((i{int} mod 2) = 0)
				if(_timeline_keyswitches[i{int} / 2]{int} # - 1)
					mf_insert_event(10, ((i{int} / 2) * 480) * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, keyswitches[_timeline_keyswitches[i{int} / 2]{int}]{int} + (mnu_ks{int} * 12), 127)
					mf_insert_event(10, (((i{int} / 2) * 480) * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}) + 480, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_OFF{int}, keyswitches[_timeline_keyswitches[i{int} / 2]{int}]{int} + (mnu_ks{int} * 12), 0)
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(btn_dynamics_active{int} = 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((_num_bars{int} * 48) - 1)) 
			_idx{int} := i{int} / 24
			_mix{real} := real(i{int} mod 24) / 24
			if((_dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}) # 0)
				if(_line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 0)
					_dyn_value{int} := clamp(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(_mix{real} * real(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int})), 0, 127)
				else
					if(_line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 1)
						_dyn_value{int} := clamp(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int((- (cos(NI_MATH_PI{real} * _mix{real}) - 1) / 2) * real(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int})), 0, 127)
					else
						if(_line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 2)
							_dyn_value{int} := clamp(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(1 - (cos((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2) * real(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}))), 0, 127)
						else
							if(_line_mode[_idx{int}]{int} = 3)
								_dyn_value{int} := clamp(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int} + int(sin((_mix{real} * NI_MATH_PI{real}) / 2) * real(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int} + 1]{int} - _dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int})), 0, 127)
							end if
						end if
					end if
				end if
			else
				if((i{int} mod 24) = 0)
					_dyn_value{int} := clamp(_dynamic_positions[_idx{int}]{int}, 0, 127)
				end if
			end if
			if(_dyn_value{int} # _last_dyn_value{int})
				_last_dyn_value{int} := _dyn_value{int}
				mf_insert_event(10, (i{int} * 10) * eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{int}, 1, _dyn_value{int})
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
	mf_set_export_area("The Score Chord MIDI", - 1, - 1, 10, 10)
	mf_copy_export_area(2)
end function

function fmod(a : real, b : number)
	return (a{real} - (floor([a{real} / b{real}]) * b{real}))
end function

function remote_scale_buttons(exclude : int)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_scale{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # exclude{int})
			btn_scale[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		else
			btn_scale[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function
