function floatmask.equal(float_mask1 : number[], float_mask2 : number[])
	return (eq(((float_mask1[0]{number} - float_mask2[0]{number}) + float_mask1[1]{number}) - float_mask2[1]{number}, 0))
end function

function preview.allow_group(eventID : int, note : unknown)
	declare local i : int
	set_event_mark(eventID{int}, MARK_2{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (NUM_GROUPS{int} - 1)) 
		set_event_par_arr(eventID{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, i{int})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	if(instrument.type[preview_sound{int}]{int} = 0)
		set_event_par_arr(eventID{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, instrument.start_group[preview_sound{int}]{int} + 1)
		redirect_output(eventID{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, 15)
	else
		if(instrument.type[preview_sound{int}]{int} = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[preview_sound{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				set_event_par_arr(eventID{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (instrument.start_group[preview_sound{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1)
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
	end if
end function

function play_sus_note(s : int)
	declare local i : int
	declare local ii : int
	declare local iii : int
	i{int} := s{int}
	if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
			ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
			while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
				if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
					note_check{int} := 1
					iii{int} := 0
					while(iii{int} <= (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						if(ii{int} = selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, iii{int}]{int})
							note_check{int} := 0
						end if
						inc(iii{int})
					end while
					if(note_check{int} = 1)
						note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
						mf.note_check{int} := 1
						if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1) and (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} # 14))
							mf_set_event_par(mf.sustained_events[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}, (NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - mf.on_note_timestamps[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}) - 33)
						end if
						last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
					end if
				end if
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (selected_cursor[i{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				if(last_note_ids[i{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int} = - 1)
					last_note_ids[i{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int} := play_note(selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} + (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12), 100, 0, - 1)
					sustained.active{int} := 1
					set_event_mark(last_note_ids[i{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int}, MARK_1{int})
					set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[i{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, int(1e+06 * (real([(int([real(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0, 1]{int} - seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0, 0]{int}) * (real(CC[dyn_cc_num{int}]{int}) / 128)]) + seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0, 0]{int}) * ne(eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0, 1]{int}, 0) * eq(seq.velo_data[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0, 0]{int}, 0))]) / 127)), 1)
					if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{int} = 1)
						mf.sustained_events[i{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int} := mf_insert_event(i{int}, mf.on_note_timestamps[i{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int} - transport_stamp{int}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} + (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12), 100)
						mf.sustained_events_positions[i{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int} := NI_SONG_POSITION{int}
					end if
					_allow_group(last_note_ids[i{int}, selected_notes_buffer[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}]{int}, i{int}, note{int})
				end if
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
		end if
	end if
end function

function set_chord(pos : unknown, root : int, type : int, bass : int, voicing : int, offset : int)
	chords[pos{unknown}, 0]{int} := root{int}
	chords[pos{unknown}, 1]{int} := chord_modes_scale[type{int}]{int}
	chords[pos{unknown}, 3]{int} := chord_modes_tones[type{int}]{int}
	chords[pos{unknown}, 4]{int} := type{int}
	chords[pos{unknown}, 2]{int} := bass{int}
	chords[pos{unknown}, 5]{int} := voicing{int}
	chords.octaves[pos{unknown}]{int} := offset{int}
end function

function animation.position.start(ui_id : int, start_pos_x : int, start_pos_y : int, end_pos_x : int, end_pos_y : int, length : int, mode : int) -> result : int
	declare local id : int := search[animation.controls{int[]}, - 1]
	if(id{int} # - 1)
		animation.controls[id{int}]{int} := ui_id{int}
		animation.time_left[id{int}]{int} := length{int}
		animation.length[id{int}]{int} := length{int}
		animation.type[id{int}]{int} := 0
		animation.start_pos[id{int}, 0]{int} := start_pos_x{int}
		animation.start_pos[id{int}, 1]{int} := start_pos_y{int}
		animation.end_pos[id{int}, 0]{int} := end_pos_x{int}
		animation.end_pos[id{int}, 1]{int} := end_pos_y{int}
		animation.mode[id{int}]{int} := mode{int}
	else
		message("***Error in animation.ksp *** too many animations at the same time. Increase value of MAX_ANIMATIONS")
	end if
	result{int} := id{int}
	message("started animation")
end function

function RandomSeed
	___M.Seed{int} := KSP_TIMER{int}
end function

function check_note_buffer_state
	cursor{int} := 0
	array.clear(note_buffer{int[]})
	ii{int} := 44 + (12 * mnu_ks{int})
	while(ii{int} <= 127) 
		if(KEY_DOWN[ii{int}]{int} = 1)
			note_buffer[cursor{int}]{int} := ii{int}
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
				if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1) and (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} # 14))
					if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
						if((mf.on_note_timestamps[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} < NI_SONG_POSITION{int}) and (last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} = - 1))
							mf.on_note_timestamps[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := NI_SONG_POSITION{int}
							message("set timestamp in RCB")
						end if
					end if
				end if
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			inc(cursor{int})
		else
			if(KEY_DOWN[ii{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
					if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
						note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
						if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1) and (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} # 14))
							mf_set_event_par(mf.sustained_events[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}, NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - mf.on_note_timestamps[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
							mf.on_note_timestamps[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
							message("released engine note")
						end if
						if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14)
							message("released free note")
							mf_set_event_par(mf.sustained_events[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}, NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - mf.on_note_timestamps[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
						end if
						last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
					end if
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			end if
		end if
		inc(ii{int})
	end while
	call sort_buffer
end function

function floatmask.control_to_floatmask(float_mask : int[], control_array : [])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (min(64, num_elements[control_array{[]}]) - 1)) 
		floatmask.set(float_mask{int[]}, lib.i{int}, control_array[lib.i{int}]{unknown} -> value)
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function array.map(array : [], func : (): unknown) -> result : unknown
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)) 
		array[lib.i{int}]{unknown} := func(array[lib.i{int}]{unknown})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function motion.update_visibility(ui_id : int)
	motion.id{int} := search[motion.ui_ids{int[]}, ui_id{int}]
	if(motion.id{int} # - 1)
		if(ui_id{int} -> hide # HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int})
			motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			if(motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> value = 1)
				motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			end if
		else
			motion.btn_enable[motion.id{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			motion.mnu_source[motion.id{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			motion.sli_min[motion.id{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			motion.sli_max[motion.id{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
	end if
end function

function copy_arp(ks : unknown, s : unknown)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 255) 
		arp_data.copy[i{int} * 2]{int} := seq.velo_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}, 0]{int}
		arp_data.copy[(i{int} * 2) + 1]{int} := seq.velo_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}, 1]{int}
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 8) 
			arp_data.copy[(512 + (i{int} * 9)) + ii{int}]{int} := seq.pitch_data[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
			arp_data.copy[((512 + (9 * 256)) + (i{int} * 9)) + ii{int}]{int} := seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 6) 
		arp_data.copy[(512 + ((9 * 256) * 2)) + i{int}]{int} := SEQ_PARAMETERS[ks{unknown}, s{unknown}, i{int}]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	arp_data.copy[(512 + ((9 * 256) * 2)) + 7]{int} := apply_accent[active_slot{int}]{int}
	arp_data.copy[(512 + ((9 * 256) * 2)) + 8]{int} := instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{unknown}]{int}]{int}
end function

function bitlist.swap(bit_list : int, idx1 : int, idx2 : int)
	declare local val_idx1 : int := bitlist.get(bit_list{int}, idx1{int})
	declare local val_idx2 : int := bitlist.get(bit_list{int}, idx2{int})
	bitlist.set(bit_list{int}, idx1{int}, val_idx2{int})
	bitlist.set(bit_list{int}, idx2{int}, val_idx1{int})
end function

function tinylist2d.search(ls : int[], row : unknown, val : int)
	return (tinylist.search(ls[row{unknown}]{int}, val{int}))
end function

function remote_btn_open_fx(except : unknown)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
		btn_open_fx[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	btn_open_fx[except{unknown}]{int} -> value := 1
end function

function ui_array.map(control_array : any[], param : int, val : int)
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[control_array{any[]}] - 1)) 
		set_control_par(control_array[lib.i{int}]{any}, param{int}, val{int})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function scale.range.real(input : int, currentMin : real, currentMax : number, scaleToMin : number, scaleToMax : number)
	return (real_to_int((((int_to_real(input{int}) - currentMin{real}) * (scaleToMax{number} - scaleToMin{number})) / (currentMax{real} - currentMin{real})) + scaleToMin{real}))
end function

function tinylist.set(ls : int, idx : int, val : int)
	ls{int} := (ls{int} .and. .not. sh_left(real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))) - 1, [(32 - ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - (min(idx{int}, (31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1) * ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))])) .or. sh_left(min(val{int}, real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))) - 1), [(32 - ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - (min(idx{int}, (31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1) * ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))])
end function

function set_title_colors(offset : int)
	declare local _num_slots : int
	declare local _color : int
	declare local _idx : int
	_num_slots{int} := min(10, 5)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= 4) 
		anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		_color{int} := slot_colors[((i{int} * _num_slots{int}) / 5) + offset{int}]{int} - 1
		if(_color{int} >= 0)
			anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{int}]{int} -> picture_state := _color{int}
		else
			anim.bg_score_title.colors[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		if(_num_slots{int} = 2)
			anim.bg_score_title.colors[2]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function vector.insert(ls : int[], idx : int, val : int)
	if(idx{int} > ls[0]{int})
		vector.push_back(ls{int[]}, val{int})
	else
		lib.i{int} := ls[0]{int}
		while(lib.i{int} >= (idx{int} + 1)) 
			ls[lib.i{int} + 1]{int} := ls[lib.i{int}]{int}
			dec(lib.i{int})
		end while
		ls[idx{int} + 1]{int} := val{int}
		inc(ls[0]{int})
	end if
end function

function modify_bit(x : int, pos : int, state : number)
	return (.not. (.not. ((x{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{int})) .and. .not. ((x{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{int})) .and. (- state{number} .and. sh_left(1, pos{int})))) .and. .not. ((- state{number} .and. sh_left(1, pos{int})) .and. .not. ((x{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{int})) .and. (- state{number} .and. sh_left(1, pos{int}))))))
end function

function _tests_summary_message(separator : any, count : unknown, time_start : number, time_end : number, success_rate : unknown)
	message(separator{any})
	message("TESTS SUMMARY")
	message("Ran " & count{unknown} & " tests in " & (time_end{number} - time_start{number}) & " ms.")
	message(success_rate{unknown} & "% Success, " & tests.counter_unsuccessful{int} & " out of " & (tests.counter_successful{int} + tests.counter_unsuccessful{int}) & " tests failed.")
end function

function tinylist2d.get(ls : int[], x : unknown, y : int)
	return (tinylist.get(ls[x{unknown}]{int}, y{int}))
end function

function table.set(ls : int, idx : int, val : unknown)
	set_menu_item_value(ls{int}, min(get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0) + 1, idx{int} + 1), val{unknown})
	if(idx{int} > get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0))
		set_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0, get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0) + 1)
	end if
end function

function is_user_preset(float_mask : int[])
	return (floatmask.get(float_mask{int[]}, 0) * preset.allow_user{int})
end function

function vector.erase(ls : int[], idx : int)
	if(idx{int} < ls[0]{int})
		lib.i{int} := idx{int} + 2
		while(lib.i{int} <= ls[0]{int}) 
			ls[lib.i{int} - 1]{int} := ls[lib.i{int}]{int}
			inc(lib.i{int})
		end while
	end if
	dec(ls[0]{int})
end function

function array.insert(array : [], idx : int, val : unknown)
	lib.i{int} := num_elements[array{[]}] - 2
	while(lib.i{int} >= idx{int}) 
		array[lib.i{int} + 1]{unknown} := array[lib.i{int}]{unknown}
		dec(lib.i{int})
	end while
	array[idx{int}]{unknown} := val{unknown}
end function

function doubleclick_check(double_click_control : unknown){thread-unsafe}
	wait((CLICKK_INTERVAL{int} * 1000) + 2000)
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} - clicktime[1]{int}) > CLICKK_INTERVAL{int})
		double_click_control{unknown} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		clicktime[2]{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function array.copy(original : [], empty : [])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[original{[]}] - 1)) 
		empty[lib.i{int}]{unknown} := original[lib.i{int}]{unknown}
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function single_nki.gui_update
	if(show_fx_rack{int} = 0)
		eq_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_fxrack_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		btn_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} := 0
		lbl_fxrack_instrument_settings{int} -> picture_state := 0
	else
		eq_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	end if
end function

function table.push_back(ls : int, val : unknown)
	set_menu_item_value(ls{int}, max(get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0) + 1, 1), val{unknown})
	set_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0, get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0) + 1)
end function

function array.reset(array : [], val : unknown)
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)) 
		array[lib.i{int}]{unknown} := val{unknown}
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function prepare_data_to_transfer(idx1 : unknown, idx2 : unknown, data : unknown)
	transfer.chord_array[idx1{unknown}, idx2{unknown}]{int} := data{unknown}
end function

function ui.update_seq_display
	num_pages{int} := length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}
	call update_page_buttons
	btn_seq_view_close{int} -> hide := hide_state[seq.view_mode{int}]{int}
	btn_seq_view_close{int} -> x := btn_pages[num_pages{int}]{int} -> x
	btn_seq_view_close{int} -> y := btn_pages[num_pages{int}]{int} -> y
	lbl_play_separator{int} -> hide := hide_state[seq.view_mode{int}]{int}
	lbl_play_instrument_title{int} -> hide := hide_state[seq.view_mode{int}]{int}
	lbl_play_instrument_title{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int}
	if(slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} > - 1)
		lbl_play_instrument_title{int} -> text := instrument.short_names[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
	else
		lbl_play_instrument_title{int} -> text := ""
	end if
	btn_seq_view_close{int} -> picture := "btn_close" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
	lbl_play_separator{int} -> picture := "lbl_play" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}]{string}
	panel.play.seq_tables{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_play_page{int}]{int}
	panel.play.seq_matrix{int} -> hide := hide_state[seq.view_mode{int}]{int}
	xy_velo{real[]} -> hide := hide_state[seq.view_mode{int}]{int}
	mnu_copy_modes{int} -> hide := hide_state[seq.view_mode{int}]{int}
	btn_copy_ks{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(seq.view_mode{int})]{int}
	btn_paste_ks{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(seq.view_mode{int})]{int}
	panel.play.link_accent{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(seq.view_mode{int})]{int}
	btn_keyswitches_show{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(seq.view_mode{int})]{int}
	btn_keyswitch[current_keyswitch{int}]{int} -> value := 1
	xy_seq{real[]} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.global{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.arp{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.custom{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	panel.play.arp_custom{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_note_order{int} -> picture := "lbl_play_patterns"
	lbl_pattern_title{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
	mnu_rate{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{int}
	lbl_rate_title{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
	mnu_selection{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{int}
	lbl_selection_title{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
	panel.play.drums_disable_edit_buttons{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	select(seq.view_mode{int})
	case 0
		panel.play.global{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
			visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} := 1
			if(not (slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} = - 1))
				if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} = 0) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} = 3))
					visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} := (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, 1]{int}]{int} * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}) / num_pages{int}
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						visible_steps[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} := 64
					end if
				end if
			end if
			ui.update_sequencer_slot(i{int}, i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, 59, [(59 + 4) * i{int}])
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} := 0
	case 1
		btn_keyswitches_show{int} := 0
		lbl_current_keyswitch{int} -> picture_state := (mnu_keyswitch{int} * 2) + btn_keyswitches_show{int}
		panel.play.keyswitches{int} -> hide := hide_state[btn_keyswitches_show{int}]{int}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_rhythm{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
				lbl_rhythm[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				lbl_velo_scaled[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			lbl_seq_bg[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		panel.play.arp_custom{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		mnu_set_velo_to_zero{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
			lbl_note_order{int} -> picture_state := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int}
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (mnu_pattern{int} -> num_items - 1)) 
				set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mnu_pattern{int}), i{int}, ge(search[pattern_selection.arp_mode{int[]}, i{int}], 0))
				inc(i{int})
			end while
			a{int} := steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}
			visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int} := (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}) / num_pages{int}
			if((SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} # 0) and (SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} # 14))
				panel.play.arp{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				lbl_octave{int} -> text := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 4]{int}
				lbl_transpose{int} -> text := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 5]{int}
				lbl_repeat{int} -> text := SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 6]{int}
			else
				panel.play.custom{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 14)
					mnu_rate{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
					lbl_rate_title{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
					btn_disable_mnu_rate{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				end if
			end if
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				a{int} := 64 * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}
				visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int} := 64
				btn_disable_mnu_rate{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (mnu_pattern{int} -> num_items - 1)) 
					set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mnu_pattern{int}), i{int}, ge(search[pattern_selection.sus_mode{int[]}, i{int}], 0))
					inc(i{int})
				end while
				if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} # 0)
					mnu_rate{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
					lbl_rate_title{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
					btn_disable_mnu_rate{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				else
					panel.play.custom{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				end if
				panel.play.drums_disable_edit_buttons{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				btn_disable_mnu_selection{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (mnu_pattern{int} -> num_items - 1)) 
						set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mnu_pattern{int}), i{int}, ge(search[pattern_selection.drum_mode{int[]}, i{int}], 0))
						inc(i{int})
					end while
					mnu_selection{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
					lbl_selection_title{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
					panel.play.drums_disable_edit_buttons{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					btn_disable_mnu_selection{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					btn_disable_mnu_rate{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
					if(SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} # 0)
						mnu_rate{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
						lbl_rate_title{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[6]{int}
						btn_disable_mnu_rate{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
					end if
					a{int} := steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}
					visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int} := (steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}) / num_pages{int}
				end if
			end if
		end if
		ui.update_sequencer_slot(active_slot{int} mod 5, active_slot{int}, int(round(real(59) * 2.5)), 0)
		lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_velocity_offset{int} -> text := "None"
		lbl_velocity_offset{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		sli_velocity_offset{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_velocity_offset_disabled{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_velocity_offset_disabled{int} -> picture_state := 3
	end select
	call find.position_slot_buttons
	if(not (slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int} = - 1))
		call update_num_drum_insts
		call ui.update_sequencer_matrix
		call ui.update_sequencer_matrix_names
		if((SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 0]{int} = 0) and (seq.view_mode{int} = 1))
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 1] - 1)) 
				ii{int} := 0
				while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[lbl_seq_matrix{int[][]}, 2] - 1)) 
					if(((i{int} < ((steps_per_rate[mnu_signature{int}, SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, 1]{int}]{int} * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int}) / num_pages{int})) and (seq.pitch_data[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), ii{int}]{int} # 99)) and (((abs(ii{int} - 8) < _num_drum_insts{int}) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[active_slot{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)))
						lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> value := 1
						if((seq_matrix.last_d1{int} = i{int}) and (seq_matrix.last_d2{int} = ii{int}))
							lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} -> x := lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> x - 11
							lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} -> y := lbl_seq_matrix[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> y - 2
							sli_velocity_offset{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
							lbl_velocity_offset_disabled{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
							lbl_velocity_offset{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{int}
							sli_velocity_offset{int} -> value := seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets[current_keyswitch{int}, active_slot{int}, i{int} + (current_page{int} * visible_steps[active_slot{int}]{int}), ii{int}]{int}
							lbl_velocity_offset{int} -> text := ""
							if(sli_velocity_offset{int} > 0)
								lbl_velocity_offset{int} -> text := "+"
							end if
							lbl_velocity_offset{int} -> text := lbl_velocity_offset{int} -> text & (sli_velocity_offset{int} -> value * 10)
							if(sli_velocity_offset{int} = 0)
								lbl_velocity_offset{int} -> text := "None"
							end if
							lbl_seq_matrix_selected{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
						end if
					end if
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		end if
	end if
	call global_accents.update
	call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
end function

function array.clear(array : int[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		array[lib.i{int}]{int} := 0
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function global_fx.close
	btn_global_fx{int} := 0
	global_fx_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	fx_general_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_fxrack_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
end function

function tinylist.get(ls : int, idx : int)
	return (((sh_right(ls{int}, [(32 - ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - (min(idx{int}, (31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1) * ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))]) .and. (real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))) - 1)) * lt(idx{int}, 31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))) + (ge(idx{int}, 31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) * - 1))
end function

function table.to_vector(tbl : int, vec : int[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (min(vec[0]{int} + 1, get_menu_item_value(tbl{int}, 0) + 1) - 1)) 
		vec[lib.i{int}]{int} := get_menu_item_value(tbl{int}, lib.i{int})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function bitlist.control_to_bitlist(bit_list : int, ui_array : [])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= min(31, num_elements[ui_array{[]}] - 1)) 
		bitlist.set(bit_list{int}, lib.i{int}, ui_array[lib.i{int}]{unknown} -> value)
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function floatmask.search(float_mask : number[])
	return ((bool(float_mask[0]{number}) * (ge(float_mask[0]{number}, 0) * ((31 - real_to_int(log(int_to_real(max(1, 2147483647 .and. float_mask[0]{int}))) / log(2))) + (eq(float_mask[0]{number}, 0) * - 32)))) + (eq(float_mask[0]{number}, 0) * ((ge(float_mask[1]{number}, 0) * ((31 - real_to_int(log(int_to_real(max(1, 2147483647 .and. float_mask[1]{int}))) / log(2))) + (eq(float_mask[1]{number}, 0) * - 32))) + (32 * bool(float_mask[1]{number})))))
end function

function check_update_1_1_on_startup{thread-unsafe}
	preset.load_id{int} := load_array(update_1_1{int[]}, 1)
	wait_async(load_array(update_1_1{int[]}, 1))
	if(preset.load_id{int} = 0)
		message("initial startup after update 1.1 -> edit user presets")
		update_1_1[0]{int} := 0
		save_array(update_1_1{int[]}, 1)
	end if
	if(update_1_1[0]{int} = 0)
		array.clear(preset_new{int[]})
		save_array(preset_new{int[]}, 1)
		update_user_preset_tags_to_1_1
		update_1_1[0]{int} := 1
		save_array(update_1_1{int[]}, 1)
	end if
end function

function _test_message_successful(count : unknown, got : unknown, expected : unknown, time_elapsed : unknown)
	message("Test " & count{unknown} & " SUCCEEDED Ran for " & time_elapsed{unknown} & " ms.")
end function

function ui_array.toggle_button(control_array : [], exception_idx : int)
	ui_array.map(control_array{[]}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, 0)
	control_array[clamp(exception_idx{int}, 0, num_elements[control_array{[]}] - 1)]{unknown} -> value := 1
end function

function find_nka(array : any[], nka : unknown, search_depth : int) -> result : string
	declare local parent : string
	declare local it : int
	it{int} := 0
	parent{string} := ""
	_id{int} := load_array_str(array{any[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}) & parent{string} & nka{unknown} & ".nka")
	while((_id{int} # - 1) and (it{int} < search_depth{int})) 
		parent{string} := parent{string} & "../"
		_id{int} := load_array_str(array{any[]}, get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}) & parent{string} & nka{unknown} & ".nka")
		inc(it{int})
	end while
	result{string} := get_folder(GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR{int}) & parent{string} & nka{unknown} & ".nka"
end function

function octify(note : number)
	return ((octified_root_note_nums[note{number}]{int} + 1) * ne(eq(note{number}, 0)))
end function

function update.preset_situation
	ii{int} := 0
	NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} := search[user_preset_tags0{int[]}, 0]
	set_preset_numbers
	if(NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} > 0)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
			if(user_deleted_presets[i{int}]{int} = 1)
				user_preset_titles[ii{int}]{string} := user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string}
				user_preset_tags0[ii{int}]{int} := user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int}
				user_preset_tags1[ii{int}]{int} := user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int}
				user_preset_numbers[ii{int}]{int} := user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int}
				user_preset_info[ii{int}]{string} := user_preset_info[i{int}]{string}
				inc(ii{int})
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} := ii{int}
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} - 1)) 
			preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{string} := user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string}
			final_preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{string} := user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string}
			file_name_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{string} := user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string}
			preset_tags0[user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int}]{int} := user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int}
			preset_tags1[user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int}]{int} := user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int}
			preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{int} := user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int}
			final_preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{int} := user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int}
			preset_info[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int} + i{int}]{string} := user_preset_info[i{int}]{string}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[user_deleted_presets{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} < NUM_USER_PRESETS{int})
			user_deleted_presets[i{int}]{int} := 1
		else
			user_deleted_presets[i{int}]{int} := 0
			user_preset_titles[i{int}]{string} := 0
			user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int} := 0
			user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int} := 0
			user_preset_numbers[i{int}]{int} := 0
			user_preset_info[i{int}]{string} := 0
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	NUM_PRESETS{int} := NUM_USER_PRESETS{int} + NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{int}
	file_browser{int} -> basepath := base_path{string}
end function

function instrument_browser.update
	declare local _num_sounds : int := 0
	if(UI_instrument_browser{int} -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			btn_solo[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			btn_mute[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		call read_slot_colors
		lbl_horizontal_devider{int} -> picture_state := slot_colors[active_slot{int}]{int}
		lbl_override_fx{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[0]{int}
		if(btn_override_fx{int} = 1)
			lbl_override_fx{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_white[1]{int}
		end if
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (5 - 1)) 
			btn_category[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		btn_category[current_category{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (11 - 1)) 
			btn_section[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		btn_section[current_section{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (11 - 1)) 
			btn_section[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			if(instrument_browser.section_order[i{int} + (11 * current_category{int})]{int} # - 1)
				btn_section[i{int}]{int} -> text := instrument_browser.section_names[instrument_browser.section_order[i{int} + (11 * current_category{int})]{int}]{string}
				btn_section[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (16 - 1)) 
			if(instrument_browser.structure[current_category{int}, current_section{int}, i{int}]{int} # - 1)
				inc(_num_sounds{int})
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		sc_handle_size{int} := int(round(real(brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int}) / (real(_num_sounds{int}) / real(8))))
		lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> height := sc_handle_size{int}
		lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		sli_sc_scrollbar{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		if(sc_handle_size{int} >= brwsr_sli_scroll_height{int})
			lbl_sc_scrollhandle{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			sli_sc_scrollbar{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		current_instr_num{int} := _num_sounds{int}
		call nks.update_all_labels
		call instrument_browser.update_scroll
	end if
end function

function set_solo_mute
	declare local i : int
	declare local set_value : int
	declare local solo_active : int
	solo_active{int} := 0
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(solo_mute_states[0, i{int}]{int} = 1)
			solo_active{int} := 1
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(solo_active{int} = 1)
			if(solo_mute_states[0, i{int}]{int} = 1)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 397100, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
			else
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 0, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
			end if
		else
			if(solo_mute_states[1, i{int}]{int} = 1)
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 0, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
			else
				set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{int}, 397100, - 1, 5, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + i{int})
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function tinylist2d.set(ls : int[], x : unknown, y : int, val : int)
	tinylist.set(ls[x{unknown}]{int}, y{int}, val{int})
end function

function scale.range(input : number, currentMin : number, currentMax : number, scaleToMin : number, scaleToMax : number)
	return ((((input{number} - currentMin{number}) * (scaleToMax{number} - scaleToMin{number})) / (currentMax{number} - currentMin{number})) + scaleToMin{number})
end function

function array.min(array : int[]) -> result : int
	result{int} := array[0]{int}
	lib.i{int} := 1
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{int[]}] - 1)) 
		result{int} := min(array[lib.i{int}]{int}, result{int})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function bitlist.set_range(bit_list : int, start_idx : number, end_idx : number, val : number)
	bit_list{int} := (eq(val{number}, 1) * ((eq(end_idx{number} - start_idx{number}, 32) * sh_right(- 1, 32)) + (bit_list{int} .or. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{number} - start_idx{number}), 32 - end_idx{int})))) + (eq(val{number}, 0) * (lt(end_idx{number} - start_idx{number}, 32) * (bit_list{int} .and. .not. sh_left(.not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{number} - start_idx{number}), 32 - end_idx{int}))))
end function

function bitlist.get_range(bit_list : int, start_idx : number, end_idx : number)
	return ((eq(end_idx{number} - start_idx{number}, 32) * bit_list{int}) + sh_left(sh_right(bit_list{int}, 32 - end_idx{int}) .and. .not. sh_left(- 1, end_idx{number} - start_idx{number}), 32 - end_idx{int}))
end function
