(- sh_right(abs((val{int} - sh_right(ls{int}, [(32 - ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - (min(14, (31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1) * ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))])) .and. (real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))) - 1)) - 1, 31) * sh_left(real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))) - 1, [(32 - ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - (min(14, (31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1) * ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2))]))], 0) * - 32)))
end function

function floatmask.sh_left(float_mask : int[], pos : int)
	if(pos{int} < 32)
		float_mask[0]{int} := sh_left(float_mask[0]{int}, pos{int}) .or. sh_right_safe(float_mask[1]{int}, 32 - pos{int})
		float_mask[1]{int} := sh_left(float_mask[1]{int}, pos{int})
	else
		float_mask[0]{int} := sh_left(float_mask[1]{int}, pos{int} - 32)
		float_mask[1]{int} := 0
	end if
end function

function floatmask.get(float_mask : int[], idx : int)
	return (sh_right(float_mask[idx{int} / 32]{int}, (31 - idx{int}) mod 32) .and. 1)
end function

function tinylist2d.print(ls : int[])
	declare local bl : string
	lib.ii{int} := 0
	while(lib.ii{int} <= (num_elements[ls{int[]}] - 1)) 
		bl{string} := lib.ii{int} & ": ["
		lib.i{int} := 0
		while(lib.i{int} <= ((31 / ((ls[lib.ii{int}]{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1)) 
			bl{string} := bl{string} & tinylist.get(ls[lib.ii{int}]{int}, lib.i{int})
			if(lib.i{int} < ((31 / ((ls[lib.ii{int}]{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1))
				bl{string} := bl{string} & ", "
			end if
			inc(lib.i{int})
		end while
		bl{string} := bl{string} & "]"
		message(bl{string})
		inc(lib.ii{int})
	end while
end function

function tinylist.print(ls : int)
	declare local bl : string := "["
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= ((31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1)) 
		bl{string} := bl{string} & tinylist.get(ls{int}, lib.i{int})
		if(lib.i{int} < ((31 / ((ls{int} .and. 3) + 2)) - 1))
			bl{string} := bl{string} & ", "
		end if
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
	bl{string} := bl{string} & "]"
	message(bl{string})
end function

function update_morph_faders
	call read_slot_colors
	set_title_colors(slot_group_offset{int})
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		sli_volume[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		sli_volume_disp[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		sli_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		sli_volume_max[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 1) 
			lvl_volume[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		sli_oct[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		sli_pan[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		sli_rev_send[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		mnu_output[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		btn_solo[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		btn_mute[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= ((10 / 2) - 1)) 
		lbl_volume[i{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int}
		lbl_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int}
		lbl_volume_max[i{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.regular_colors[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int}
		lbl_volume[i{int}]{int} -> text := "Vol"
		lbl_volume_min[i{int}]{int} -> text := "Min"
		lbl_volume_max[i{int}]{int} -> text := "Max"
		sli_volume_min[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_mix_handle_left" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
		sli_volume_max[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_mix_handle_right" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
		sli_volume[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_mix_mod" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
		sli_volume_disp[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> picture := "slider_mix_strip" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
		sli_volume[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		sli_volume_disp[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		sli_volume_min[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		sli_volume_max[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_solo[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_solo" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
		btn_mute[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_mute" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
		if((instrument_browser{int} -> hide = HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}) and ((panel.shape{int} -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}) or (panel.play{int} -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int})))
			message("trigger unhide solo/mute")
			btn_solo[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			btn_mute[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		end if
		ii{int} := 0
		while(ii{int} <= 1) 
			lvl_volume[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}, ii{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			inc(ii{int})
		end while
		if(btn_output_section{int} = 1)
			lbl_oct[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			lbl_pan[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			lbl_rev_send[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			mnu_output[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_output_connector[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		else
			sli_oct[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> picture := "knob_steps_bipolar"
			sli_oct[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			btn_oct_block[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
			if((slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} > - 1) or (btn_midi_mode{int} = 1))
				if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} = 3) or (btn_midi_mode{int} = 1))
					sli_oct[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> picture := "knob_steps_bipolar_disabled"
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						sli_oct[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> value := 0
					end if
					btn_oct_block[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
				end if
			end if
			sli_pan[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			sli_rev_send[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_oct[i{int}]{int} -> text := "Oct"
			lbl_pan[i{int}]{int} -> text := "Pan"
			lbl_rev_send[i{int}]{int} -> text := "Rev"
			lbl_oct[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_pan[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_rev_send[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
			lbl_output_connector[i{int}]{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		end if
		btn_open_fx[i{int}]{int} -> picture := "btn_fx" & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string}
		message("slot " & i{int} & ": " & slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int} & " = " & slot_colors.suffixes[slot_colors[i{int} + slot_group_offset{int}]{int}]{string})
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function floatmask.set_range(float_mask : int[], start_idx : number, end_idx : number, val : number)
	bitlist.set_range(float_mask[0]{int}, min(32, start_idx{number}), min(32, end_idx{number}), val{number})
	bitlist.set_range(float_mask[1]{int}, max(32, start_idx{number}) - 32, max(32, end_idx{number}) - 32, val{number})
end function

function floatmask.and(float_mask1 : int[], float_mask2 : int[], return_mask : int[])
	return_mask[0]{int} := float_mask1[0]{int} .and. float_mask2[0]{int}
	return_mask[1]{int} := float_mask1[1]{int} .and. float_mask2[1]{int}
end function

function clamp.slider(x : int)
	return ((x{int} * is_in_range(x{int}, 0, 1000000)) - (1000000 * sh_right(1000000 - x{int}, 31)))
end function

function motion.apply_modwheel
	motion.iterator{int} := 0
	while(motion.iterator{int} <= (140 - 1)) 
		if(((motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value = 1) and (motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value = 0)) and ((btn_midi_mode{int} = 0) or (current_controller_channel{int} = motion.slot[motion.iterator{int}]{int})))
			motion.value{int} := motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value + real_to_int(int_to_real((motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value - motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value) * motion.modwheel{int}) / 127)
			motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value := scale.range.slider(int_to_real(motion.value{int}), int_to_real(motion.min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}), int_to_real(motion.max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}))
			s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if(s{int} # - 1)
				fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
				fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
				fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
				fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
				fxRack.ui_id{int} := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}
				if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
					call fxRack.execute_slider
				end if
			end if
			string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
			s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								ii{int} := 0
								while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
									mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
									tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
									set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
									string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
									inc(ii{int})
								end while
								inc(i{int})
							end while
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
					lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
					timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
				end if
			end if
			s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								ii{int} := 0
								while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
									mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
									tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
									set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
									string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
									inc(ii{int})
								end while
								inc(i{int})
							end while
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
					lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
					timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
				end if
			end if
			motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
		end if
		inc(motion.iterator{int})
	end while
end function

function min4(a : int, b : number, c : int, d : number)
	return (min(a{int}, b{number}) - ((min(a{int}, b{number}) - min(c{int}, d{number})) .and. sh_right([min(c{int}, d{number}) - min(a{int}, b{number})], 31)))
end function

function vector.to_table(vec : int[], tbl : int)
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (min(vec[0]{int} + 1, get_menu_item_value(tbl{int}, 0) + 1) - 1)) 
		set_menu_item_value(tbl{int}, lib.i{int}, vec[lib.i{int}]{int})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function bitlist.bitlist_to_control(bit_list : int, ui_array : any[])
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= min(31, num_elements[ui_array{any[]}] - 1)) 
		set_control_par(ui_array[lib.i{int}]{any}, CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int}, bitlist.get(bit_list{int}, lib.i{int}))
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function ge(a : number, b : number)
	return (sh_right(a{number} - b{number}, 31) + 1)
end function

function vector.pop_back(ls : int[]) -> result : int
	result{int} := ls[ls[0]{int}]{int}
	dec(ls[0]{int})
end function

function sign3(x : int)
	return (sign(x{int}) .and. - bool(x{int}))
end function

function floatmask.set(float_mask : int[], idx : int, val : int)
	float_mask[idx{int} / 32]{int} := (float_mask[idx{int} / 32]{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, (31 - idx{int}) mod 32)) .or. sh_left(val{int}, (31 - idx{int}) mod 32)
end function

function undo.load
	play.history.pointer{int} := (max(play.history.pointer{int} - 1, 0) + (le(play.history.pointer{int}, 0) * (9 - 1))) mod 9
	message("load undo at " & play.history.pointer{int})
	if((play.history.valid[play.history.pointer{int}]{int} = 1) and (play.history.pointer{int} # play.history.actual{int}))
		history.pull_value(play.history.signature{int[]}, mnu_signature{int})
		history.pull_value(play.history.length{int[]}, mnu_length_bar{int})
		history.pull_value(play.history.global_accents_enable{int[]}, btn_use_global_accents{int})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.global_accents{int[]}, _global_accents{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.global_accents_links{int[]}, apply_accent{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.seq.velo_data{int[]}, _seq.velo_data{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.seq.pitch_data{int[]}, _seq.pitch_data{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets{int[]}, _seq.pitch_data_velo_offsets{int[]})
		history.pull_array(_play.history.SEQ_PARAMETERS{int[]}, _SEQ_PARAMETERS{int[]})
		call ui.update_seq_display
	else
		play.history.pointer{int} := (play.history.pointer{int} + 1) mod 9
	end if
	call history.update_buttons
end function

function bitlist.reverse(bit_list : unknown)
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (32 / 2)) 
		bitlist.swap(bit_list{unknown}, lib.i{int}, 31 - lib.i{int})
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function vector.clear(ls : int[])
	ls[0]{int} := 0
end function

function extract_preset_info
	return (get_preset_info)
end function

function clamp(x : int, min : number, max : number)
	return (((x{int} * is_in_range(x{int}, min{number}, max{number})) - (min{int} * sh_right(x{int} - min{int}, 31))) - (max{int} * sh_right(max{int} - x{int}, 31)))
end function

function visibility.preset.save.dialog(Boolean : int)
	lbl_save_dialog{int} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	btn_save_confirm{int} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	btn_save_cancel{int} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	txt_presetname{string} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	btn_scan_presets{int} := 0
	on_btn_scan_presets
	btn_disable_input{int} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	btn_save{int} := Boolean{int}
	lbl_warning{int} -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{int}]{int}
	btn_prevPreset{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{int})]{int}
	btn_nextPreset{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{int})]{int}
	btn_presetBrowser{int} -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{int})]{int}
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_preset_button{int[]}] - 1)) 
		btn_preset_favorite[i{int}]{int} -> picture := btn_favorite_pics[Boolean{int}]{string}
		if(Boolean{int} = 1)
			btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int} -> font_type := fonts.base_font_blurred[0]{int}
			btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int} -> font_type_on := fonts.base_font_blurred[1]{int}
		else
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
				set_control_par(btn_preset_button[i{int}]{int}, font.types[ii{int}]{int}, fonts.base_font[ii{int}]{int})
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function history.update_buttons
	btn_play_page_undo{int} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_undo_disabled"
	btn_play_page_redo{int} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_redo_disabled"
	if((play.history.valid[(max(play.history.pointer{int} - 1, 0) + (le(play.history.pointer{int}, 0) * (9 - 1))) mod 9]{int} = 1) and (((max(play.history.pointer{int} - 1, 0) + (le(play.history.pointer{int}, 0) * (9 - 1))) mod 9) # play.history.actual{int}))
		btn_play_page_undo{int} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_undo"
	end if
	if((play.history.valid[(play.history.pointer{int} + 1) mod 9]{int} = 1) and (play.history.pointer{int} # play.history.actual{int}))
		btn_play_page_redo{int} -> picture := "btn_chordstudio_redo"
	end if
end function

function floatmask.get_range(float_mask : int[], start_idx : number, end_idx : number, return_mask : int[])
	return_mask[0]{int} := bitlist.get_range(float_mask[0]{int}, min(32, start_idx{number}), min(32, end_idx{number}))
	return_mask[1]{int} := bitlist.get_range(float_mask[1]{int}, max(32, start_idx{number}) - 32, max(32, end_idx{number}) - 32)
end function

function floatmask.print(float_mask : int[])
	declare local bl : string := "["
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (64 - 1)) 
		bl{string} := bl{string} & floatmask.get(float_mask{int[]}, lib.i{int})
		if(lib.i{int} < (64 - 1))
			bl{string} := bl{string} & ", "
		end if
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
	bl{string} := bl{string} & "]"
	message(bl{string})
end function

function set_eq_freq(slot : int, band : unknown, value : int)
	select(band{unknown})
	case 0
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	case 1
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ2{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	case 2
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_FREQ3{int}, value{int}, - 1, eq_position[slot{int}]{int} * (3 + 1), NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} + slot{int})
	end select
end function

function fill_section(cat : int, sec : int, a : int, b : int, c : int, d : int, e : int, f : int, g : int, h : int, i : int, j : int, k : int, l : int, m : int, n : int, o : int, p : int)
	instrument_browser.section_order[search[instrument_browser.section_order{int[]}, - 1, cat{int} * 11, ((cat{int} + 1) * 11) - 1]]{int} := sec{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 0]{int} := a{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 1]{int} := b{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 2]{int} := c{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 3]{int} := d{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 4]{int} := e{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 5]{int} := f{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 6]{int} := g{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 7]{int} := h{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 8]{int} := i{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 9]{int} := j{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 10]{int} := k{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 11]{int} := l{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 12]{int} := m{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 13]{int} := n{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 14]{int} := o{int}
	instrument_browser.structure[cat{int}, section_iterator[cat{int}]{int}, 15]{int} := p{int}
	inc(section_iterator[cat{int}]{int})
end function

function bitlist.clear(bit_list : int)
	bit_list{int} := 0
end function

function browser.load_preset{thread-unsafe}
	if((preset.idx{int} = preset.last_idx{int}) and (event_status(preview_id[preview_counter{int}]{int}) # EVENT_STATUS_INACTIVE{int}))
		call kill_preview
	else
		if(preset.idx{int} # preset.last_idx{int})
			fade_out(preview_id[preview_counter{int}]{int}, 30000, 1)
		end if
	end if
	if((preset.is_loading{int} = 0) and (preset.idx{int} # - 1))
		if(preset.idx{int} # preset.last_idx{int})
			preset.last_idx{int} := preset.idx{int}
			load_preset_array
			call play_preview
			if(preset.load_id{int} = - 1)
				call load_preset
				call nks.update_all_labels
				update_purge
			end if
		end if
	end if
end function

function sign(x : int)
	return (sh_right(x{int}, 31) .or. 1)
end function

function get_slot_icon(slot_idx : unknown)
	return (slot_icons[(instrument_browser.section_order[max(0, search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[slot_idx{unknown}]{int}]) / 16]{int} + (eq(search[_instrument_browser.structure{int[]}, slot.loaded_sound[slot_idx{unknown}]{int}], - 1) * (num_elements[slot_icons{string[]}] - 1))) + (eq(slot.loaded_sound[slot_idx{unknown}]{int}, - 1) * (num_elements[slot_icons{string[]}] - 1))]{string})
end function

function neg(x : int)
	return (- sh_right(x{int}, 31))
end function

function le(a : number, b : number)
	return (1 + sh_right(b{number} - a{number}, 31))
end function

function timed_display.trigger_with_bg_ani(control_id : int, text : unknown, time : int, frames : int)
	declare local _id : int := search[timed_display.controls{int[]}, control_id{int}]
	if(_id{int} # - 1)
		timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := time{int}
		if(time{int} = 0)
			timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := 1200
		end if
		timed_display.texts[_id{int}]{string} := text{unknown}
		timed_display.properties[_id{int}]{int} := frames{int}
		timed_display.counters[_id{int}]{int} := 0
	else
		_id{int} := search[timed_display.controls{int[]}, - 1]
		if(_id{int} # - 1)
			timed_display.controls[_id{int}]{int} := control_id{int}
			timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := time{int}
			if(time{int} = 0)
				timed_display.times[_id{int}]{int} := 1200
			end if
			timed_display.texts[_id{int}]{string} := text{unknown}
			timed_display.counters[_id{int}]{int} := 0
			timed_display.properties[_id{int}]{int} := frames{int}
			none{int} := animation.picture.start(control_id{int}, 0, frames{int} - 1, frames{int}, 0)
		else
			control_id{int} -> text := text{unknown}
		end if
	end if
end function

function controller_callback
	if(current_controller{int} = dyn_cc_num{int})
		motion.modwheel{int} := CC[current_controller{int}]{int}
		message("motion.modwheel = " & motion.modwheel{int} & ", CC = " & CC[current_controller{int}]{int})
		call motion.mw_animation
		call motion.apply_modwheel
	end if
	if(current_controller{int} = mnu_cc{int})
		call ui.update_velo_scaled_labels
		set_controller(111, 127)
		call execute_morph_faders
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
			if((SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 0]{int} = 14) or ((btn_midi_mode{int} = 1) and (current_controller_channel{int} = i{int})))
				current_controller_value[i{int}]{int} := motion.modwheel{int}
				ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
				while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
					if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
						set_event_par_arr(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_MOD_VALUE_ID{int}, int((1e+06 * real(motion.modwheel{int})) / 127), 1)
					end if
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
			end if
			inc(i{int})
		end while
	end if
end function

function log(base : int, value : real)
	return (log(value{real}) / log(int_to_real(base{int})))
end function

function history.put_array(history : [], array : [])
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)) 
		history[(num_elements[array{[]}] * play.history.pointer{int}) + i{int}]{unknown} := array[i{int}]{unknown}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function undo.flush
	array.reset(play.history.valid{int[]}, 0)
	play.history.pointer{int} := - 1
	call undo.create
end function

function double_click
	declare local new_click_time : int
	declare local click_interval : int
	double_click_state{int} := 0
	click_interval{int} := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} - new_click_time{int}
	new_click_time{int} := ENGINE_UPTIME{int}
	if(click_interval{int} < double_click_interval{int})
		double_click_state{int} := 1
	end if
end function

function vector.print(ls : int[])
	declare local l : string := "["
	lib.i{int} := 1
	while(lib.i{int} <= ls[0]{int}) 
		l{string} := l{string} & ls[lib.i{int}]{int}
		if(lib.i{int} < ls[0]{int})
			l{string} := l{string} & ", "
		end if
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
	l{string} := l{string} & "]"
	message(l{string})
end function

function global_fx.open
	call fxRack.close
	call instrument_browser.close
	btn_global_fx{int} := 1
	global_fx_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	fx_general_display{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> picture := "lbl_bg_fx_panel_top_global"
	if(mnu_reverb_type{int} = 0)
		mnu_ir{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_fxglobal_ir_previous{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		btn_fxglobal_ir_next{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		sli_reverb_length{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		lbl_reverb_length{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> pos_x := (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int} -> pos_x + (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int} -> width / 2)) - int(real(sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> width) * 1.5)
		sli_reverb_output{int} -> pos_x := (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int} -> pos_x + (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int} -> width / 2)) + int(real(sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> width) * 1)
	else
		mnu_ir{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		btn_fxglobal_ir_previous{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		btn_fxglobal_ir_next{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
		sli_reverb_length{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		lbl_reverb_length{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
		sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> pos_x := ((lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int} -> pos_x + (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int} -> width / 2)) - (sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> width / 2)) + 1
		sli_reverb_output{int} -> pos_x := ((lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int} -> pos_x + (lbl_fxglobal_reverb_symbol{int} -> width / 2)) + (sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> width * 2)) + 1
	end if
	lbl_reverb_predelay{int} -> pos_x := sli_reverb_predelay{int} -> pos_x - 17
	lbl_reverb_output{int} -> pos_x := sli_reverb_output{int} -> pos_x - 19
	lbl_fxrack_bg{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	lbl_fxrack_top_line{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
end function

function bitlist.print(bit_list : int)
	declare local bl : string := "["
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (32 - 1)) 
		bl{string} := bl{string} & bitlist.get(bit_list{int}, lib.i{int})
		if(lib.i{int} < (32 - 1))
			bl{string} := bl{string} & ", "
		end if
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
	bl{string} := bl{string} & "]"
	message(bl{string})
end function

function on_saving_preset_dialog
	visibility.preset.save.dialog(1)
	UI_preset_save_dialog{int} -> hide := hide_state[1]{int}
	if(preset.idx{int} # - 1)
		floatmask.load(presetmask{int[]}, preset_tags0[preset.idx{int}]{int}, preset_tags1[preset.idx{int}]{int})
		select(saving_preset{int})
		case user.EDITS_TAGS{int}
			txt_presetname{string} -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}
		case user.SAVES_NEW{int}
			if(is_user_preset(presetmask{int[]}) = 0)
				txt_presetname{string} -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & " (User)"
			else
				txt_presetname{string} -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string}
			end if
		end select
		lbl_warning{int} -> text := "Choose a selection of tags"
		add_text_line(lbl_warning{int}, "that apply to your preset")
		lbl_warning{int} -> font_type := fonts.base_font[1]{int}
		floatmask.control_to_floatmask(bit_list{int[]}, tag_button_array{int[]})
		bit_list2[0]{int} := bit_list[0]{int}
		bit_list2[1]{int} := bit_list[1]{int}
		floatmask.load(bit_list{int[]}, preset_tags0[preset.idx{int}]{int}, preset_tags1[preset.idx{int}]{int})
		floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, 33 - 1, favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{int}]{int})
		ii{int} := get_category_idx(0)
		floatmask.set_range(bit_list{int[]}, category_accum[ii{int}]{int}, category_accum[ii{int} + 1]{int} - 1, 0)
		message("ii: " & ii{int})
		floatmask.print(bit_list{int[]})
		floatmask.set(bit_list{int[]}, 0, 1)
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= ((33 - 1) - 1)) 
			tag_button_array[i{int}]{int} -> value := floatmask.get(bit_list{int[]}, i{int})
			u{int} := 0
			while(u{int} <= (num_elements[font.types{int[]}] - 1)) 
				set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{int}]{int}, font.types[u{int}]{int}, fonts.base_font[u{int}]{int})
				inc(u{int})
			end while
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		btn_current_favorite{int} -> value := favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{int}]{int}
	end if
end function

function ne(x : number)
	return (abs(sh_right(abs(x{number}) - 1, 31)))
end function

function seq.x_to_px(value : real)
	return ((int(round(value{real} * real(665))) + xy_seq{real[]} -> x) + (10 / 2))
end function

function decimals(value : number, div : number, dec_div : number)
	return ((value{number} / div{number}) & '.' & abs((value{number} mod div{number}) / dec_div{number}))
end function

function release_all_notes
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
			while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
				if(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1)
					note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
					last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
				end if
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function motion.apply_lfo
	motion.iterator{int} := 0
	while(motion.iterator{int} <= (140 - 1)) 
		if((motion.btn_enable[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value = 1) and (motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value > 0))
			motion.value{int} := motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value + real_to_int(int_to_real(motion.sli_max[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value - motion.sli_min[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value) * lfo[motion.mnu_source[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value - 1]{real})
			motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value := scale.range.slider(int_to_real(motion.value{int}), int_to_real(motion.min[motion.iterator{int}]{int}), int_to_real(motion.max[motion.iterator{int}]{int}))
			s{int} := search[_sli_fxrack_control{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if(s{int} # - 1)
				fxRack.value{int} := _sli_fxrack_control[s{int}]{int} -> value
				fxRack.slot{int} := s{int} / (4 * 3)
				fxRack.fx_slot{int} := (s{int} / 4) mod 3
				fxRack.control{int} := s{int} mod 4
				fxRack.ui_id{int} := motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}
				if(loaded_fx_types[fxRack.slot{int}, fxRack.fx_slot{int}]{int} # 6)
					call fxRack.execute_slider
				end if
			end if
			string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
			s{int} := search[sli_attack{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								ii{int} := 0
								while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
									mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
									tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
									set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
									string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
									inc(ii{int})
								end while
								inc(i{int})
							end while
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
					lbl_attack{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
					timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_attack{int}), "Attack", 0)
				end if
			end if
			s{int} := search[sli_release{int[]}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int}]
			if((s{int} # - 1) and (slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1))
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
							mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
							set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
							string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					else
						if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
							i{int} := 0
							while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								ii{int} := 0
								while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
									mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
									tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
									set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> value, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int})
									string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
									inc(ii{int})
								end while
								inc(i{int})
							end while
						end if
					end if
				end if
				if(s{int} = active_slot{int})
					lbl_release{int} -> text := string_buffer{string}
					timed_display.trigger(get_ui_id(lbl_release{int}), "Release", 0)
				end if
			end if
			motion.ui_ids[motion.iterator{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
		end if
		inc(motion.iterator{int})
	end while
end function

function _allow_group(eventID : int, s : int, note : unknown)
	declare local i : int
	declare local ii : int
	set_event_par_arr(eventID{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 0, ALL_GROUPS{int})
	if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
		if(executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} = 0)
			inc(slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int})
			if(slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} >= instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int})
				slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} := 0
			end if
			executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} := 1
		end if
		set_event_par_arr(eventID{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int}) + 1)
	else
		if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
			i{int} := 0
			while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
				set_event_par_arr(eventID{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1)
				inc(i{int})
			end while
		else
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
				if(executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} = 0)
					inc(slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int})
					if(slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} >= instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int})
						slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int} := 0
					end if
					executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} := 1
				end if
				if(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} > 0)
					ii{int} := 0
					while(ii{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						set_event_par_arr(eventID{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int}) + 1) + (ii{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1)))
						inc(ii{int})
					end while
				else
					set_event_par_arr(eventID{int}, EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int}, 1, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + slot.rr_cycle[s{int}]{int}) + 1)
				end if
			end if
		end if
	end if
	redirect_output(eventID{int}, OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT{int}, s{int})
end function

function vector.push_back(ls : int[], val : int)
	ls[max(1, ls[0]{int} + 1)]{int} := val{int}
	inc(ls[0]{int})
end function

function remote(array : [], except : int)
	declare local _iterator : int
	_iterator{int} := 0
	while(_iterator{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)) 
		array[_iterator{int}]{unknown} -> value := 0
		if(except{int} = _iterator{int})
			array[_iterator{int}]{unknown} -> value := 1
		end if
		inc(_iterator{int})
	end while
end function

function lt(a : number, b : number)
	return (- sh_right(a{number} - b{number}, 31))
end function

function animation.abort(animation_id : int)
	if(animation_id{int} > - 1)
		if(animation.controls[animation_id{int}]{int} # - 1)
			animation.controls[animation_id{int}]{int} := - 1
		end if
	end if
end function

function eq(a : number, b : number)
	return (- sh_right(abs(a{number} - b{number}) - 1, 31))
end function

function save.favorite_array
	save_array(favorite_presets_array{int[]}, 1)
end function

function bitlist.load(bit_list : unknown, val : unknown)
	bit_list{unknown} := val{unknown}
end function

function floatmask.load(float_mask : [], bit_list1 : unknown, bit_list2 : unknown)
	float_mask[0]{unknown} := bit_list1{unknown}
	float_mask[1]{unknown} := bit_list2{unknown}
end function

function eq.curve
	eq.freq[0]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, 0]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 0, real(50))
	eq.freq[1]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, 1]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 0, real(50))
	eq.freq[2]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_freq[active_slot{int}, 2]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 0, real(50))
	eq.gain[0]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, 0]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, - 1000, 1000)
	eq.gain[1]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, 1]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, - 1000, 1000)
	eq.gain[2]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_gain[active_slot{int}, 2]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, - 1000, 1000)
	eq.q[0]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_q[active_slot{int}, 0]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 2, 18)
	eq.q[1]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_q[active_slot{int}, 1]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 2, 18)
	eq.q[2]{real} := scale.range(real(eq.sli_q[active_slot{int}, 2]{int} -> value), 0, 1e+06, 2, 18)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (50 - 1)) 
		eq.band[0, i{int}]{int} := int(eq.gain[0]{real} * exp([- 0.5 * pow((real(i{int}) - eq.freq[0]{real}) / eq.q[0]{real}, 2)]))
		eq.band[1, i{int}]{int} := int(eq.gain[1]{real} * exp([- 0.5 * pow((real(i{int}) - eq.freq[1]{real}) / eq.q[1]{real}, 2)]))
		eq.band[2, i{int}]{int} := int(eq.gain[2]{real} * exp([- 0.5 * pow((real(i{int}) - eq.freq[2]{real}) / eq.q[2]{real}, 2)]))
		btn_eq_display[i{int}]{int} -> height := (clamp((eq.band[0, i{int}]{int} + eq.band[1, i{int}]{int}) + eq.band[2, i{int}]{int}, - 1000, 1000) + 1000) / 32
		btn_eq_display[i{int}]{int} -> y := (82 + 63) - btn_eq_display[i{int}]{int} -> height
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function table.get(ls : int, idx : int)
	return (get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, min(get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0) + 1, idx{int} + 1)))
end function

function swap(a : int, b : int)
	a{int} := a{int} .xor. b{int}
	b{int} := b{int} .xor. a{int}
	a{int} := a{int} .xor. b{int}
end function

function update_user_preset_tags_to_1_1
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[user_preset_tags0{int[]}] - 1)) 
		floatmask.load(bit_list2{int[]}, user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int}, user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int})
		update_user_preset_to_1_1(bit_list2{int[]}, 1)
		user_preset_tags0[i{int}]{int} := bit_list2[0]{int}
		user_preset_tags1[i{int}]{int} := bit_list2[1]{int}
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	save.resource_arrays
end function

function ui.update_minus_button
	btn_remove_chord_set{int} -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{int}
	if((active_chord_set{int} = (chord_set_num{int} - 1)) and (chord_set_num{int} > 1))
		btn_remove_chord_set{int} -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{int}
	end if
	call ui.update_skip_prev_buttons
end function

function _test_init_message(separator : unknown)
	message("RUN TESTS")
end function

function is_in_range(value : number, a : number, b : number)
	return (1 + (sh_right(b{number} - value{number}, 31) .or. sh_right(value{number} - a{number}, 31)))
end function

function update_slot_names
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_slot{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + ((10 / 2) * active_slot_group{int})]{int} # - 1)
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := instrument.short_names[slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + ((10 / 2) * active_slot_group{int})]{int}]{string}
			lbl_slot_icon[i{int}]{int} -> picture_state := slot.loaded_sound[i{int} + ((10 / 2) * active_slot_group{int})]{int}
			if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := "         " & btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text
			end if
		else
			btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := "None"
			if(btn_play_page{int} = 1)
				btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text := "         " & btn_slot[i{int}]{int} -> text
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function update_purge
	declare local _is_loaded : int
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (512 - 1)) 
		if(instrument.exists[i{int}]{int} = 1)
			_is_loaded{int} := 0
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
				if(slot.loaded_sound[ii{int}]{int} = i{int})
					_is_loaded{int} := 1
				end if
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			if(i{int} = 54)
				_is_loaded{int} := 1
			end if
			ii{int} := instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int}
			while(ii{int} <= ((instrument.start_group[i{int}]{int} + instrument.num_groups[i{int}]{int}) - 1)) 
				if(_is_loaded{int} = 0)
					purge_group(ii{int}, 0)
				else
					purge_group(ii{int}, 1)
				end if
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	purge_group(preview_group_idx{int}, 1)
end function

function tempo.update
	declare local _factor : real
	real_buffer{real} := tempo{real}
	tempo{real} := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960
	if(btn_tempo_half{int} = 1)
		tempo.internal_multiplier{real} := 0.5
	else
		if(btn_tempo_normal{int} = 1)
			tempo.internal_multiplier{real} := 1
		else
			if(btn_tempo_double{int} = 1)
				tempo.internal_multiplier{real} := 2
			end if
		end if
	end if
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if((instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 0) or (instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 3))
				midi_steps[i{int}]{real} := (1000 / ((tempo{real} * tempo.internal_multiplier{real}) / 60)) / notes_per_beat[SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{real}
				mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int} := int(960 / notes_per_beat[SEQ_PARAMETERS[current_keyswitch{int}, i{int}, 1]{int}]{real})
				message("Update tempo ONE_SHOT - " & " midi steps: " & midi_steps[i{int}]{real} & " - event_lengths: " & mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int})
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					midi_steps[i{int}]{real} := (1000 / ((tempo{real} * tempo.internal_multiplier{real}) / 60)) / 16
					mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int} := int(960 / 64)
					message("Update tempo Sustain - " & " midi steps: " & midi_steps[i{int}]{real} & " - event_lengths: " & mf.event_lengths[i{int}]{int})
				end if
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
	chord.midi_step{real} := (1000 / ((tempo{real} * tempo.internal_multiplier{real}) / 60)) / 2
	max_play_pos{int} := int(chord.midi_step{real} * real(eights_per_bar[mnu_signature{int}]{int} * length_bar_list[mnu_length_bar{int}]{int})) - 1
	if(play_pos{int} # 0)
		play_pos{int} := int(round(real(play_pos{int}) * (real_buffer{real} / tempo{real})))
		chord.play_pos{int} := int(round(real(chord.play_pos{int}) * (real_buffer{real} / tempo{real})))
	end if
end function

function resave_preset
	call save_preset
	save_array_str(preset.array{int[]}, preset_path{string} & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{int[]}, preset.idx{int}]]{string} & ".nka")
end function

function sh_right_safe(val : int, pos : int)
	return ((sh_right(val{int}, 31) .and. (1 * sh_left(1, 31 - pos{int}))) .or. sh_right(val{int} .and. 2147483647, pos{int}))
end function

function save_scanned_preset_vars
	user_preset_titles[preset.usr_count{int}]{string} := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{int}), 0)
	user_preset_tags0[preset.usr_count{int}]{int} := (bool(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}) * preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}) + (eq(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}, 0) * - 1)
	user_preset_tags1[preset.usr_count{int}]{int} := (bool(preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}) * preset.array[preset.TAGS1_IDX{int}]{int}) + (eq(preset.array[preset.TAGS0_IDX{int}]{int}, 0) * - 1)
	user_deleted_presets[preset.usr_count{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{int}]{int}
	preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int} := validate.user_preset_idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int})
	user_preset_numbers[preset.usr_count{int}]{int} := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{int}]{int}
	user_preset_info[preset.usr_count{int}]{string} := extract_preset_info
	inc(preset.usr_count{int})
end function

function update_slot_group_underline_position
	if(active_slot_group{int} = 0)
		set_bounds(lbl_slot_group_underline{int}, btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> x + 7, btn_prev_slot_group{int} -> y + 12, 22)
	else
		set_bounds(lbl_slot_group_underline{int}, btn_next_slot_group{int} -> x + 7, btn_next_slot_group{int} -> y + 1, 26)
	end if
	lbl_slot_group_underline_shape{int} -> x := 62 + (active_slot_group{int} * 697)
end function

function table.print(ls : int)
	declare local l : string := "["
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0) - 1)) 
		l{string} := l{string} & table.get(ls{int}, lib.i{int})
		if(lib.i{int} < (get_menu_item_value(ls{int}, 0) - 1))
			l{string} := l{string} & ", "
		end if
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
	l{string} := l{string} & "]"
	message(l{string})
end function

function jam.get_history(back : int)
	if(history_array[1, ((history_pointers[1]{int} + back{int}) + 10) mod 10]{int} = 1)
		if(history_array[1, ((history_pointers[1]{int} + 1) + 10) mod 10]{int} = 0)
			call jam.save_history
			history_pointers[1]{int} := ((history_pointers[1]{int} + back{int}) + 10) mod 10
		end if
		history_pointers[1]{int} := ((history_pointers[1]{int} + back{int}) + 10) mod 10
		i{int} := 0
		while(i{int} <= (8 - 1)) 
			ii{int} := 0
			while(ii{int} <= (6 - 1)) 
				jams[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := jams_history[history_pointers[1]{int}, i{int}, ii{int}]{int}
				inc(ii{int})
			end while
			jams.octaves[i{int}]{int} := jams.octaves_history[history_pointers[1]{int}, i{int}]{int}
			inc(i{int})
		end while
		call update_jam_slots
		call chord.get_current_jam
		active_chord_type_group{int} := search[chord_type_order{int[]}, active_chord_type{int}] / 8
		chord_type_group_offset{int} := 8 * active_chord_type_group{int}
		call update_type_buttons
		mnu_bass_note{int} := active_bass_note{int}
		call update_chord_info_label
		remote_chromatic_buttons(active_root{int})
	end if
	call ui.update_undo_redo_buttons
end function

function bitlist.set(bit_list : int, idx : int, val : number)
	bit_list{int} := .not. (.not. ((bit_list{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{int})) .and. .not. ((bit_list{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{int})) .and. (- val{number} .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{int})))) .and. .not. ((- val{number} .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{int})) .and. .not. ((bit_list{int} .and. .not. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{int})) .and. (- val{number} .and. sh_left(1, 31 - idx{int})))))
end function

function release_all_sus_notes_except
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		if(slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
				while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[i{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
					if((last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1) and (release_exceptions[ii{int}]{int} = 0))
						note_off(last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int})
						last_note_ids[i{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
					end if
					inc(ii{int})
				end while
			end if
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function array.remove(array : [], idx : int)
	lib.ii{int} := 0
	lib.i{int} := 0
	while(lib.i{int} <= (num_elements[array{[]}] - 1)) 
		if(lib.i{int} # idx{int})
			array[lib.ii{int}]{unknown} := array[lib.i{int}]{unknown}
			inc(lib.ii{int})
		end if
		inc(lib.i{int})
	end while
end function

function remote_chromatic_buttons(exclude : int)
	i{int} := 0
	while(i{int} <= (num_elements[btn_chromatic{int[]}] - 1)) 
		if(i{int} # exclude{int})
			btn_chromatic[i{int}]{int} -> value := 0
		else
			btn_chromatic[i{int}]{int} -> value := 1
		end if
		inc(i{int})
	end while
end function

function nks.update_attack_release_labels
	s{int} := 0
	while(s{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
		if(slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
								inc(ii{int})
							end while
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		sli_attack[s{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
		message("label set - " & sli_attack[s{int}]{int} -> label)
		inc(s{int})
	end while
	s{int} := 0
	while(s{int} <= (10 - 1)) 
		string_buffer{string} := "N/A"
		if(slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int} # - 1)
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 0)
				i{int} := 0
				while(i{int} <= (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
					mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
					tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
					string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
					inc(i{int})
				end while
			else
				if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
					i{int} := 0
					while(i{int} <= (instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1)) 
						mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
						string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, (instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + i{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
						inc(i{int})
					end while
				else
					if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 3)
						i{int} := 0
						while(i{int} <= max(instrument.dynamic_layers[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
							ii{int} := 0
							while(ii{int} <= max(instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - 1, 0)) 
								mod_idx{int} := get_mod_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, "ENV_AHDSR")
								tar_idx{int} := get_target_idx(((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
								string_buffer{string} := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{int}, ((instrument.start_group[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + (i{int} * (instrument.rr_nums[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} + 1))) + ii{int}) + 1, mod_idx{int}, tar_idx{int}) & " ms"
								inc(ii{int})
							end while
							inc(i{int})
						end while
					end if
				end if
			end if
		end if
		sli_release[s{int}]{int} -> label := string_buffer{string}
		inc(s{int})
	end while
end function

function buffer_to_free_mode
	s{int} := free_mode_slot{int}
	message("trigger fmb for s = " & s{int})
	executed_rr_inc[s{int}]{int} := 0
	a{int} := 0
	while(a{int} <= (selected_cursor[s{int}]{int} - 1)) 
		triggered_note{int} := play_buffer[s{int}, a{int}]{int} + (sli_oct[s{int}]{int} -> value * 12)
		pressed_note{int} := play_buffer[s{int}, a{int}]{int}
		if(triggered_note{int} # - 1)
			trigger_free_mode(s{int}, triggered_note{int}, pressed_note{int}, free_mode_velocities[pressed_note{int}]{int})
		end if
		inc(a{int})
	end while
	ii{int} := instrument.range_low[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12)
	while(ii{int} <= (instrument.range_high[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} - (oct_shifts[i{int}]{int} * 12))) 
		if((last_note_ids[s{int}, ii{int}]{int} # - 1) and (search[_play_buffer{int[]}, ii{int}, s{int} * 512, ((s{int} + 1) * 512) - 1] = - 1))
			note_off(last_note_ids[s{int}, ii{int}]{int})
			last_note_ids[s{int}, ii{int}]{int} := - 1
			if(instrument.type[slot.loaded_sound[s{int}]{int}]{int} = 1)
				mf_set_event_par(mf.sustained_events[s{int}, ii{int}]{int}, EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{int}, NI_SONG_POSITION{int} - mf.on_note_timestamps[s{int}, ii{int}]{int})
			end if
		end if
		inc(ii{int})
	end while
end function
